4026    // LLM never sees (and reproduces) this internal summary format.
4027    for turn in &mut prior_turns {
4028        if turn.role == "assistant" && turn.content.starts_with("[Used tools:") {
4029            turn.content = strip_tool_summary_prefix(&turn.content);
4030        }
4031    }
4032
4033    // Strip [IMAGE:] markers from older cached turns before context
4034    // compression. The current message keeps its full payload so vision still
4035    // works for the active turn; historical turns keep compact annotations.
4036    strip_historical_image_payloads(&mut prior_turns);
4037
4038    // Proactively trim conversation history before sending to the model_provider
4039    // to prevent context-window-exceeded errors (bug #3460).
4040    let dropped = proactive_trim_turns(&mut prior_turns, PROACTIVE_CONTEXT_BUDGET_CHARS);
4041    if dropped > 0 {
4042        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(INFO, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"sender": msg.sender, "dropped_turns": dropped, "remaining_turns": prior_turns.len()})), "Proactively trimmed conversation history to fit context budget");
4043    }
4044
4045    // ── Dual-scope memory recall ──────────────────────────────────
4046    // Always recall before each LLM call (not just first turn).
4047    // For group chats: merge sender-scope + group-scope memories.
4048    // For DMs: recall from the current conversation scope plus sender scope.
4049    let is_group_chat = is_group_reply_target(&msg.reply_target);
4050
4051    let mem_recall_start = Instant::now();
4052    let sender_session_ids = sender_memory_session_ids(&msg, &history_key);
4053    let sender_session_id_refs: Vec<Option<&str>> = sender_session_ids
4054        .iter()
4055        .map(|s| Some(s.as_str()))
4056        .collect();
4057    let sender_memory_fut = build_memory_context_for_sessions(
4058        ctx.memory.as_ref(),
4059        &msg.content,
4060        ctx.min_relevance_score,
4061        sender_session_id_refs.as_slice(),
4062    );
4063
4064    let (sender_memory, group_memory) = if is_group_chat {
4065        let group_memory_fut = build_memory_context(
4066            ctx.memory.as_ref(),
4067            &msg.content,
4068            ctx.min_relevance_score,
4069            Some(&history_key),
4070        );
4071        tokio::join!(sender_memory_fut, group_memory_fut)
4072    } else {
4073        (sender_memory_fut.await, String::new())
4074    };
4075    #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)]
4076    let mem_recall_ms = mem_recall_start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64;
4077    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(INFO, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"mem_recall_ms": mem_recall_ms, "sender_empty": sender_memory.is_empty(), "group_empty": group_memory.is_empty()})), "memory recall completed");
4078
4079    // Merge sender and group memory context blocks.
4080    let memory_context = if group_memory.is_empty() {
4081        sender_memory
4082    } else if sender_memory.is_empty() {
4083        group_memory
4084    } else {
4085        format!("{sender_memory}\n{group_memory}")
4086    };
4087
4088    // Use refreshed system prompt for new sessions (master's /new support),
4089    // and inject memory into system prompt (not user message) so it
4090    // doesn't pollute session history and is re-fetched each turn.
4091    let base_system_prompt = if had_prior_history {
4092        ctx.system_prompt.as_str().to_string()
4093    } else {
4094        refreshed_new_session_system_prompt(ctx.as_ref())
4095    };
4096    let mut system_prompt =
4097        build_channel_system_prompt_for_message(&base_system_prompt, &msg, target_channel.as_ref());
4098    if !memory_context.is_empty() {
4099        let _ = write!(system_prompt, "\n\n{memory_context}");
4100    }
4101    let mut history = vec![ChatMessage::system(system_prompt)];
4102    history.extend(prior_turns);
4103
4104    // ── Proactive context compression ────────────────────────────
4105    // Use the existing ContextCompressor to summarize older history
4106    // before the LLM call, preventing context-window-exceeded errors
4107    // and preserving key decisions through LLM-driven summarization.
4108    {
4109        let cc_config = ctx.agent_cfg.resolved.context_compression.clone();
4110        let compressor = zeroclaw_runtime::agent::context_compressor::ContextCompressor::new(
4111            cc_config,
4112            ctx.context_token_budget,
4113        )
4114        .with_memory(Arc::clone(&ctx.memory));
4115        match compressor
4116            .compress_if_needed(
4117                &mut history,
4118                active_model_provider.as_ref(),
4119                route.model.as_str(),
4120                runtime_defaults.defaults.temperature,
4121            )
4122            .await
4123        {
4124            Ok(result) if result.compressed => {
4125                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(INFO, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"sender": msg.sender, "tokens_before": result.tokens_before, "tokens_after": result.tokens_after, "passes": result.passes_used})), "Proactive context compression applied before LLM call");
4126            }
4127            Err(e) => {
4128                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4129                    WARN,
4130                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4131                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown)
4132                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4133                    "Context compression failed, proceeding without"
4134                );
4135            }
4136            _ => {}
4137        }
4138    }
4139
4140    // ── Reply-intent precheck ────────────────────────────────────────
4141    let explicit_channel_address =
4142        is_explicitly_addressed_channel_message(&msg.channel, &msg.content);
4143    let classifier_intent = if explicit_channel_address {
4144        AssistantChannelOutcome::Reply(String::new())
4145    } else {
4146        let (classifier_provider_arc, classifier_model_owned, classifier_temperature): (
4147            Arc<dyn ModelProvider>,
4148            String,
4149            Option<f64>,
4150        ) = resolve_classifier_route(
4151            ctx.as_ref(),
4152            &ctx.agent_cfg.classifier_provider,
4153            &runtime_defaults,
4154        )
4155        .await
4156        .unwrap_or_else(|| {
4157            (
4158                Arc::clone(&active_model_provider),
4159                route.model.clone(),
4160                None,
4161            )
4162        });
4163
4164        classify_channel_reply_intent(
4165            classifier_provider_arc.as_ref(),
4166            history[0].content.as_str(),
4167            &history,
4168            classifier_model_owned.as_str(),
4169            classifier_temperature.or(runtime_defaults.defaults.temperature),
4170        )
4171        .await
4172        .unwrap_or(AssistantChannelOutcome::Reply(String::new()))
4173    };
4174
4175    // ACP sessions are direct user requests — there is no broadcast,
4176    // no peer context, no spam concern. The no-reply classifier is a
4177    // multi-agent / chatroom heuristic; on ACP, every inbound is a
4178    // call to action and must produce a reply. Override the verdict
4179    // before the no-reply gate so the agent loop generates a response.
4180    let is_acp_channel = target_channel
4181        .as_ref()
4182        .map(|c| {
4183            matches!(
4184                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable::role(c.as_ref()),
4185                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Channel(
4186                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ChannelKind::AcpChannel
4187                )
4188            )
4189        })
4190        .unwrap_or(false);
4191    let reply_intent = if is_acp_channel
4192        && let AssistantChannelOutcome::NoReply {
4193            ref kind,
4194            ref reason,
4195        } = classifier_intent
4196    {
4197        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4198            DEBUG,
4199            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_attrs(
4200                ::serde_json::json!({
4201                    "kind": format!("{kind:?}"),
4202                    "reason": reason.as_deref().unwrap_or(""),
4203                })
4204            ),
4205            "ACP channel: classifier voted no_reply, overriding to reply (ACP must always respond)"
4206        );
4207        AssistantChannelOutcome::Reply(String::new())
4208    } else {
4209        classifier_intent
4210    };
4211
4212    if let AssistantChannelOutcome::NoReply { kind, reason } = reply_intent {
4213        let history_response = AssistantChannelOutcome::NoReply {
4214            kind,
4215            reason: reason.clone(),
4216        }
4217        .history_marker();
4218        append_sender_turn(
4219            ctx.as_ref(),
4220            &history_key,
4221            ChatMessage::assistant(&history_response),
4222        );
4223        // Surface the no-reply decision in chat with an emoji on the user's
4224        // message so the chatter isn't left wondering whether the bot saw
4225        // the message. Same `ack_reactions` gate as the 👀 → ✅/⚠️ ack/done
4226        // pattern so operators with reactions disabled don't suddenly see
4227        // them. Best-effort: log on failure, never propagate. Channels that
4228        // don't implement add_reaction get the trait's no-op default.
4229        if ctx.ack_reactions
4230            && let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref()
4231        {
4232            let emoji = kind.emoji();
4233            if let Err(e) = channel
4234                .add_reaction(&msg.reply_target, &msg.id, emoji)
4235                .await
4236            {
4237                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4238                    DEBUG,
4239                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note),
4240                    &format!(
4241                        "Failed to add {emoji} no-reply reaction on {}: {e}",
4242                        channel.name()
4243                    )
4244                );
4245            }
4246        }
4247        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4248            INFO,
4249            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Skip)
4250                .with_duration(u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),)
4251                .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
4252                    "model_provider": route.model_provider,
4253                    "model": route.model,
4254                    "sender": msg.sender,
4255                    "phase": "precheck",
4256                    "kind": format!("{kind:?}"),
4257                    "reason": reason.as_deref().unwrap_or("no reason provided"),
4258                })),
4259            "channel_message_no_reply"
4260        );
4261        return;
4262    }
4263
4264    let use_draft_streaming = target_channel
4265        .as_ref()
4266        .is_some_and(|ch| ch.supports_draft_updates());
4267
4268    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(DEBUG, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"has_target_channel": target_channel.is_some(), "use_draft_streaming": use_draft_streaming})), "Streaming decision");
4269
4270    // Partial mode: delta channel for draft updates (progress + text).
4271    let (delta_tx, delta_rx) = if use_draft_streaming {
4272        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_runtime::agent::loop_::DraftEvent>(64);
4273        (Some(tx), Some(rx))
4274    } else {
4275        (None, None)
4276    };
4277
4278    // Partial mode: send an initial draft message for progressive editing.
4279    let draft_message_id = if use_draft_streaming {
4280        if let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref() {
4281            match channel
4282                .send_draft(
4283                    &SendMessage::new("...", &msg.reply_target).in_thread(msg.thread_ts.clone()),
4284                )
4285                .await
4286            {
4287                Ok(id) => id,
4288                Err(e) => {
4289                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4290                        DEBUG,
4291                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4292                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4293                        &format!("Failed to send draft on {}", channel.name())
4294                    );
4295                    None
4296                }
4297            }
4298        } else {
4299            None
4300        }
4301    } else {
4302        None
4303    };
4304
4305    // Spawn the appropriate handler for the delta channel.
4306    let draft_updater = if use_draft_streaming {
4307        // Partial: accumulate text and edit a single draft message.
4308        if let (Some(mut rx), Some(draft_id_ref), Some(channel_ref)) = (
4309            delta_rx,
4310            draft_message_id.as_deref(),
4311            target_channel.as_ref(),
4312        ) {
4313            let channel = Arc::clone(channel_ref);
4314            let reply_target = msg.reply_target.clone();
4315            let draft_id = draft_id_ref.to_string();
4316            Some(zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
4317                use zeroclaw_runtime::agent::loop_::StreamDelta;
4318                let mut accumulated = String::new();
4319                while let Some(event) = rx.recv().await {
4320                    match event {
4321                        StreamDelta::Status(text) => {
4322                            let visible = strip_think_tags_inline(&text);
4323                            if let Err(e) = channel
4324                                .update_draft_progress(&reply_target, &draft_id, &visible)
4325                                .await
4326                            {
4327                                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4328                                    DEBUG,
4329                                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
4330                                        module_path!(),
4331                                        ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note
4332                                    )
4333                                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4334                                    "Draft progress update failed"
4335                                );
4336                            }
4337                        }
4338                        StreamDelta::Text(text) => {
4339                            accumulated.push_str(&text);
4340                            let visible = strip_think_tags_inline(&accumulated);
4341                            if let Err(e) = channel
4342                                .update_draft(&reply_target, &draft_id, &visible)
4343                                .await
4344                            {
4345                                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4346                                    DEBUG,
4347                                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
4348                                        module_path!(),
4349                                        ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note
4350                                    )
4351                                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4352                                    "Draft update failed"
4353                                );
4354                            }
4355                        }
4356                    }
4357                }
4358            }))
4359        } else {
4360            None
4361        }
4362    } else {
4363        None
4364    };
4365
4366    // React with 👀 to acknowledge the incoming message
4367    if ctx.ack_reactions
4368        && let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref()
4369        && let Err(e) = channel
4370            .add_reaction(&msg.reply_target, &msg.id, "\u{1F440}")
4371            .await
4372    {
4373        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4374            DEBUG,
4375            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4376                .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4377            "Failed to add reaction"
4378        );
4379    }
4380
4381    // Skip typing only for Partial mode — the draft message itself provides
4382    // visual feedback. MultiMessage and Off both keep typing active.
4383    let is_partial_draft = target_channel
4384        .as_ref()
4385        .is_some_and(|ch| ch.supports_draft_updates() && !ch.supports_multi_message_streaming());
4386    let typing_cancellation = if is_partial_draft {
4387        None
4388    } else {
4389        target_channel.as_ref().map(|_| CancellationToken::new())
4390    };
4391    let typing_task = match (target_channel.as_ref(), typing_cancellation.as_ref()) {
4392        (Some(channel), Some(token)) => Some(spawn_scoped_typing_task(
4393            Arc::clone(channel),
4394            msg.reply_target.clone(),
4395            token.clone(),
4396        )),
4397        _ => None,
4398    };
4399
4400    // Wrap observer to forward tool events as live thread messages
4401    let (notify_tx, mut notify_rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::unbounded_channel::<String>();
4402    let notify_observer: Arc<ChannelNotifyObserver> = Arc::new(ChannelNotifyObserver {
4403        inner: Arc::clone(&ctx.observer),
4404        tx: notify_tx,
4405        tools_used: AtomicBool::new(false),
4406    });
4407    let notify_observer_flag = Arc::clone(&notify_observer);
4408    let notify_channel = target_channel.clone();
4409    let notify_reply_target = msg.reply_target.clone();
4410    let notify_thread_root = followup_thread_id(&msg);
4411    let notify_task = if msg.channel == "cli" || !ctx.show_tool_calls {
4412        Some(zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
4413            while notify_rx.recv().await.is_some() {}
4414        }))
4415    } else {
4416        Some(zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
4417            let thread_ts = notify_thread_root;
4418            while let Some(text) = notify_rx.recv().await {
4419                if let Some(ref ch) = notify_channel {
4420                    let _ = ch
4421                        .send(
4422                            &SendMessage::new(&text, &notify_reply_target)
4423                                .in_thread(thread_ts.clone()),
4424                        )
4425                        .await;
4426                }
4427            }
4428        }))
4429    };
4430
4431    enum LlmExecutionResult {
4432        Completed(Result<Result<String, anyhow::Error>, tokio::time::error::Elapsed>),
4433        Cancelled,
4434    }
4435
4436    let model_switch_callback = get_model_switch_state();
4437    let scale_cap = ctx
4438        .pacing
4439        .message_timeout_scale_max
4440        .unwrap_or(CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SCALE_CAP);
4441    let timeout_budget_secs = channel_message_timeout_budget_secs_with_cap(
4442        ctx.message_timeout_secs,
4443        ctx.max_tool_iterations,
4444        scale_cap,
4445    );
4446    let cost_tracking_context = ctx.cost_tracking.clone().map(|state| {
4447        zeroclaw_runtime::agent::loop_::ToolLoopCostTrackingContext::new(
4448            state.tracker,
4449            state.model_provider_pricing,
4450        )
4451        .with_agent_alias(state.agent_alias.as_str())
4452    });
4453    let llm_call_start = Instant::now();
4454    #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)]
4455    let elapsed_before_llm_ms = started_at.elapsed().as_millis() as u64;
4456    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4457        INFO,
4458        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4459            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"elapsed_before_llm_ms": elapsed_before_llm_ms})),
4460        "starting LLM call"
4461    );
4462    // Per-turn collector. `tool_execution::execute_one_tool` pushes
4463    // `<tool_name>: <receipt>` here whenever a receipt is generated, so the
4464    // orchestrator can render the trailing `Tool receipts:` block after the
4465    // loop returns. Wrapped in `Arc` so the same handle can be shared into
4466    // `TOOL_LOOP_RECEIPT_CONTEXT` for subagent forwarding. Inert when
4467    // `receipt_generator` is `None`.
4468    let tool_receipts_collector: std::sync::Arc<std::sync::Mutex<Vec<String>>> =
4469        std::sync::Arc::new(std::sync::Mutex::new(Vec::new()));
4470    let receipt_scope = ctx.receipt_generator.as_ref().map(|generator| {
4471        zeroclaw_runtime::agent::tool_receipts::ReceiptScope {
4472            generator: generator.clone(),
4473            collector: std::sync::Arc::clone(&tool_receipts_collector),
4474        }
4475    });
4476    let (llm_result, fallback_info) = scope_provider_fallback(async {
4477        let llm_result = loop {
4478            let loop_result = tokio::select! {
4479                () = cancellation_token.cancelled() => LlmExecutionResult::Cancelled,
4480                result = tokio::time::timeout(
4481                    Duration::from_secs(timeout_budget_secs),
4482                    scope_thread_id(
4483                        msg.interruption_scope_id.clone()
4484                            .or_else(|| msg.thread_ts.clone())
4485                            .or_else(|| Some(msg.id.clone())),
4486                    scope_session_key(
4487                        Some(history_key.clone()),
4488                        zeroclaw_runtime::agent::loop_::TOOL_LOOP_COST_TRACKING_CONTEXT.scope(
4489                            cost_tracking_context.clone(),
4490                        zeroclaw_runtime::agent::tool_receipts::TOOL_LOOP_RECEIPT_CONTEXT.scope(
4491                            receipt_scope.clone(),
4492                        run_tool_call_loop(
4493                        active_model_provider.as_ref(),
4494                        &mut history,
4495                        ctx.tools_registry.as_ref(),
4496                        notify_observer.as_ref() as &dyn Observer,
4497                        route.model_provider.as_str(),
4498                        route.model.as_str(),
4499                        runtime_defaults.defaults.temperature,
4500                        true,
4501                        Some(&*ctx.approval_manager),
4502                        msg.channel.as_str(),
4503                        Some(msg.reply_target.as_str()),
4504                        &ctx.multimodal,
4505                        ctx.max_tool_iterations,
4506                        Some(cancellation_token.clone()),
4507                        delta_tx.clone(),
4508                        ctx.hooks.as_deref(),
4509                        if msg.channel == "cli"
4510                            || ctx.autonomy_level == AutonomyLevel::Full
4511                        {
4512                            &[]
4513                        } else {
4514                            ctx.non_cli_excluded_tools.as_ref()
4515                        },
4516                        ctx.tool_call_dedup_exempt.as_ref(),
4517                        ctx.activated_tools.as_ref(),
4518                        Some(model_switch_callback.clone()),
4519                        &ctx.pacing,
4520                        ctx.prompt_config
4521                            .agent(ctx.agent_alias.as_str())
4522                            .is_some_and(|agent| agent.resolved.strict_tool_parsing),
4523                        ctx.prompt_config
4524                            .agent(ctx.agent_alias.as_str())
4525                            .is_some_and(|agent| agent.resolved.parallel_tools),
4526                        ctx.max_tool_result_chars,
4527                        ctx.context_token_budget,
4528                        None, // shared_budget
4529                        target_channel.as_deref(),
4530                        ctx.receipt_generator.as_ref(),
4531                        // Collector is meaningful only when the generator is
4532                        // active. Pass None when receipts are disabled so the
4533                        // call site reflects that coupling explicitly.
4534                        ctx.receipt_generator
4535                            .as_ref()
4536                            .map(|_| tool_receipts_collector.as_ref()),
4537                    ),
4538                    ),
4539                    ),
4540                    ),
4541                    ),
4542                ) => LlmExecutionResult::Completed(result),
4543            };
4544
4545            // Handle model switch: re-create the model_provider and retry
4546            if let LlmExecutionResult::Completed(Ok(Err(ref e))) = loop_result
4547                && let Some((new_model_provider, new_model)) = is_model_switch_requested(e)
4548            {
4549                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4550                    INFO,
4551                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note),
4552                    &format!(
4553                        "Model switch requested, switching from {} {} to {} {}",
4554                        route.model_provider, route.model, new_model_provider, new_model
4555                    )
4556                );
4557
4558                let resolved_model_provider = match resolve_provider_ref_for_runtime_switch(
4559                    runtime_defaults.config.as_ref(),
4560                    &new_model_provider,
4561                ) {
4562                    Ok(provider_ref) => provider_ref,
4563                    Err(err) => {
4564                        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4565                            ERROR,
4566                            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
4567                                module_path!(),
4568                                ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Fail
4569                            )
4570                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
4571                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"err": err.to_string()})),
4572                            "Failed to resolve model_provider after model switch"
4573                        );
4574                        clear_model_switch_request();
4575                        break loop_result;
4576                    }
4577                };
4578
4579                match get_or_create_provider(
4580                    ctx.as_ref(),
4581                    &resolved_model_provider,
4582                    None,
4583                    &runtime_defaults,
4584                )
4585                .await
4586                {
4587                    Ok(new_prov) => {
4588                        active_model_provider = new_prov;
4589                        route.model_provider = resolved_model_provider;
4590                        route.model = new_model;
4591                        clear_model_switch_request();
4592
4593                        ctx.observer.record_event(&ObserverEvent::AgentStart {
4594                            model_provider: route.model_provider.clone(),
4595                            model: route.model.clone(),
4596                            channel: None,
4597                            agent_alias: None,
4598                            turn_id: None,
4599                        });
4600
4601                        continue;
4602                    }
4603                    Err(err) => {
4604                        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4605                            ERROR,
4606                            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
4607                                module_path!(),
4608                                ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Fail
4609                            )
4610                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
4611                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"err": err.to_string()})),
4612                            "Failed to create model_provider after model switch"
4613                        );
4614                        clear_model_switch_request();
4615                        // Fall through with the original error
4616                    }
4617                }
4618            }
4619
4620            break loop_result;
4621        };
4622        let fb = take_last_provider_fallback();
4623        (llm_result, fb)
4624    })
4625    .await;
4626
4627    // Drop all senders so updater tasks can exit (rx.recv() returns None).
4628    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4629        DEBUG,
4630        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note),
4631        "Post-loop: dropping delta_tx and awaiting draft updater"
4632    );
4633    drop(delta_tx);
4634    if let Some(handle) = draft_updater {
4635        let _ = handle.await;
4636    }
4637    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4638        DEBUG,
4639        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note),
4640        "Post-loop: draft updater completed"
4641    );
4642
4643    // Thread the final reply only if tools were used (multi-message response)
4644    if notify_observer_flag.tools_used.load(Ordering::Relaxed) && msg.channel != "cli" {
4645        msg.thread_ts = followup_thread_id(&msg);
4646    }
4647    // Drop the notify sender so the forwarder task finishes
4648    drop(notify_observer);
4649    drop(notify_observer_flag);
4650    if let Some(handle) = notify_task {
4651        let _ = handle.await;
4652    }
4653
4654    #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)]
4655    let llm_call_ms = llm_call_start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64;
4656    #[allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)]
4657    let total_ms = started_at.elapsed().as_millis() as u64;
4658    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4659        INFO,
4660        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4661            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"llm_call_ms": llm_call_ms, "total_ms": total_ms})),
4662        "LLM call completed"
4663    );
4664
4665    if let Some(token) = typing_cancellation.as_ref() {
4666        token.cancel();
4667    }
4668    if let Some(handle) = typing_task {
4669        log_worker_join_result(handle.await);
4670    }
4671
4672    let reaction_done_emoji = match &llm_result {
4673        LlmExecutionResult::Completed(Ok(Ok(_))) => "\u{2705}", // ✅
4674        _ => "\u{26A0}\u{FE0F}",                                // ⚠️
4675    };
4676
4677    match llm_result {
4678        LlmExecutionResult::Cancelled => {
4679            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4680                INFO,
4681                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4682                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"sender": msg.sender})),
4683                "Cancelled in-flight channel request due to newer message"
4684            );
4685            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4686                INFO,
4687                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Cancel)
4688                    .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
4689                    .with_duration(
4690                        u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
4691                    )
4692                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
4693                        "model_provider": route.model_provider,
4694                        "model": route.model,
4695                        "sender": msg.sender,
4696                        "reason": "cancelled due to newer inbound message",
4697                    })),
4698                "channel_message_cancelled"
4699            );
4700            if let (Some(channel), Some(draft_id)) =
4701                (target_channel.as_ref(), draft_message_id.as_deref())
4702                && let Err(err) = channel.cancel_draft(&msg.reply_target, draft_id).await
4703            {
4704                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4705                    DEBUG,
4706                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4707                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", err)})),
4708                    &format!("Failed to cancel draft on {}", channel.name())
4709                );
4710            }
4711        }
4712        LlmExecutionResult::Completed(Ok(Ok(response))) => {
4713            // ── Hook: on_message_sending (modifying) ─────────
4714            let mut outbound_response = response;
4715            if let Some(hooks) = &ctx.hooks {
4716                match hooks
4717                    .run_on_message_sending(
4718                        msg.channel.clone(),
4719                        msg.reply_target.clone(),
4720                        outbound_response.clone(),
4721                    )
4722                    .await
4723                {
4724                    zeroclaw_runtime::hooks::HookResult::Cancel(reason) => {
4725                        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4726                            INFO,
4727                            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
4728                                module_path!(),
4729                                ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note
4730                            )
4731                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"reason": reason.to_string()})),
4732                            "outgoing message suppressed by hook"
4733                        );
4734                        if let (Some(channel), Some(draft_id)) =
4735                            (target_channel.as_ref(), draft_message_id.as_deref())
4736                        {
4737                            let _ = channel.cancel_draft(&msg.reply_target, draft_id).await;
4738                        }
4739                        return;
4740                    }
4741                    zeroclaw_runtime::hooks::HookResult::Continue((
4742                        hook_channel,
4743                        hook_recipient,
4744                        mut modified_content,
4745                    )) => {
4746                        if hook_channel != msg.channel || hook_recipient != msg.reply_target {
4747                            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(WARN, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"from_channel": channel_composite, "from_recipient": msg.reply_target, "to_channel": hook_channel, "to_recipient": hook_recipient})), "on_message_sending attempted to rewrite channel routing; only content mutation is applied");
4748                        }
4749
4750                        let modified_len = modified_content.chars().count();
4751                        if modified_len > CHANNEL_HOOK_MAX_OUTBOUND_CHARS {
4752                            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(WARN, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"limit": CHANNEL_HOOK_MAX_OUTBOUND_CHARS, "attempted": modified_len})), "hook-modified outbound content exceeded limit; truncating");
4753                            modified_content = truncate_with_ellipsis(
4754                                &modified_content,
4755                                CHANNEL_HOOK_MAX_OUTBOUND_CHARS,
4756                            );
4757                        }
4758
4759                        if modified_content != outbound_response {
4760                            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(INFO, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"sender": msg.sender, "before_len": outbound_response.chars().count(), "after_len": modified_content.chars().count()})), "outgoing message content modified by hook");
4761                        }
4762
4763                        outbound_response = modified_content;
4764                    }
4765                }
4766            }
4767
4768            let sanitized_response =
4769                sanitize_channel_response(&outbound_response, ctx.tools_registry.as_ref());
4770            let mut delivered_response = if sanitized_response.is_empty()
4771                && !outbound_response.trim().is_empty()
4772            {
4773                "I encountered malformed tool-call output and could not produce a safe reply. Please try again.".to_string()
4774            } else {
4775                sanitized_response
4776            };
4777            delivered_response = ensure_nonempty_channel_reply(
4778                delivered_response,
4779                &outbound_response,
4780                &msg.channel,
4781                &msg.reply_target,
4782            );
4783
4784            // Append a footer when the response was served by a different model_provider family.
4785            // Intra-family fallbacks (e.g. minimax → minimax-cn) are suppressed.
4786            if let Some(fb) = fallback_info.as_ref() {
4787                let req_base = fb.requested_provider.split(':').next().unwrap_or("");
4788                let act_base = fb.actual_provider.split(':').next().unwrap_or("");
4789                let same_family = req_base == act_base
4790                    || req_base.starts_with(act_base)
4791                    || act_base.starts_with(req_base);
4792                if !same_family {
4793                    use std::fmt::Write as _;
4794                    write!(
4795                        delivered_response,
4796                        "\n\n---\n\u{26A1} `{}` unavailable \u{2014} response from **{}** (`{}`)\nSwitch model: /models",
4797                        fb.requested_provider, fb.actual_provider, fb.actual_model,
4798                    )
4799                    .ok();
4800                }
4801            }
4802
4803            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4804                INFO,
4805                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Outbound)
4806                    .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Success)
4807                    .with_duration(
4808                        u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
4809                    )
4810                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
4811                        "model_provider": route.model_provider,
4812                        "model": route.model,
4813                        "sender": msg.sender,
4814                        "response": scrub_credentials(&delivered_response),
4815                    })),
4816                "channel_message_outbound"
4817            );
4818
4819            // Persist intermediate tool-call/result messages from this turn
4820            // so the model retains concrete "I used tools" examples in
4821            // context, preventing drift toward tool-less responses.
4822            let keep_tool_turns = ctx.agent_cfg.resolved.keep_tool_context_turns;
4823            if keep_tool_turns > 0 {
4824                // Find tool messages for the current turn: everything after
4825                // the last user message up to (but not including) the final
4826                // assistant response that matches our delivered text.
4827                let tool_messages: Vec<ChatMessage> = extract_current_turn_tool_messages(&history);
4828                for tool_msg in tool_messages {
4829                    append_sender_turn(ctx.as_ref(), &history_key, tool_msg);
4830                }
4831            }
4832
4833            let history_response = delivered_response.clone();
4834            append_sender_turn(
4835                ctx.as_ref(),
4836                &history_key,
4837                ChatMessage::assistant(&history_response),
4838            );
4839
4840            // Strip tool-call messages from turns older than
4841            // keep_tool_context_turns to prevent unbounded growth.
4842            if keep_tool_turns > 0 {
4843                strip_old_tool_context(ctx.as_ref(), &history_key, keep_tool_turns);
4844            }
4845
4846            // Fire-and-forget LLM-driven memory consolidation. Passes the
4847            // agent's resolved temperature through unchanged — `None`
4848            // means the provider sends no `temperature` field (necessary
4849            // for models that reject it, e.g. claude-opus-4-7).
4850            if ctx.auto_save_memory && msg.content.chars().count() >= AUTOSAVE_MIN_MESSAGE_CHARS {
4851                let memory_strategy = Arc::clone(&ctx.memory_strategy);
4852                let model_provider = Arc::clone(&ctx.model_provider);
4853                let model = ctx.model.to_string();
4854                let temperature = ctx.temperature;
4855                let user_msg = msg.content.clone();
4856                let assistant_resp = delivered_response.clone();
4857                zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
4858                    if let Err(e) = memory_strategy
4859                        .consolidate_turn(
4860                            &user_msg,
4861                            &assistant_resp,
4862                            model_provider.as_ref(),
4863                            &model,
4864                            temperature,
4865                        )
4866                        .await
4867                    {
4868                        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4869                            DEBUG,
4870                            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
4871                                module_path!(),
4872                                ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note
4873                            )
4874                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4875                            "Memory consolidation skipped"
4876                        );
4877                    }
4878                });
4879            }
4880
4881            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4882                INFO,
4883                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Outbound)
4884                    .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Success)
4885                    .with_duration(
4886                        u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
4887                    )
4888                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
4889                        "sender": msg.sender,
4890                        "message_id": msg.id,
4891                        "reply_target": msg.reply_target,
4892                        "thread_ts": msg.thread_ts,
4893                        "content": delivered_response,
4894                    })),
4895                "reply delivered"
4896            );
4897            // Build the trailing `Tool receipts:` block from the per-turn
4898            // collector. Empty when receipts are disabled or no tool ran.
4899            // Includes receipts from delegate sub-agents because the same
4900            // `Arc<Mutex<Vec<String>>>` is forwarded via
4901            // `TOOL_LOOP_RECEIPT_CONTEXT` into sub-loops.
4902            let receipts_block = if ctx.show_receipts_in_response {
4903                let receipts = tool_receipts_collector
4904                    .lock()
4905                    .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
4906                if receipts.is_empty() {
4907                    None
4908                } else {
4909                    use std::fmt::Write as _;
4910                    let mut block = String::from("---\nTool receipts:");
4911                    for r in receipts.iter() {
4912                        write!(block, "\n  {r}").ok();
4913                    }
4914                    Some(block)
4915                }
4916            } else {
4917                None
4918            };
4919
4920            if let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref() {
4921                if let Some(ref draft_id) = draft_message_id {
4922                    if let Err(e) = channel
4923                        .finalize_draft(&msg.reply_target, draft_id, &delivered_response)
4924                        .await
4925                    {
4926                        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4927                            WARN,
4928                            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
4929                                module_path!(),
4930                                ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note
4931                            )
4932                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown)
4933                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4934                            "Failed to finalize draft; sending as new message"
4935                        );
4936                        let _ = channel
4937                            .send(&SendMessage::reply_to(&msg, &delivered_response))
4938                            .await;
4939                    }
4940                } else if let Err(e) = channel
4941                    .send(
4942                        &SendMessage::reply_to(&msg, &delivered_response)
4943                            .with_cancellation(cancellation_token.clone()),
4944                    )
4945                    .await
4946                {
4947                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4948                        ERROR,
4949                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Fail)
4950                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
4951                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4952                        "failed to reply"
4953                    );
4954                }
4955                // Send tool receipts as a separate message in the same thread.
4956                // The block is the operator-facing audit surface for the feature,
4957                // so a dropped send must leave a log signal rather than silently
4958                // disappear.
4959                if let Some(ref block) = receipts_block
4960                    && let Err(e) = channel
4961                        .send(
4962                            &SendMessage::new(block, &msg.reply_target)
4963                                .in_thread(msg.thread_ts.clone()),
4964                        )
4965                        .await
4966                {
4967                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4968                        WARN,
4969                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4970                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown)
4971                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
4972                        "failed to send tool receipts block"
4973                    );
4974                }
4975            }
4976        }
4977        LlmExecutionResult::Completed(Ok(Err(e))) => {
4978            if zeroclaw_runtime::agent::loop_::is_tool_loop_cancelled(&e)
4979                || cancellation_token.is_cancelled()
4980            {
4981                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4982                    INFO,
4983                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
4984                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"sender": msg.sender})),
4985                    "Cancelled in-flight channel request due to newer message"
4986                );
4987                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
4988                    INFO,
4989                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Cancel)
4990                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
4991                        .with_duration(
4992                            u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
4993                        )
4994                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
4995                            "model_provider": route.model_provider,
4996                            "model": route.model,
4997                            "sender": msg.sender,
4998                            "reason": "cancelled during tool-call loop",
4999                        })),
5000                    "channel_message_cancelled"
5001                );
5002                if let (Some(channel), Some(draft_id)) =
5003                    (target_channel.as_ref(), draft_message_id.as_deref())
5004                    && let Err(err) = channel.cancel_draft(&msg.reply_target, draft_id).await
5005                {
5006                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
5007                        DEBUG,
5008                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
5009                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", err)})),
5010                        &format!("Failed to cancel draft on {}", channel.name())
5011                    );
5012                }
5013            } else if is_context_window_overflow_error(&e) {
5014                let compacted = compact_sender_history(ctx.as_ref(), &history_key);
5015                let error_text = if compacted {
5016                    "⚠️ Context window exceeded for this conversation. I compacted recent history and kept the latest context. Please resend your last message."
5017                } else {
5018                    "⚠️ Context window exceeded for this conversation. Please resend your last message."
5019                };
5020                eprintln!(
5021                    "  ⚠️ Context window exceeded after {}ms; sender history compacted={}",
5022                    started_at.elapsed().as_millis(),
5023                    compacted
5024                );
5025                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
5026                    WARN,
5027                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Fail)
5028                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
5029                        .with_duration(
5030                            u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
5031                        )
5032                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
5033                            "model_provider": route.model_provider,
5034                            "model": route.model,
5035                            "sender": msg.sender,
5036                            "reason": "context window exceeded",
5037                            "history_compacted": compacted,
5038                        })),
5039                    "channel_message_error"
5040                );
5041                if let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref() {
5042                    if let Some(ref draft_id) = draft_message_id {
5043                        let _ = channel
5044                            .finalize_draft(&msg.reply_target, draft_id, error_text)
5045                            .await;
5046                    } else {
5047                        let _ = channel
5048                            .send(
5049                                &SendMessage::new(error_text, &msg.reply_target)
5050                                    .in_thread(msg.thread_ts.clone()),
5051                            )
5052                            .await;
5053                    }
5054                }
5055            } else {
5056                eprintln!(
5057                    "  ❌ LLM error after {}ms: {e}",
5058                    started_at.elapsed().as_millis()
5059                );
5060
5061                // Evict cached model_provider on auth errors so the next request
5062                // re-creates it with fresh OAuth credentials.
5063                if zeroclaw_providers::reliable::is_auth_error(&e) {
5064                    let cache_key = provider_cache_key(
5065                        &route.model_provider,
5066                        route.api_key.as_deref(),
5067                        runtime_defaults.generation,
5068                    );
5069                    let mut cache = ctx.provider_cache.lock().unwrap_or_else(|p| p.into_inner());
5070                    if cache.remove(&cache_key).is_some() {
5071                        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
5072                            INFO,
5073                            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(
5074                                module_path!(),
5075                                ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note
5076                            )
5077                            .with_attrs(
5078                                ::serde_json::json!({"model_provider": route.model_provider})
5079                            ),
5080                            "Evicted cached model_provider after auth error; next request will re-create with fresh credentials"
5081                        );
5082                    }
5083                }
5084                let safe_error = zeroclaw_providers::sanitize_api_error(&e.to_string());
5085                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
5086                    WARN,
5087                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Fail)
5088                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
5089                        .with_duration(
5090                            u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
5091                        )
5092                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
5093                            "model_provider": route.model_provider,
5094                            "model": route.model,
5095                            "sender": msg.sender,
5096                            "error": safe_error,
5097                        })),
5098                    "channel_message_error"
5099                );
5100                let should_rollback_user_turn = should_rollback_failed_user_turn(&e);
5101                let rolled_back = should_rollback_user_turn
5102                    && rollback_orphan_user_turn(
5103                        ctx.as_ref(),
5104                        &history_key,
5105                        &timestamped_history_content,
5106                    );
5107
5108                if !rolled_back {
5109                    // Close the orphan user turn so subsequent messages don't
5110                    // inherit this failed request as unfinished context.
5111                    append_sender_turn(
5112                        ctx.as_ref(),
5113                        &history_key,
5114                        ChatMessage::assistant("[Task failed — not continuing this request]"),
5115                    );
5116                }
5117                if let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref() {
5118                    if let Some(ref draft_id) = draft_message_id {
5119                        let _ = channel
5120                            .finalize_draft(&msg.reply_target, draft_id, &format!("⚠️ Error: {e}"))
5121                            .await;
5122                    } else {
5123                        let _ = channel
5124                            .send(
5125                                &SendMessage::new(format!("⚠️ Error: {e}"), &msg.reply_target)
5126                                    .in_thread(msg.thread_ts.clone()),
5127                            )
5128                            .await;
5129                    }
5130                }
5131            }
5132        }
5133        LlmExecutionResult::Completed(Err(_)) => {
5134            let timeout_msg = format!(
5135                "LLM response timed out after {}s (base={}s, max_tool_iterations={})",
5136                timeout_budget_secs, ctx.message_timeout_secs, ctx.max_tool_iterations
5137            );
5138            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
5139                WARN,
5140                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Timeout)
5141                    .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
5142                    .with_duration(
5143                        u64::try_from(started_at.elapsed().as_millis()).unwrap_or(u64::MAX),
5144                    )
5145                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({
5146                        "model_provider": route.model_provider,
5147                        "model": route.model,
5148                        "sender": msg.sender,
5149                        "reason": timeout_msg,
5150                    })),
5151                "channel_message_timeout"
5152            );
5153            eprintln!(
5154                "  ❌ {} (elapsed: {}ms)",
5155                timeout_msg,
5156                started_at.elapsed().as_millis()
5157            );
5158            // Close the orphan user turn so subsequent messages don't
5159            // inherit this timed-out request as unfinished context.
5160            append_sender_turn(
5161                ctx.as_ref(),
5162                &history_key,
5163                ChatMessage::assistant("[Task timed out — not continuing this request]"),
5164            );
5165            if let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref() {
5166                let error_text =
5167                    "⚠️ Request timed out while waiting for the model. Please try again.";
5168                if let Some(ref draft_id) = draft_message_id {
5169                    let _ = channel
5170                        .finalize_draft(&msg.reply_target, draft_id, error_text)
5171                        .await;
5172                } else {
5173                    let _ = channel
5174                        .send(
5175                            &SendMessage::new(error_text, &msg.reply_target)
5176                                .in_thread(msg.thread_ts.clone()),
5177                        )
5178                        .await;
5179                }
5180            }
5181        }
5182    }
5183
5184    // Swap 👀 → ✅ (or ⚠️ on error) to signal processing is complete
5185    if ctx.ack_reactions
5186        && let Some(channel) = target_channel.as_ref()
5187    {
5188        let _ = channel
5189            .remove_reaction(&msg.reply_target, &msg.id, "\u{1F440}")
5190            .await;
5191        let _ = channel
5192            .add_reaction(&msg.reply_target, &msg.id, reaction_done_emoji)
5193            .await;
5194    }
5195}
5196
5197/// Shared worker body extracted so both the normal path and the debounce path
5198/// can reuse the same in-flight tracking / cancellation / process logic.
5199async fn dispatch_worker(
5200    ctx: Arc<ChannelRuntimeContext>,
5201    msg: zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage,
5202    in_flight: Arc<tokio::sync::Mutex<HashMap<String, InFlightSenderTaskState>>>,
5203    task_sequence: Arc<AtomicU64>,
5204    permit: tokio::sync::OwnedSemaphorePermit,
5205) {
5206    let _permit = permit;
5207    let interrupt_enabled = ctx
5208        .interrupt_on_new_message
5209        .enabled_for_channel(msg.channel.as_str());
5210    let sender_scope_key = interruption_scope_key(&msg);
5211    let cancellation_token = CancellationToken::new();
5212    let completion = Arc::new(InFlightTaskCompletion::new());
5213    let task_id = task_sequence.fetch_add(1, Ordering::Relaxed);
5214
5215    let register_in_flight = msg.channel != "cli";
5216
5217    if register_in_flight {
5218        let previous = {
5219            let mut active = in_flight.lock().await;
5220            active.insert(
5221                sender_scope_key.clone(),
5222                InFlightSenderTaskState {
5223                    task_id,
5224                    cancellation: cancellation_token.clone(),
5225                    completion: Arc::clone(&completion),
5226                },
5227            )
5228        };
5229
5230        if interrupt_enabled && let Some(previous) = previous {
5231            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
5232                INFO,
5233                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
5234                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"sender": msg.sender})),
5235                "interrupting previous in-flight request for sender"
5236            );
5237            previous.cancellation.cancel();
5238            previous.completion.wait().await;
5239        }
5240    }
5241
5242    process_channel_message(ctx, msg, cancellation_token).await;
5243
5244    if register_in_flight {
5245        let mut active = in_flight.lock().await;
5246        if active
5247            .get(&sender_scope_key)
5248            .is_some_and(|state| state.task_id == task_id)
5249        {
5250            active.remove(&sender_scope_key);
5251        }
5252    }
5253
5254    completion.mark_done();
5255}
5256
5257/// Maps each inbound `ChannelMessage` to the owning agent's `ChannelRuntimeContext`.
5258///
5259/// Lookup mirrors `find_channel_for_message`: composite `<type>.<alias>` first,
5260/// bare `<type>` second. Returns `None` when no agent owns the channel — the
5261/// dispatch loop drops the message rather than picking a default.
5262#[derive(Clone)]
5263struct AgentRouter {
5264    by_agent: Arc<HashMap<String, Arc<ChannelRuntimeContext>>>,
5265    owner_by_channel_key: Arc<HashMap<String, String>>,
5266    single_ctx: Option<Arc<ChannelRuntimeContext>>,
5267}
5268
5269impl AgentRouter {
5270    #[cfg(test)]
5271    fn single(ctx: Arc<ChannelRuntimeContext>) -> Self {
5272        Self {
5273            by_agent: Arc::new(HashMap::new()),
5274            owner_by_channel_key: Arc::new(HashMap::new()),
5275            single_ctx: Some(ctx),
5276        }
5277    }
5278
5279    fn multi(
5280        by_agent: HashMap<String, Arc<ChannelRuntimeContext>>,
5281        owner_by_channel_key: HashMap<String, String>,
5282    ) -> Self {
5283        Self {
5284            by_agent: Arc::new(by_agent),
5285            owner_by_channel_key: Arc::new(owner_by_channel_key),
5286            single_ctx: None,
5287        }
5288    }
5289
5290    fn resolve(
5291        &self,
5292        msg: &zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage,
5293    ) -> Option<Arc<ChannelRuntimeContext>> {
5294        if let Some(ctx) = &self.single_ctx {
5295            return Some(Arc::clone(ctx));
5296        }
5297        if let Some(alias) = msg.channel_alias.as_deref().filter(|s| !s.is_empty()) {
5298            let composite = format!("{}.{alias}", msg.channel);
5299            if let Some(agent) = self.owner_by_channel_key.get(&composite)
5300                && let Some(ctx) = self.by_agent.get(agent)
5301            {
5302                return Some(Arc::clone(ctx));
5303            }
5304        }
5305        if let Some(agent) = self.owner_by_channel_key.get(&msg.channel)
5306            && let Some(ctx) = self.by_agent.get(agent)
5307        {
5308            return Some(Arc::clone(ctx));
5309        }
5310        None
5311    }
5312}
5313
5314async fn run_message_dispatch_loop(
5315    mut rx: tokio::sync::mpsc::Receiver<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>,
5316    router: AgentRouter,
5317    max_in_flight_messages: usize,
5318) {
5319    let semaphore = Arc::new(tokio::sync::Semaphore::new(max_in_flight_messages));
5320    let mut workers = tokio::task::JoinSet::new();
5321    let in_flight_by_sender = Arc::new(tokio::sync::Mutex::new(HashMap::<
5322        String,
5323        InFlightSenderTaskState,
5324    >::new()));
5325    let task_sequence = Arc::new(AtomicU64::new(1));
5326
5327    while let Some(msg) = rx.recv().await {
5328        let Some(ctx) = router.resolve(&msg) else {
5329            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(WARN, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"channel_alias": msg.channel_alias, "sender": msg.sender})), "dropping inbound message: no agent owns this channel");
5330            continue;
5331        };
5332        // Fast path: /stop cancels the in-flight task for this sender scope without
5333        // spawning a worker or registering a new task. Handled here — before semaphore
5334        // acquisition — so the target task is still in the store and is never replaced.
5335        if msg.channel != "cli" && is_stop_command(&msg.content) {
5336            let scope_key = interruption_scope_key(&msg);
5337            let previous = {
5338                let mut active = in_flight_by_sender.lock().await;
5339                active.remove(&scope_key)
5340            };
5341            let reply = if let Some(state) = previous {
5342                state.cancellation.cancel();
5343                "Stop signal sent.".to_string()
5344            } else {
5345                "No in-flight task for this sender scope.".to_string()
5346            };
5347            let channel = find_channel_for_message(&ctx.channels_by_name, &msg).cloned();
5348            if let Some(channel) = channel {
5349                let reply_target = msg.reply_target.clone();
5350                let thread_ts = msg.thread_ts.clone();
5351                zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
5352                    let _ = channel
5353                        .send(&SendMessage::new(reply, &reply_target).in_thread(thread_ts))
5354                        .await;
5355                });
5356            } else {
5357                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
5358                    WARN,
5359                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
5360                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
5361                    "stop command: no registered channel found for reply"
5362                );
5363            }
5364            continue;
5365        }
5366
5367        // ── Debounce: accumulate rapid messages per sender ──────────
5368        // CLI messages bypass debouncing so the interactive loop stays responsive.
5369        let msg = if msg.channel != "cli" && ctx.debouncer.enabled() {
5370            let debounce_key = conversation_history_key(&msg);
5371            match ctx.debouncer.debounce(&debounce_key, &msg.content).await {
5372                zeroclaw_infra::debounce::DebounceResult::Pending(rx) => {
5373                    // Spawn a lightweight task that waits for the debounce window
5374                    // to expire, then feeds the combined message through the normal
5375                    // worker path below.
5376                    let debounce_ctx = Arc::clone(&ctx);
5377                    let debounce_in_flight = Arc::clone(&in_flight_by_sender);
5378                    let debounce_semaphore = Arc::clone(&semaphore);
5379                    let debounce_task_seq = Arc::clone(&task_sequence);
5380                    let mut debounce_msg = msg;
5381                    workers.spawn(async move {
5382                        let combined = match rx.await {
5383                            Ok(combined) => combined,
5384                            Err(_) => {
5385                                // Receiver dropped — a newer message superseded this one.
5386                                return;
5387                            }
5388                        };
5389                        debounce_msg.content = combined;
5390                        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(INFO, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"channel": debounce_msg.channel, "sender": debounce_msg.sender})), "Debounced message ready — dispatching combined message");
5391
5392                        let permit = match debounce_semaphore.acquire_owned().await {
5393                            Ok(permit) => permit,
5394                            Err(_) => return,
5395                        };
5396
5397                        dispatch_worker(
5398                            debounce_ctx,
5399                            debounce_msg,
5400                            debounce_in_flight,
5401                            debounce_task_seq,
5402                            permit,
5403                        )
5404                        .await;
5405                    });
5406                    continue;
5407                }
5408                zeroclaw_infra::debounce::DebounceResult::Passthrough(content) => {
5409                    let mut m = msg;
5410                    m.content = content;
5411                    m
5412                }
5413            }
5414        } else {
5415            msg
5416        };
5417
5418        let permit = match Arc::clone(&semaphore).acquire_owned().await {
5419            Ok(permit) => permit,
5420            Err(_) => break,
5421        };
5422
5423        let worker_ctx = Arc::clone(&ctx);
5424        let in_flight = Arc::clone(&in_flight_by_sender);
5425        let task_sequence = Arc::clone(&task_sequence);
5426        workers.spawn(async move {
5427            dispatch_worker(worker_ctx, msg, in_flight, task_sequence, permit).await;
5428        });
5429
5430        while let Some(result) = workers.try_join_next() {
5431            log_worker_join_result(result);
5432        }
5433    }
5434
5435    while let Some(result) = workers.join_next().await {
5436        log_worker_join_result(result);
5437    }
5438}
5439
5440fn normalize_telegram_identity(value: &str) -> String {
5441    value.trim().trim_start_matches('@').to_string()
5442}
5443
5444pub async fn bind_telegram_identity(config: &Config, identity: &str) -> Result<()> {
5445    use zeroclaw_config::multi_agent::{PeerGroupConfig, PeerUsername};
5446
5447    let normalized = normalize_telegram_identity(identity);
5448    if normalized.is_empty() {
5449        anyhow::bail!("Telegram identity cannot be empty");
5450    }
5451
5452    let mut updated = config.clone();
5453    if !updated.channels.telegram.contains_key("default") {
5454        anyhow::bail!(
5455            "Telegram channel is not configured. Run \
5456             `zeroclaw config set channels.telegram.<alias>.bot-token=<token>` \
5457             (see docs/book/src/channels/overview.md for the full field list)."
5458        );
5459    }
5460
5461    // Locate (or create) the peer group bound to telegram.default. The
5462    // V3 surface puts inbound peer authorization in `peer_groups`,
5463    // not on the channel block. Convention: the synthesized group
5464    // name is `<type>_<alias>` (matching what the V2→V3 fold uses)
5465    // so a hand-bound identity lands in the same group an operator
5466    // would inspect after an upgrade. The `channel` field is the
5467    // dotted alias ref so authorization stays scoped to the bound
5468    // alias; a bare type would broaden the peer across every
5469    // telegram alias on the install.
5470    let group_name = "telegram_default".to_string();
5471    let group = updated
5472        .peer_groups
5473        .entry(group_name.clone())
5474        .or_insert_with(|| PeerGroupConfig {
5475            channel: "telegram.default".to_string(),
5476            ..PeerGroupConfig::default()
5477        });
5478
5479    if group
5480        .external_peers
5481        .iter()
5482        .any(|p| normalize_telegram_identity(p.as_str()) == normalized)
5483    {
5484        println!("✅ Telegram identity already bound: {normalized}");
5485        return Ok(());
5486    }
5487
5488    group
5489        .external_peers
5490        .push(PeerUsername::new(normalized.clone()));
5491    updated.save().await?;
5492    println!("✅ Bound Telegram identity: {normalized}");
5493    println!("   Saved to {}", updated.config_path.display());
5494    match maybe_restart_managed_daemon_service() {
5495        Ok(true) => {
5496            println!("🔄 Detected running managed daemon service; reloaded automatically.");
5497        }
5498        Ok(false) => {
5499            println!(
5500                "ℹ️ No managed daemon service detected. If `zeroclaw daemon`/`channel start` is already running, restart it to load the updated allowlist."
5501            );
5502        }
5503        Err(e) => {
5504            eprintln!(
5505                "⚠️ Allowlist saved, but failed to reload daemon service automatically: {e}\n\
5506                 Restart service manually with `zeroclaw service stop && zeroclaw service start`."
5507            );
5508        }
5509    }
5510    Ok(())
5511}
5512
5513fn maybe_restart_managed_daemon_service() -> Result<bool> {
5514    if cfg!(target_os = "macos") {
5515        let home = directories::UserDirs::new()
5516            .map(|u| u.home_dir().to_path_buf())
5517            .context("Could not find home directory")?;
5518        let plist = home
5519            .join("Library")
5520            .join("LaunchAgents")
5521            .join("com.zeroclaw.daemon.plist");
5522        if !plist.exists() {
5523            return Ok(false);
5524        }
5525
5526        let list_output = Command::new("launchctl")
5527            .arg("list")
5528            .output()
5529            .context("Failed to query launchctl list")?;
5530        let listed = String::from_utf8_lossy(&list_output.stdout);
5531        if !listed.contains("com.zeroclaw.daemon") {
5532            return Ok(false);
5533        }
5534
5535        let _ = Command::new("launchctl")
5536            .args(["stop", "com.zeroclaw.daemon"])
5537            .output();
5538        let start_output = Command::new("launchctl")
5539            .args(["start", "com.zeroclaw.daemon"])
5540            .output()
5541            .context("Failed to start launchd daemon service")?;
5542        if !start_output.status.success() {
5543            let stderr = String::from_utf8_lossy(&start_output.stderr);
5544            anyhow::bail!("launchctl start failed: {}", stderr.trim());
5545        }
5546
5547        return Ok(true);
5548    }
5549
5550    if cfg!(target_os = "linux") {
5551        // OpenRC (system-wide) takes precedence over systemd (user-level)
5552        let openrc_init_script = PathBuf::from("/etc/init.d/zeroclaw");
5553        if openrc_init_script.exists()
5554            && let Ok(status_output) = Command::new("rc-service").args(OPENRC_STATUS_ARGS).output()
5555        {
5556            // rc-service exits 0 if running, non-zero otherwise
5557            if status_output.status.success() {
5558                let restart_output = Command::new("rc-service")
5559                    .args(OPENRC_RESTART_ARGS)
5560                    .output()
5561                    .context("Failed to restart OpenRC daemon service")?;
5562                if !restart_output.status.success() {
5563                    let stderr = String::from_utf8_lossy(&restart_output.stderr);
5564                    anyhow::bail!("rc-service restart failed: {}", stderr.trim());
5565                }
5566                return Ok(true);
5567            }
5568        }
5569
5570        // Systemd (user-level)
5571        let home = directories::UserDirs::new()
5572            .map(|u| u.home_dir().to_path_buf())
5573            .context("Could not find home directory")?;
5574        let unit_path: PathBuf = home
5575            .join(".config")
5576            .join("systemd")
5577            .join("user")
5578            .join("zeroclaw.service");
5579        if !unit_path.exists() {
5580            return Ok(false);
5581        }
5582
5583        let active_output = Command::new("systemctl")
5584            .args(SYSTEMD_STATUS_ARGS)
5585            .output()
5586            .context("Failed to query systemd service state")?;
5587        let state = String::from_utf8_lossy(&active_output.stdout);
5588        if !state.trim().eq_ignore_ascii_case("active") {
5589            return Ok(false);
5590        }
5591
5592        let restart_output = Command::new("systemctl")
5593            .args(SYSTEMD_RESTART_ARGS)
5594            .output()
5595            .context("Failed to restart systemd daemon service")?;
5596        if !restart_output.status.success() {
5597            let stderr = String::from_utf8_lossy(&restart_output.stderr);
5598            anyhow::bail!("systemctl restart failed: {}", stderr.trim());
5599        }
5600
5601        return Ok(true);
5602    }
5603
5604    Ok(false)
5605}
5606
5607/// Build a single channel instance by config section name (e.g. "telegram").
5608fn build_channel_by_id(
5609    config_arc: &Arc<RwLock<Config>>,
5610    channel_id: &str,
5611) -> Result<Arc<dyn Channel>> {
5612    #[allow(unused_variables)]
5613    let config = config_arc.read();
5614    match channel_id {
5615        #[cfg(feature = "channel-telegram")]
5616        "telegram" => {
5617            let tg = config
5618                .channels
5619                .telegram
5620                .get("default")
5621                .context("Telegram channel is not configured")?;
5622            let ack = tg.ack_reactions.unwrap_or(config.channels.ack_reactions);
5623            let alias = "default".to_string();
5624            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5625                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5626                let alias = alias.clone();
5627                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("telegram", &alias))
5628            };
5629            Ok(Arc::new(
5630                TelegramChannel::new(
5631                    tg.bot_token.clone(),
5632                    alias.clone(),
5633                    peer_resolver,
5634                    tg.mention_only,
5635                )
5636                .with_persistence(config_arc.clone())
5637                .with_ack_reactions(ack)
5638                .with_streaming(tg.stream_mode, tg.draft_update_interval_ms)
5639                .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
5640                .with_tts(&config)
5641                .with_voice_peer_prefs(&config, "telegram", alias)
5642                .with_workspace_dir(config.data_dir.clone())
5643                .with_approval_timeout_secs(tg.approval_timeout_secs),
5644            ))
5645        }
5646        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-telegram"))]
5647        "telegram" => {
5648            anyhow::bail!("Telegram channel requires the `channel-telegram` feature");
5649        }
5650        #[cfg(feature = "channel-discord")]
5651        "discord" => {
5652            let dc = config
5653                .channels
5654                .discord
5655                .get("default")
5656                .context("Discord channel is not configured")?;
5657            let alias = "default".to_string();
5658            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5659                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5660                let alias = alias.clone();
5661                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("discord", &alias))
5662            };
5663            Ok(Arc::new(
5664                DiscordChannel::new(
5665                    dc.bot_token.clone(),
5666                    dc.guild_ids.clone(),
5667                    alias,
5668                    peer_resolver,
5669                    dc.listen_to_bots,
5670                    dc.mention_only,
5671                )
5672                .with_channel_ids(dc.channel_ids.clone())
5673                .with_workspace_dir(config.data_dir.clone())
5674                .with_streaming(
5675                    dc.stream_mode,
5676                    dc.draft_update_interval_ms,
5677                    dc.multi_message_delay_ms,
5678                )
5679                .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
5680                .with_stall_timeout(dc.stall_timeout_secs)
5681                .with_approval_timeout_secs(dc.approval_timeout_secs),
5682            ))
