5683        }
5684        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-discord"))]
5685        "discord" => {
5686            anyhow::bail!("Discord channel requires the `channel-discord` feature");
5687        }
5688        #[cfg(feature = "channel-slack")]
5689        "slack" => {
5690            let sl = config
5691                .channels
5692                .slack
5693                .get("default")
5694                .context("Slack channel is not configured")?;
5695            let alias = "default".to_string();
5696            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5697                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5698                let alias = alias.clone();
5699                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("slack", &alias))
5700            };
5701            Ok(Arc::new(
5702                SlackChannel::new(
5703                    sl.bot_token.clone(),
5704                    sl.app_token.clone(),
5705                    sl.channel_ids.clone(),
5706                    alias,
5707                    peer_resolver,
5708                )
5709                .with_workspace_dir(config.data_dir.clone())
5710                .with_markdown_blocks(sl.use_markdown_blocks)
5711                .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
5712                .with_streaming(sl.stream_drafts, sl.draft_update_interval_ms)
5713                .with_cancel_reaction(sl.cancel_reaction.clone())
5714                .with_approval_timeout_secs(sl.approval_timeout_secs),
5715            ))
5716        }
5717        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-slack"))]
5718        "slack" => {
5719            anyhow::bail!("Slack channel requires the `channel-slack` feature");
5720        }
5721        #[cfg(feature = "channel-mattermost")]
5722        "mattermost" => {
5723            let mm = config
5724                .channels
5725                .mattermost
5726                .get("default")
5727                .context("Mattermost channel is not configured")?;
5728            let alias = "default".to_string();
5729            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5730                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5731                let alias = alias.clone();
5732                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("mattermost", &alias))
5733            };
5734            Ok(Arc::new(
5735                MattermostChannel::new(
5736                    mm.url.clone(),
5737                    mm.bot_token.clone(),
5738                    mm.login_id.clone(),
5739                    mm.password.clone(),
5740                    mm.channel_ids.clone(),
5741                    alias,
5742                    peer_resolver,
5743                    mm.thread_replies.unwrap_or(true),
5744                    mm.mention_only.unwrap_or(false),
5745                )
5746                .with_team_ids(mm.team_ids.clone())
5747                .with_discover_dms(mm.discover_dms.unwrap_or(true)),
5748            ))
5749        }
5750        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-mattermost"))]
5751        "mattermost" => {
5752            anyhow::bail!("Mattermost channel requires the `channel-mattermost` feature");
5753        }
5754        #[cfg(feature = "channel-signal")]
5755        "signal" => {
5756            let sg = config
5757                .channels
5758                .signal
5759                .get("default")
5760                .context("Signal channel is not configured")?;
5761            let alias = "default".to_string();
5762            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5763                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5764                let alias = alias.clone();
5765                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("signal", &alias))
5766            };
5767            Ok(Arc::new(
5768                SignalChannel::new(
5769                    sg.http_url.clone(),
5770                    sg.account.clone(),
5771                    sg.group_ids.clone(),
5772                    sg.dm_only,
5773                    alias,
5774                    peer_resolver,
5775                    sg.ignore_attachments,
5776                    sg.ignore_stories,
5777                )
5778                .with_approval_timeout_secs(sg.approval_timeout_secs),
5779            ))
5780        }
5781        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-signal"))]
5782        "signal" => {
5783            anyhow::bail!("Signal channel requires the `channel-signal` feature");
5784        }
5785        "matrix" => {
5786            #[cfg(feature = "channel-matrix")]
5787            {
5788                let mx = config
5789                    .channels
5790                    .matrix
5791                    .get("default")
5792                    .context("Matrix channel is not configured")?;
5793                let alias = "default".to_string();
5794                let state_dir = matrix_state_dir(&config.config_path, &alias);
5795                let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5796                    let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5797                    let alias = alias.clone();
5798                    Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("matrix", &alias))
5799                };
5800                let ack = mx.ack_reactions.unwrap_or(config.channels.ack_reactions);
5801                Ok(Arc::new(
5802                    MatrixChannel::new(mx.clone(), alias, peer_resolver, state_dir)?
5803                        .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
5804                        .with_workspace_dir(config.data_dir.clone())
5805                        .with_ack_reactions(ack),
5806                ))
5807            }
5808            #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-matrix"))]
5809            {
5810                anyhow::bail!("Matrix channel requires the `channel-matrix` feature");
5811            }
5812        }
5813        "whatsapp" | "whatsapp-web" | "whatsapp_web" => {
5814            #[cfg(feature = "whatsapp-web")]
5815            {
5816                let wa = config
5817                    .channels
5818                    .whatsapp
5819                    .get("default")
5820                    .context("WhatsApp channel is not configured")?;
5821                if !wa.is_web_config() {
5822                    anyhow::bail!(
5823                        "WhatsApp channel send requires Web mode (session_path must be set)"
5824                    );
5825                }
5826                let alias = "default".to_string();
5827                let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5828                    let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5829                    let alias = alias.clone();
5830                    Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("whatsapp", &alias))
5831                };
5832                Ok(Arc::new(WhatsAppWebChannel::new(wa, alias, peer_resolver)))
5833            }
5834            #[cfg(not(feature = "whatsapp-web"))]
5835            {
5836                anyhow::bail!("WhatsApp channel requires the `whatsapp-web` feature");
5837            }
5838        }
5839        #[cfg(feature = "channel-qq")]
5840        "qq" => {
5841            let qq = config
5842                .channels
5843                .qq
5844                .get("default")
5845                .context("QQ channel is not configured")?;
5846            let alias = "default".to_string();
5847            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5848                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5849                let alias = alias.clone();
5850                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("qq", &alias))
5851            };
5852            Ok(Arc::new(QQChannel::new(
5853                qq.app_id.clone(),
5854                qq.app_secret.clone(),
5855                alias,
5856                peer_resolver,
5857            )))
5858        }
5859        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-qq"))]
5860        "qq" => {
5861            anyhow::bail!("QQ channel requires the `channel-qq` feature");
5862        }
5863        "lark" => {
5864            #[cfg(feature = "channel-lark")]
5865            {
5866                let lk = config
5867                    .channels
5868                    .lark
5869                    .get("default")
5870                    .context("Lark channel is not configured")?;
5871                let alias = "default".to_string();
5872                let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5873                    let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5874                    let alias = alias.clone();
5875                    Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("lark", &alias))
5876                };
5877                Ok(Arc::new(
5878                    LarkChannel::from_config(lk, alias, peer_resolver)
5879                        .with_approval_timeout_secs(lk.approval_timeout_secs)
5880                        .with_per_user_session(lk.per_user_session)
5881                        .with_streaming(lk.stream_mode, lk.draft_update_interval_ms),
5882                ))
5883            }
5884            #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-lark"))]
5885            {
5886                anyhow::bail!("Lark channel requires the `channel-lark` feature");
5887            }
5888        }
5889        #[cfg(feature = "channel-dingtalk")]
5890        "dingtalk" => {
5891            let dt = config
5892                .channels
5893                .dingtalk
5894                .get("default")
5895                .context("DingTalk channel is not configured")?;
5896            let alias = "default".to_string();
5897            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5898                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5899                let alias = alias.clone();
5900                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("dingtalk", &alias))
5901            };
5902            Ok(Arc::new(
5903                DingTalkChannel::new(
5904                    dt.client_id.clone(),
5905                    dt.client_secret.clone(),
5906                    alias,
5907                    peer_resolver,
5908                )
5909                .with_proxy_url(dt.proxy_url.clone()),
5910            ))
5911        }
5912        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-dingtalk"))]
5913        "dingtalk" => {
5914            anyhow::bail!("DingTalk channel requires the `channel-dingtalk` feature");
5915        }
5916        #[cfg(feature = "channel-wecom")]
5917        "wecom" => {
5918            let wc = config
5919                .channels
5920                .wecom
5921                .get("default")
5922                .context("WeCom channel is not configured")?;
5923            let alias = "default".to_string();
5924            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5925                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5926                let alias = alias.clone();
5927                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("wecom", &alias))
5928            };
5929            Ok(Arc::new(WeComChannel::new(
5930                wc.webhook_key.clone(),
5931                alias,
5932                peer_resolver,
5933            )))
5934        }
5935        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-wecom"))]
5936        "wecom" => {
5937            anyhow::bail!("WeCom channel requires the `channel-wecom` feature");
5938        }
5939        #[cfg(feature = "channel-wecom-ws")]
5940        channel_id
5941            if channel_id == "wecom_ws"
5942                || channel_id == "wecom-ws"
5943                || channel_id.starts_with("wecom_ws.")
5944                || channel_id.starts_with("wecom-ws.") =>
5945        {
5946            let alias = channel_id
5947                .split_once('.')
5948                .map(|(_, alias)| alias)
5949                .unwrap_or("default")
5950                .to_string();
5951            let wc =
5952                config.channels.wecom_ws.get(&alias).with_context(|| {
5953                    format!("WeCom WebSocket channel '{alias}' is not configured")
5954                })?;
5955            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
5956                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
5957                let alias = alias.clone();
5958                let configured_allowed_users = wc.allowed_users.clone();
5959                Arc::new(move || {
5960                    let config = cfg_arc.read();
5961                    let mut peers = configured_allowed_users.clone();
5962                    for peer in config.channel_external_peers("wecom-ws", &alias) {
5963                        if !peers.contains(&peer) {
5964                            peers.push(peer);
5965                        }
5966                    }
5967                    for peer in config.channel_external_peers("wecom_ws", &alias) {
5968                        if !peers.contains(&peer) {
5969                            peers.push(peer);
5970                        }
5971                    }
5972                    peers
5973                })
5974            };
5975            Ok(Arc::new(WeComWsChannel::new_with_alias(
5976                wc,
5977                alias.clone(),
5978                peer_resolver,
5979                &config.channel_workspace_dir(&format!("wecom_ws.{alias}")),
5980            )?))
5981        }
5982        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-wecom-ws"))]
5983        channel_id
5984            if channel_id == "wecom_ws"
5985                || channel_id == "wecom-ws"
5986                || channel_id.starts_with("wecom_ws.")
5987                || channel_id.starts_with("wecom-ws.") =>
5988        {
5989            anyhow::bail!("WeCom WebSocket channel requires the `channel-wecom-ws` feature");
5990        }
5991        #[cfg(feature = "channel-wechat")]
5992        "wechat" => {
5993            let wc = config
5994                .channels
5995                .wechat
5996                .get("default")
5997                .context("WeChat channel is not configured")?;
5998            let alias = "default".to_string();
5999            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6000                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6001                let alias = alias.clone();
6002                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("wechat", &alias))
6003            };
6004            Ok(Arc::new(
6005                WeChatChannel::new(
6006                    alias,
6007                    peer_resolver,
6008                    wc.api_base_url.clone(),
6009                    wc.cdn_base_url.clone(),
6010                    wc.state_dir.as_ref().map(|s| expand_tilde_in_path(s)),
6011                )?
6012                .with_persistence(config_arc.clone())
6013                .with_workspace_dir(config.data_dir.clone()),
6014            ))
6015        }
6016        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-wechat"))]
6017        "wechat" => {
6018            anyhow::bail!("WeChat channel requires the `channel-wechat` feature");
6019        }
6020        #[cfg(feature = "channel-nextcloud")]
6021        "nextcloud_talk" | "nextcloud-talk" => {
6022            let nc = config
6023                .channels
6024                .nextcloud_talk
6025                .get("default")
6026                .context("Nextcloud Talk channel is not configured")?;
6027            let alias = "default".to_string();
6028            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6029                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6030                let alias = alias.clone();
6031                Arc::new(move || {
6032                    cfg_arc
6033                        .read()
6034                        .channel_external_peers("nextcloud_talk", &alias)
6035                })
6036            };
6037            Ok(Arc::new(
6038                NextcloudTalkChannel::new_with_proxy(
6039                    nc.base_url.clone(),
6040                    nc.app_token.clone(),
6041                    nc.bot_name.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
6042                    alias,
6043                    peer_resolver,
6044                    nc.proxy_url.clone(),
6045                )
6046                .with_streaming(nc.stream_mode, nc.draft_update_interval_ms),
6047            ))
6048        }
6049        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-nextcloud"))]
6050        "nextcloud_talk" | "nextcloud-talk" => {
6051            anyhow::bail!("Nextcloud Talk channel requires the `channel-nextcloud` feature");
6052        }
6053        #[cfg(feature = "channel-wati")]
6054        "wati" => {
6055            let wati_cfg = config
6056                .channels
6057                .wati
6058                .get("default")
6059                .context("WATI channel is not configured")?;

6061            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {

6063                let alias = alias.clone();
6064                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("wati", &alias))
6065            };
6066            Ok(Arc::new(WatiChannel::new_with_proxy(
6067                wati_cfg.api_token.clone(),
6068                wati_cfg.api_url.clone(),
6069                wati_cfg.tenant_id.clone(),
6070                alias,
6071                peer_resolver,
6072                wati_cfg.proxy_url.clone(),
6073            )))
6074        }
6075        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-wati"))]
6076        "wati" => {
6077            anyhow::bail!("WATI channel requires the `channel-wati` feature");
6078        }
6079        #[cfg(feature = "channel-linq")]
6080        "linq" => {
6081            let lq = config
6082                .channels
6083                .linq
6084                .get("default")
6085                .context("Linq channel is not configured")?;
6086            let alias = "default".to_string();
6087            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6088                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();

6091            };
6092            Ok(Arc::new(LinqChannel::new(
6093                lq.api_token.clone(),
6094                lq.from_phone.clone(),
6095                alias,
6096                peer_resolver,

6099        #[cfg(feature = "channel-linq")]
6100        x if x.starts_with("linq.") => {
6101            let alias = x.strip_prefix("linq.").context("invalid linq channel id")?;
6102            let lq = config
6103                .channels
6104                .linq

6108                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();

6110                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("linq", &alias))
6111            };
6112            Ok(Arc::new(LinqChannel::new(
6113                lq.api_token.clone(),
6114                lq.from_phone.clone(),
6115                alias.to_string(),
6116                peer_resolver,
6117            )))
6118        }
6119        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-linq"))]
6120        x if x.starts_with("linq") => {
6121            anyhow::bail!("Linq channel requires the `channel-linq` feature");
6122        }
6123        #[cfg(feature = "channel-email")]
6124        "email" => {

6126                .channels

6129                .context("Email channel is not configured")?;

6136            Ok(Arc::new(EmailChannel::new(
6137                em.clone(),
6138                alias,

6140            )))
6141        }
6142        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-email"))]
6143        "email" => {
6144            anyhow::bail!("Email channel requires the `channel-email` feature");
6145        }
6146        #[cfg(feature = "channel-email")]
6147        "gmail_push" | "gmail-push" => {
6148            let gp = config
6149                .channels
6150                .gmail_push
6151                .get("default")
6152                .context("Gmail Push channel is not configured")?;
6153            let alias = "default".to_string();
6154            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6155                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6156                let alias = alias.clone();
6157                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("gmail_push", &alias))
6158            };
6159            Ok(Arc::new(GmailPushChannel::new(

6161                alias,

6165        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-email"))]
6166        "gmail_push" | "gmail-push" => {
6167            anyhow::bail!("Gmail Push channel requires the `channel-email` feature");
6168        }
6169        #[cfg(feature = "channel-irc")]
6170        "irc" => {
6171            let irc_cfg = config
6172                .channels
6173                .irc
6174                .get("default")
6175                .context("IRC channel is not configured")?;
6176            let alias = "default".to_string();
6177            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6178                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6179                let alias = alias.clone();
6180                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("irc", &alias))
6181            };
6182            Ok(Arc::new(IrcChannel::new(crate::irc::IrcChannelConfig {
6183                server: irc_cfg.server.clone(),
6184                port: irc_cfg.port,
6185                nickname: irc_cfg.nickname.clone(),
6186                username: irc_cfg.username.clone(),
6187                channels: irc_cfg.channels.clone(),
6188                alias,
6189                peer_resolver,
6190                server_password: irc_cfg.server_password.clone(),
6191                nickserv_password: irc_cfg.nickserv_password.clone(),
6192                sasl_password: irc_cfg.sasl_password.clone(),
6193                verify_tls: irc_cfg.verify_tls.unwrap_or(true),
6194                mention_only: irc_cfg.mention_only,
6195            })))
6196        }
6197        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-irc"))]
6198        "irc" => {
6199            anyhow::bail!("IRC channel requires the `channel-irc` feature");
6200        }

6206                .get("default")

6213            };
6214            Ok(Arc::new(TwitchChannel::new(

6216                tw_cfg.oauth_token.clone(),
6217                tw_cfg.channels.clone(),
6218                tw_cfg.mention_only,
6219                alias,
6220                peer_resolver,
6221            )))
6222        }
6223        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-twitch"))]
6224        "twitch" => {
6225            anyhow::bail!("Twitch channel requires the `channel-twitch` feature");
6226        }
6227        #[cfg(feature = "channel-twitter")]
6228        "twitter" => {
6229            let tw = config
6230                .channels
6231                .twitter
6232                .get("default")
6233                .context("X/Twitter channel is not configured")?;
6234            let alias = "default".to_string();
6235            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6236                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6237                let alias = alias.clone();
6238                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("twitter", &alias))
6239            };
6240            Ok(Arc::new(TwitterChannel::new(
6241                tw.bearer_token.clone(),
6242                alias,
6243                peer_resolver,
6244            )))
6245        }
6246        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-twitter"))]
6247        "twitter" => {
6248            anyhow::bail!("X/Twitter channel requires the `channel-twitter` feature");
6249        }
6250        #[cfg(feature = "channel-mochat")]
6251        "mochat" => {
6252            let mc = config
6253                .channels
6254                .mochat
6255                .get("default")
6256                .context("Mochat channel is not configured")?;
6257            let alias = "default".to_string();
6258            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6259                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6260                let alias = alias.clone();
6261                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("mochat", &alias))
6262            };
6263            Ok(Arc::new(MochatChannel::new(
6264                mc.api_url.clone(),
6265                mc.api_token.clone(),
6266                alias,
6267                peer_resolver,
6268                mc.poll_interval_secs,
6269            )))
6270        }
6271        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-mochat"))]
6272        "mochat" => {
6273            anyhow::bail!("Mochat channel requires the `channel-mochat` feature");
6274        }
6275        #[cfg(feature = "channel-imessage")]
6276        "imessage" => {
6277            if !config.channels.imessage.contains_key("default") {
6278                anyhow::bail!("iMessage channel is not configured");
6279            }
6280            let alias = "default".to_string();
6281            let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6282                let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6283                let alias = alias.clone();
6284                Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("imessage", &alias))
6285            };
6286            Ok(Arc::new(IMessageChannel::new(alias, peer_resolver)))
6287        }
6288        #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-imessage"))]
6289        "imessage" => {
6290            anyhow::bail!("iMessage channel requires the `channel-imessage` feature");
6291        }
6292        "line" => {
6293            #[cfg(feature = "channel-line")]
6294            {
6295                let ln = config
6296                    .channels
6297                    .line
6298                    .get("default")
6299                    .context("LINE channel is not configured")?;
6300                let alias = "default".to_string();
6301                let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6302                    let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6303                    let alias = alias.clone();
6304                    Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("line", &alias))
6305                };
6306                Ok(Arc::new(
6307                    LineChannel::from_config(ln, alias, peer_resolver)
6308                        .with_persistence(config_arc.clone()),
6309                ))
6310            }
6311            #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-line"))]
6312            {
6313                anyhow::bail!("LINE channel requires the `channel-line` feature");
6314            }
6315        }
6316        "voice-call" => {
6317            #[cfg(feature = "channel-voice-call")]
6318            {
6319                let (alias, vc) = config
6320                    .channels
6321                    .voice_call
6322                    .iter()
6323                    .next()
6324                    .context("Voice Call channel is not configured")?;
6325                Ok(Arc::new(VoiceCallChannel::new(alias.clone(), vc.clone())))
6326            }
6327            #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-voice-call"))]
6328            {
6329                anyhow::bail!("Voice Call channel requires the `channel-voice-call` feature");
6330            }
6331        }
6332        other => anyhow::bail!(
6333            "Unknown channel '{other}'. Supported: telegram, discord, slack, mattermost, signal, \
6334            matrix, whatsapp, qq, lark, feishu, dingtalk, wecom, wecom_ws, nextcloud_talk, wati, linq, \
6335            email, gmail_push, irc, twitter, mochat, imessage, line, voice-call"
6336        ),
6337    }
6338}
6339
6340/// Send a one-off message to a configured channel.
6341pub async fn send_channel_message(
6342    config: &Config,
6343    channel_id: &str,
6344    recipient: &str,
6345    message: &str,
6346) -> Result<()> {
6347    // Wrap into the canonical shared handle for the builder; this is a
6348    // one-shot path so the snapshot is dropped immediately after send.
6349    let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config.clone()));
6350    let channel = build_channel_by_id(&config_arc, channel_id)?;
6351    let msg = SendMessage::new(message, recipient);
6352    channel
6353        .send(&msg)
6354        .await
6355        .with_context(|| format!("Failed to send message via {channel_id}"))?;
6356    println!("Message sent via {channel_id}.");
6357    Ok(())
6358}
6359
6360#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
6361enum ChannelHealthState {
6362    Healthy,
6363    Unhealthy,
6364    Timeout,
6365}
6366
6367fn classify_health_result(
6368    result: &std::result::Result<bool, tokio::time::error::Elapsed>,
6369) -> ChannelHealthState {
6370    match result {
6371        Ok(true) => ChannelHealthState::Healthy,
6372        Ok(false) => ChannelHealthState::Unhealthy,
6373        Err(_) => ChannelHealthState::Timeout,
6374    }
6375}
6376
6377struct ConfiguredChannel {
6378    display_name: &'static str,
6379    /// ZeroClaw channel alias (the `<alias>` half of `[channels.<type>.<alias>]`).
6380    /// `Some` for every aliased channel built in `collect_configured_channels`;
6381    /// `None` for singleton channels with no alias concept (e.g. Notion).
6382    /// Used by `composite_channel_key` to give each `(type, alias)` pair a
6383    /// distinct slot in the runtime `channels_by_name` registry so two bots
6384    /// on the same platform (e.g. `discord.clamps` + `discord.glados`) don't
6385    /// collide and silently overwrite each other.
6386    alias: Option<String>,
6387    channel: Arc<dyn Channel>,
6388}
6389
6390/// Compose the registry key for a channel given its `name()` and configured alias.
6391/// Aliased channels live at `<name>.<alias>`; un-aliased singletons keep the bare name.
6392pub(crate) fn composite_channel_key(name: &str, alias: Option<&str>) -> String {
6393    match alias.filter(|s| !s.is_empty()) {
6394        Some(alias) => format!("{name}.{alias}"),
6395        None => name.to_string(),
6396    }
6397}
6398
6399/// Look up the live channel handle that should send a reply to `msg`.
6400///
6401/// Resolution order:
6402/// 1. Composite key `<channel>.<channel_alias>` — fires for multi-alias platforms
6403///    (Discord/Telegram/Slack/etc. with multiple `[channels.<type>.<alias>]` blocks).
6404/// 2. Bare `msg.channel` — singleton channels and legacy callers that didn't
6405///    supply an alias.
6406/// 3. `<base>:<qualifier>` split (e.g. Matrix `matrix:!roomId`) falls back to
6407///    the base channel name.
6408fn find_channel_for_message<'a>(
6409    channels: &'a HashMap<String, Arc<dyn Channel>>,
6410    msg: &zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage,
6411) -> Option<&'a Arc<dyn Channel>> {
6412    if let Some(alias) = msg.channel_alias.as_deref().filter(|s| !s.is_empty()) {
6413        let composite = format!("{}.{alias}", msg.channel);
6414        if let Some(ch) = channels.get(&composite) {
6415            return Some(ch);
6416        }
6417    }
6418    if let Some(ch) = channels.get(&msg.channel) {
6419        return Some(ch);
6420    }
6421    msg.channel
6422        .split_once(':')
6423        .and_then(|(base, _)| channels.get(base))
6424}
6425
6426/// Active `<type>.<alias>` channel references from enabled agents.
6427///
6428/// An empty set means no enabled agent declared channel bindings, so
6429/// collection falls back to legacy behavior and accepts all enabled channels.
6430struct ActiveChannelAliases {
6431    /// Set of `<type>.<alias>` channel references from enabled agents.
6432    aliases: HashSet<String>,
6433}
6434
6435impl ActiveChannelAliases {
6436    /// Returns true when `channel_ref` is explicitly bound, or when there are
6437    /// no explicit bindings and legacy "accept all enabled channels" mode applies.
6438    fn contains(&self, channel_ref: &str) -> bool {
6439        self.aliases.is_empty() || self.aliases.contains(channel_ref)
6440    }
6441}
6442
6443/// Build `channel_key → Arc<dyn Channel>` map from config.
6444///
6445/// Constructs channel instances without starting listen loops.
6446/// Called by CLI and other callers that need a channel map
6447/// for late-bound tool handle population.
6448pub fn build_channel_map(
6449    config: &Config,
6450) -> HashMap<String, Arc<dyn zeroclaw_api::channel::Channel>> {
6451    let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config.clone()));
6452    collect_configured_channels(&config_arc, "", &[])
6453        .into_iter()
6454        .map(|ch| {
6455            let key = composite_channel_key(ch.channel.name(), ch.alias.as_deref());
6456            (key, ch.channel)
6457        })
6458        .collect()
6459}
6460
6461/// Build configured channels and register them into late-bound tool handles.
6462///
6463/// Constructs channel instances from config (without starting listen loops)
6464/// and inserts each into the provided handles under their composite key
6465/// (`<channel>.<alias>` or bare `<channel>` for singletons).
6466///
6467/// Returns the list of registered channel names for logging.
6468pub fn register_channels_for_tools(
6469    config: &Config,
6470    ask_user_handle: &Option<tools::PerToolChannelHandle>,
6471    reaction_handle: &Option<tools::PerToolChannelHandle>,
6472    poll_handle: &Option<tools::PerToolChannelHandle>,
6473    escalate_handle: &Option<tools::PerToolChannelHandle>,
6474) -> Vec<String> {
6475    let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config.clone()));
6476    let configured = collect_configured_channels(&config_arc, "", &[]);
6477
6478    let handles = [
6479        ask_user_handle.as_ref(),
6480        reaction_handle.as_ref(),
6481        poll_handle.as_ref(),
6482        escalate_handle.as_ref(),
6483    ];
6484
6485    let mut names = Vec::new();
6486    for ch in &configured {
6487        let key = composite_channel_key(ch.channel.name(), ch.alias.as_deref());
6488        for handle in handles.iter().flatten() {
6489            handle.write().insert(key.clone(), Arc::clone(&ch.channel));
6490        }
6491        names.push(key);
6492    }
6493    names
6494}
6495
6496/// Per-alias Matrix state directory. Each `[channels.matrix.<alias>]` block
6497/// must own its own session/crypto store so two bots under one daemon don't
6498/// restore each other's `session.json` and run as the wrong account. The
6499/// alias component is what keeps them distinct.
6500#[cfg(feature = "channel-matrix")]
6501fn matrix_state_dir(config_path: &std::path::Path, alias: &str) -> std::path::PathBuf {
6502    config_path
6503        .parent()
6504        .map(|p| p.join("state").join("matrix").join(alias))
6505        .unwrap_or_else(|| std::path::PathBuf::from(".zeroclaw/state/matrix").join(alias))
6506}
6507
6508fn collect_configured_channels(
6509    config_arc: &Arc<RwLock<Config>>,
6510    matrix_skip_context: &str,
6511    tool_specs: &[(String, String)],
6512) -> Vec<ConfiguredChannel> {
6513    let _ = matrix_skip_context;
6514    let _ = tool_specs;
6515    #[allow(unused_mut)]
6516    let mut channels = Vec::new();
6517
6518    // Shadow `config` with a read guard so the existing body keeps
6519    // working via `Deref<Target = Config>`. Resolver closures that
6520    // outlive the function capture `config_arc.clone()`.
6521    let config = config_arc.read();
6522
6523    let active_channel_aliases = ActiveChannelAliases {
6524        aliases: config
6525            .agents
6526            .values()
6527            .filter(|a| a.enabled)
6528            .flat_map(|a| a.channels.iter().map(|c| c.as_str().to_string()))
6529            .collect(),
6530    };
6531
6532    #[cfg(feature = "channel-telegram")]
6533    for (alias, tg) in &config.channels.telegram {
6534        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("telegram.{alias}")) {
6535            continue;
6536        }
6537        if !tg.enabled {
6538            continue;
6539        }
6540        let ack = tg.ack_reactions.unwrap_or(config.channels.ack_reactions);
6541        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6542            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6543            let alias = alias.clone();
6544            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("telegram", &alias))
6545        };
6546        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6547            display_name: "Telegram",
6548            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6549            channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(
6550                Arc::new(
6551                    TelegramChannel::new(
6552                        tg.bot_token.clone(),
6553                        alias.clone(),
6554                        peer_resolver,
6555                        tg.mention_only,
6556                    )
6557                    .with_persistence(config_arc.clone())
6558                    .with_ack_reactions(ack)
6559                    .with_streaming(tg.stream_mode, tg.draft_update_interval_ms)
6560                    .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
6561                    .with_tts(&config)
6562                    .with_voice_peer_prefs(&config, "telegram", alias)
6563                    .with_workspace_dir(config.channel_workspace_dir(&format!("telegram.{alias}")))
6564                    .with_proxy_url(tg.proxy_url.clone())
6565                    .with_tool_command_specs(tool_specs.to_vec())
6566                    .with_approval_timeout_secs(tg.approval_timeout_secs),
6567                ),
6568                tg,
6569            ),
6570        });
6571    }
6572
6573    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-telegram"))]
6574    if !config.channels.telegram.is_empty() {
6575        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6576            WARN,
6577            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6578                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6579            "Telegram channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
6580             `channel-telegram`; skipping Telegram."
6581        );
6582    }
6583
6584    #[cfg(feature = "channel-discord")]
6585    for (alias, dc) in &config.channels.discord {
6586        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("discord.{alias}")) {
6587            continue;
6588        }
6589        if !dc.enabled {
6590            continue;
6591        }
6592        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6593            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6594            let alias = alias.clone();
6595            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("discord", &alias))
6596        };
6597        let mut discord_ch = DiscordChannel::new(
6598            dc.bot_token.clone(),
6599            dc.guild_ids.clone(),
6600            alias.clone(),
6601            peer_resolver,
6602            dc.listen_to_bots,
6603            dc.mention_only,
6604        )
6605        .with_channel_ids(dc.channel_ids.clone())
6606        .with_workspace_dir(config.channel_workspace_dir(&format!("discord.{alias}")))
6607        .with_streaming(
6608            dc.stream_mode,
6609            dc.draft_update_interval_ms,
6610            dc.multi_message_delay_ms,
6611        )
6612        .with_proxy_url(dc.proxy_url.clone())
6613        .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
6614        .with_stall_timeout(dc.stall_timeout_secs)
6615        .with_approval_timeout_secs(dc.approval_timeout_secs);
6616        if dc.archive {
6617            match zeroclaw_memory::SqliteMemory::new_named("sqlite", &config.data_dir, "discord") {
6618                Ok(mem) => {
6619                    discord_ch = discord_ch.with_archive_memory(std::sync::Arc::new(mem));
6620                }
6621                Err(e) => {
6622                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6623                        WARN,
6624                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6625                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown)
6626                            .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
6627                        "discord: archive enabled but failed to open discord.db"
6628                    );
6629                }
6630            }
6631        }
6632        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6633            display_name: "Discord",
6634            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6635            channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(Arc::new(discord_ch), dc),
6636        });
6637    }
6638
6639    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-discord"))]
6640    if !config.channels.discord.is_empty() {
6641        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6642            WARN,
6643            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6644                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6645            "Discord channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
6646             `channel-discord`; skipping Discord."
6647        );
6648    }
6649
6650    #[cfg(feature = "channel-slack")]
6651    for (alias, sl) in &config.channels.slack {
6652        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("slack.{alias}")) {
6653            continue;
6654        }
6655        if !sl.enabled {
6656            continue;
6657        }
6658        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6659            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6660            let alias = alias.clone();
6661            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("slack", &alias))
6662        };
6663        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6664            display_name: "Slack",
6665            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6666            channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(
6667                Arc::new(
6668                    SlackChannel::new(
6669                        sl.bot_token.clone(),
6670                        sl.app_token.clone(),
6671                        sl.channel_ids.clone(),
6672                        alias.clone(),
6673                        peer_resolver,
6674                    )
6675                    .with_thread_replies(sl.thread_replies.unwrap_or(true))
6676                    .with_group_reply_policy(sl.mention_only, Vec::new())
6677                    .with_strict_mention_in_thread(sl.strict_mention_in_thread)
6678                    .with_workspace_dir(config.channel_workspace_dir(&format!("slack.{alias}")))
6679                    .with_markdown_blocks(sl.use_markdown_blocks)
6680                    .with_proxy_url(sl.proxy_url.clone())
6681                    .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
6682                    .with_streaming(sl.stream_drafts, sl.draft_update_interval_ms)
6683                    .with_cancel_reaction(sl.cancel_reaction.clone())
6684                    .with_approval_timeout_secs(sl.approval_timeout_secs),
6685                ),
6686                sl,
6687            ),
6688        });
6689    }
6690
6691    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-slack"))]
6692    if !config.channels.slack.is_empty() {
6693        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6694            WARN,
6695            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6696                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6697            "Slack channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
6698             `channel-slack`; skipping Slack."
6699        );
6700    }
6701
6702    #[cfg(feature = "channel-mattermost")]
6703    for (alias, mm) in &config.channels.mattermost {
6704        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("mattermost.{alias}")) {
6705            continue;
6706        }
6707        if !mm.enabled {
6708            continue;
6709        }
6710        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6711            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6712            let alias = alias.clone();
6713            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("mattermost", &alias))
6714        };
6715        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6716            display_name: "Mattermost",
6717            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6718            channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(
6719                Arc::new(
6720                    MattermostChannel::new(
6721                        mm.url.clone(),
6722                        mm.bot_token.clone(),
6723                        mm.login_id.clone(),
6724                        mm.password.clone(),
6725                        mm.channel_ids.clone(),
6726                        alias.clone(),
6727                        peer_resolver,
6728                        mm.thread_replies.unwrap_or(true),
6729                        mm.mention_only.unwrap_or(false),
6730                    )
6731                    .with_team_ids(mm.team_ids.clone())
6732                    .with_discover_dms(mm.discover_dms.unwrap_or(true))
6733                    .with_proxy_url(mm.proxy_url.clone())
6734                    .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone()),
6735                ),
6736                mm,
6737            ),
6738        });
6739    }
6740
6741    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-mattermost"))]
6742    if !config.channels.mattermost.is_empty() {
6743        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6744            WARN,
6745            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6746                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6747            "Mattermost channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
6748             `channel-mattermost`; skipping Mattermost."
6749        );
6750    }
6751
6752    #[cfg(feature = "channel-imessage")]
6753    for (alias, im) in &config.channels.imessage {
6754        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("imessage.{alias}")) {
6755            continue;
6756        }
6757        if !im.enabled {
6758            continue;
6759        }
6760        let _ = im;
6761        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6762            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6763            let alias = alias.clone();
6764            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("imessage", &alias))
6765        };
6766        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6767            display_name: "iMessage",
6768            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6769            channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(
6770                Arc::new(IMessageChannel::new(alias.clone(), peer_resolver)),
6771                im,
6772            ),
6773        });
6774    }
6775
6776    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-imessage"))]
6777    if !config.channels.imessage.is_empty() {
6778        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6779            WARN,
6780            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6781                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6782            "iMessage channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
6783             `channel-imessage`; skipping iMessage."
6784        );
6785    }
6786
6787    #[cfg(feature = "channel-matrix")]
6788    for (alias, mx) in &config.channels.matrix {
6789        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("matrix.{alias}")) {
6790            continue;
6791        }
6792        if !mx.enabled {
6793            continue;
6794        }
6795        let state_dir = matrix_state_dir(&config.config_path, alias);
6796        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6797            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6798            let alias = alias.clone();
6799            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("matrix", &alias))
6800        };
6801        let ack = mx.ack_reactions.unwrap_or(config.channels.ack_reactions);
6802        match MatrixChannel::new(mx.clone(), alias.clone(), peer_resolver, state_dir) {
6803            Ok(channel) => {
6804                let channel = channel
6805                    .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
6806                    .with_workspace_dir(config.channel_workspace_dir(&format!("matrix.{alias}")))
6807                    .with_ack_reactions(ack);
6808                channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6809                    display_name: "Matrix",
6810                    alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6811                    channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(Arc::new(channel), mx),
6812                });
6813            }
6814            Err(e) => {
6815                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6816                    ERROR,
6817                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Fail)
6818                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Failure)
6819                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{}", e)})),
6820                    "Matrix channel construction failed"
6821                );
6822            }
6823        }
6824    }
6825
6826    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-matrix"))]
6827    if !config.channels.matrix.is_empty() {
6828        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6829            WARN,
6830            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6831                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6832            &format!(
6833                "Matrix channel is configured but this build was compiled without `channel-matrix`; skipping Matrix {}.",
6834                matrix_skip_context
6835            )
6836        );
6837    }
6838
6839    #[cfg(feature = "channel-signal")]
6840    for (alias, sig) in &config.channels.signal {
6841        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("signal.{alias}")) {
6842            continue;
6843        }
6844        if !sig.enabled {
6845            continue;
6846        }
6847        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6848            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6849            let alias = alias.clone();
6850            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("signal", &alias))
6851        };
6852        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6853            display_name: "Signal",
6854            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6855            channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(
6856                Arc::new(
6857                    SignalChannel::new(
6858                        sig.http_url.clone(),
6859                        sig.account.clone(),
6860                        sig.group_ids.clone(),
6861                        sig.dm_only,
6862                        alias.clone(),
6863                        peer_resolver,
6864                        sig.ignore_attachments,
6865                        sig.ignore_stories,
6866                    )
6867                    .with_proxy_url(sig.proxy_url.clone())
6868                    .with_approval_timeout_secs(sig.approval_timeout_secs),
6869                ),
6870                sig,
6871            ),
6872        });
6873    }
6874
6875    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-signal"))]
6876    if !config.channels.signal.is_empty() {
6877        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6878            WARN,
6879            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6880                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6881            "Signal channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
6882             `channel-signal`; skipping Signal."
6883        );
6884    }
6885
6886    #[cfg(any(feature = "channel-whatsapp-cloud", feature = "whatsapp-web"))]
6887    for (alias, wa) in &config.channels.whatsapp {
6888        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("whatsapp.{alias}")) {
6889            continue;
6890        }
6891        if !wa.enabled {
6892            continue;
6893        }
6894        if wa.is_ambiguous_config() {
6895            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6896                WARN,
6897                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6898                    .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6899                "WhatsApp config has both phone_number_id and session_path set; preferring Cloud API mode. Remove one selector to avoid ambiguity."
6900            );
6901        }
6902        // Runtime negotiation: detect backend type from config
6903        match wa.backend_type() {
6904            #[cfg(feature = "channel-whatsapp-cloud")]
6905            "cloud" => {
6906                // Cloud API mode: requires phone_number_id, access_token, verify_token
6907                if wa.is_cloud_config() {
6908                    let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6909                        let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6910                        let alias = alias.clone();
6911                        Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("whatsapp", &alias))
6912                    };
6913                    channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6914                        display_name: "WhatsApp",
6915                        alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6916                        channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(
6917                            Arc::new(
6918                                WhatsAppChannel::new(
6919                                    wa.access_token.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
6920                                    wa.phone_number_id.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
6921                                    wa.verify_token.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
6922                                    alias.clone(),
6923                                    peer_resolver,
6924                                )
6925                                .with_proxy_url(wa.proxy_url.clone())
6926                                .with_dm_mention_patterns(wa.dm_mention_patterns.clone())
6927                                .with_group_mention_patterns(wa.group_mention_patterns.clone())
6928                                .with_approval_timeout_secs(wa.approval_timeout_secs),
6929                            ),
6930                            wa,
6931                        ),
6932                    });
6933                } else {
6934                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6935                        WARN,
6936                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6937                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6938                        "WhatsApp Cloud API configured but missing required fields (phone_number_id, access_token, verify_token)"
6939                    );
6940                }
6941                #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-whatsapp-cloud"))]
6942                {
6943                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6944                        WARN,
6945                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6946                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6947                        "WhatsApp Cloud API backend requires 'channel-whatsapp-cloud' feature. Build/run with --features channel-whatsapp-cloud"
6948                    );
6949                }
6950            }
6951            #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-whatsapp-cloud"))]
6952            "cloud" => {
6953                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6954                    WARN,
6955                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6956                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6957                    "WhatsApp Cloud API is configured but this build was compiled without `channel-whatsapp-cloud`; skipping WhatsApp Cloud."
6958                );
6959            }
6960            "web" => {
6961                // Web mode: requires session_path
6962                #[cfg(feature = "whatsapp-web")]
6963                if wa.is_web_config() {
6964                    let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
6965                        let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
6966                        let alias = alias.clone();
6967                        Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("whatsapp", &alias))
6968                    };
6969                    channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
6970                        display_name: "WhatsApp",
6971                        alias: Some(alias.clone()),
6972                        channel: crate::paced_channel::PacedChannel::wrap(
6973                            Arc::new(
6974                                WhatsAppWebChannel::new(wa, alias.clone(), peer_resolver)
6975                                    .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone())
6976                                    .with_tts(&config)
6977                                    .with_dm_mention_patterns(wa.dm_mention_patterns.clone())
6978                                    .with_group_mention_patterns(wa.group_mention_patterns.clone()),
6979                            ),
6980                            wa,
6981                        ),
6982                    });
6983                } else {
6984                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6985                        WARN,
6986                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6987                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6988                        "WhatsApp Web configured but session_path not set"
6989                    );
6990                }
6991                #[cfg(not(feature = "whatsapp-web"))]
6992                {
6993                    ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
6994                        WARN,
6995                        ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
6996                            .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
6997                        "WhatsApp Web backend requires 'whatsapp-web' feature. Enable with: cargo build --features whatsapp-web"
6998                    );
6999                    eprintln!(
7000                        "  ⚠ WhatsApp Web is configured but the 'whatsapp-web' feature is not compiled in."
7001                    );
7002                    eprintln!("    Rebuild with: cargo build --features whatsapp-web");
7003                }
7004            }
7005            _ => {
7006                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7007                    WARN,
7008                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7009                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7010                    "WhatsApp config invalid: neither phone_number_id (Cloud API) nor session_path (Web) is set"
7011                );
7012            }
7013        }
7014    }
7015
7016    #[cfg(feature = "channel-linq")]
7017    for (alias, lq) in &config.channels.linq {
7018        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("linq.{alias}")) {
7019            continue;
7020        }
7021        if !lq.enabled {
7022            continue;
7023        }
7024        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
7025            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
7026            let alias = alias.clone();
7027            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("linq", &alias))
7028        };
7029        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7030            display_name: "Linq",
7031            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7032            channel: Arc::new(LinqChannel::new(
7033                lq.api_token.clone(),
7034                lq.from_phone.clone(),
7035                alias.clone(),
7036                peer_resolver,
7037            )),
7038        });
7039    }
7040
7041    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-linq"))]
7042    if !config.channels.linq.is_empty() {
7043        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7044            WARN,
7045            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7046                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7047            "Linq channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7048             `channel-linq`; skipping Linq."
7049        );
7050    }

7054        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("wati.{alias}")) {
7055            continue;
7056        }
7057        if !wati_cfg.enabled {
7058            continue;
7059        }
7060        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
7061            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
7062            let alias = alias.clone();
7063            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("wati", &alias))
7064        };
7065        let wati_channel = WatiChannel::new_with_proxy(
7066            wati_cfg.api_token.clone(),
7067            wati_cfg.api_url.clone(),
7068            wati_cfg.tenant_id.clone(),
7069            alias.clone(),
7070            peer_resolver,
7071            wati_cfg.proxy_url.clone(),
7072        )
7073        .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone());
7074        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7075            display_name: "WATI",
7076            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7077            channel: Arc::new(wati_channel),
7078        });
7079    }

7084            WARN,

7086                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7087            "WATI channel is configured but this build was compiled without \

7104                cfg_arc

7210                server: irc.server.clone(),

7212                nickname: irc.nickname.clone(),
7213                username: irc.username.clone(),
7214                channels: irc.channels.clone(),
7215                alias: alias.clone(),
7216                peer_resolver,
7217                server_password: irc.server_password.clone(),
7218                nickserv_password: irc.nickserv_password.clone(),
7219                sasl_password: irc.sasl_password.clone(),
7220                verify_tls: irc.verify_tls.unwrap_or(true),
7221                mention_only: irc.mention_only,
7222            })),
7223        });
7224    }

7254                amqp_url: amqp.amqp_url.clone(),
7255                exchange: amqp.exchange.clone(),
7256                routing_keys: amqp.routing_keys.clone(),

7259                client_cert: amqp.client_cert.clone(),
7260                client_key: amqp.client_key.clone(),
7261                sender_label: amqp.sender_label.clone(),
7262                content_template: amqp.content_template.clone(),
7263                thread_id_field: amqp.thread_id_field.clone(),
7264                durable_ack: amqp.durable_ack,
7265                alias: alias.clone(),
7266                peer_resolver,
7267            })),
7268        });

7320    #[cfg(feature = "channel-lark")]
7321    for (alias, lk) in &config.channels.lark {
7322        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("lark.{alias}")) {
7323            continue;
7324        }
7325        if !lk.enabled {
7326            continue;
7327        }
7328        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
7329            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
7330            let alias = alias.clone();
7331            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("lark", &alias))
7332        };
7333        let display_name = if lk.use_feishu { "Feishu" } else { "Lark" };
7334        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7335            display_name,
7336            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7337            channel: Arc::new(
7338                LarkChannel::from_config(lk, alias.clone(), peer_resolver)
7339                    .with_approval_timeout_secs(lk.approval_timeout_secs)
7340                    .with_per_user_session(lk.per_user_session)
7341                    .with_streaming(lk.stream_mode, lk.draft_update_interval_ms)
7342                    .with_transcription(config.transcription.clone()),
7343            ),
7344        });
7345    }
7346

7354        );
7355    }

7509            continue;
7510        }
7511        if !mc.enabled {
7512            continue;
7513        }
7514        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
7515            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
7516            let alias = alias.clone();
7517            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("mochat", &alias))
7518        };
7519        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7520            display_name: "Mochat",
7521            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7522            channel: Arc::new(MochatChannel::new(
7523                mc.api_url.clone(),
7524                mc.api_token.clone(),
7525                alias.clone(),
7526                peer_resolver,
7527                mc.poll_interval_secs,
7528            )),
7529        });
7530    }
7531
7532    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-mochat"))]
7533    if !config.channels.mochat.is_empty() {
7534        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7535            WARN,
7536            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7537                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7538            "Mochat channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7539             `channel-mochat`; skipping Mochat."
7540        );
7541    }
7542
7543    #[cfg(feature = "channel-wecom")]
7544    for (alias, wc) in &config.channels.wecom {
7545        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("wecom.{alias}")) {
7546            continue;
7547        }
7548        if !wc.enabled {
7549            continue;
7550        }
7551        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
7552            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
7553            let alias = alias.clone();
7554            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("wecom", &alias))
7555        };
7556        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7557            display_name: "WeCom",
7558            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7559            channel: Arc::new(WeComChannel::new(
7560                wc.webhook_key.clone(),
7561                alias.clone(),
7562                peer_resolver,
7563            )),
7564        });
7565    }
7566
7567    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-wecom"))]
7568    if !config.channels.wecom.is_empty() {
7569        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7570            WARN,
7571            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7572                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7573            "WeCom channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7574             `channel-wecom`; skipping WeCom."
7575        );
7576    }
7577
7578    #[cfg(feature = "channel-wecom-ws")]
7579    for (alias, wc_ws) in &config.channels.wecom_ws {
7580        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("wecom_ws.{alias}"))
7581            && !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("wecom-ws.{alias}"))
7582        {
7583            continue;
7584        }
7585        if !wc_ws.enabled {
7586            continue;
7587        }
7588        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
7589            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
7590            let alias = alias.clone();
7591            let configured_allowed_users = wc_ws.allowed_users.clone();
7592            Arc::new(move || {
7593                let config = cfg_arc.read();
7594                let mut peers = configured_allowed_users.clone();
7595                for peer in config.channel_external_peers("wecom-ws", &alias) {
7596                    if !peers.contains(&peer) {
7597                        peers.push(peer);
7598                    }
7599                }
7600                for peer in config.channel_external_peers("wecom_ws", &alias) {
7601                    if !peers.contains(&peer) {
7602                        peers.push(peer);
7603                    }
7604                }
7605                peers
7606            })
7607        };
7608        match WeComWsChannel::new_with_alias(
7609            wc_ws,
7610            alias.clone(),
7611            peer_resolver,
7612            &config.channel_workspace_dir(&format!("wecom_ws.{alias}")),
7613        ) {
7614            Ok(channel) => channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7615                display_name: "WeCom WebSocket",
7616                alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7617                channel: Arc::new(channel),
7618            }),
7619            Err(err) => {
7620                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7621                    WARN,
7622                    ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7623                        .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown)
7624                        .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"error": format!("{err:#}")})),
7625                    format!(
7626                        "WeCom WebSocket channel configuration is invalid; skipping WeCom WebSocket {matrix_skip_context}"
7627                    ),
7628                );
7629            }
7630        }
7631    }
7632
7633    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-wecom-ws"))]
7634    if !config.channels.wecom_ws.is_empty() {
7635        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7636            WARN,
7637            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7638                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7639            format!(
7640                "WeCom WebSocket channel is configured but this build was compiled without `channel-wecom-ws`; skipping WeCom WebSocket {matrix_skip_context}."
7641            ),
7642        );
7643    }
7644
7645    #[cfg(feature = "channel-wechat")]
7646    for (alias, wechat) in &config.channels.wechat {
7647        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("wechat.{alias}")) {
7648            continue;
7649        }
7650        if !wechat.enabled {
7651            continue;
7652        }
7653        let peer_resolver: Arc<dyn Fn() -> Vec<String> + Send + Sync> = {
7654            let cfg_arc = config_arc.clone();
7655            let alias = alias.clone();
7656            Arc::new(move || cfg_arc.read().channel_external_peers("wechat", &alias))
7657        };
7658        match WeChatChannel::new(
7659            alias.clone(),
7660            peer_resolver,
7661            wechat.api_base_url.clone(),
7662            wechat.cdn_base_url.clone(),
7663            wechat.state_dir.as_ref().map(|s| expand_tilde_in_path(s)),
7664        ) {
7665            Ok(channel) => {
7666                channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7667                    display_name: "WeChat",
7668                    alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7669                    channel: Arc::new(
7670                        channel
7671                            .with_persistence(config_arc.clone())
7672                            .with_workspace_dir(
7673                                config.channel_workspace_dir(&format!("wechat.{alias}")),
7674                            ),
7675                    ),
7676                });
7677            }
7678            Err(err) => {
7679                ::zeroclaw_log::record!(WARN, ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note).with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown).with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"matrix_skip_context": matrix_skip_context, "err": err.to_string()})), "WeChat channel configuration is invalid; skipping WeChat");
7680            }
7681        }
7682    }
7683
7684    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-wechat"))]
7685    for alias in config.channels.wechat.keys() {
7686        if active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("wechat.{alias}")) {
7687            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7688                WARN,
7689                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7690                    .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown)
7691                    .with_attrs(::serde_json::json!({"matrix_skip_context": matrix_skip_context})),
7692                "WeChat channel is configured but this build was compiled without `channel-wechat`; skipping WeChat ."
7693            );
7694        }
7695    }
7696
7697    #[cfg(feature = "channel-clawdtalk")]
7698    for (alias, ct) in &config.channels.clawdtalk {
7699        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("clawdtalk.{alias}")) {
7700            continue;
7701        }
7702        if !ct.enabled {
7703            continue;
7704        }
7705        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7706            display_name: "ClawdTalk",
7707            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7708            channel: Arc::new(ClawdTalkChannel::new(alias.clone(), ct.clone())),
7709        });
7710    }
7711
7712    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-clawdtalk"))]
7713    if !config.channels.clawdtalk.is_empty() {
7714        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7715            WARN,
7716            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7717                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7718            "ClawdTalk channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7719             `channel-clawdtalk`; skipping ClawdTalk."
7720        );
7721    }
7722
7723    // Notion database poller channel
7724    #[cfg(feature = "channel-notion")]
7725    if config.notion.enabled && !config.notion.database_id.trim().is_empty() {
7726        let notion_api_key = config.notion.api_key.trim().to_string();
7727        if notion_api_key.is_empty() {
7728            ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7729                WARN,
7730                ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7731                    .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7732                "Notion channel enabled but `notion.api_key` is unset. Set it via the schema-mirror grammar: \
7733                 `ZEROCLAW_notion__api_key=...`."
7734            );
7735        } else {
7736            channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7737                display_name: "Notion",
7738                alias: None,
7739                channel: Arc::new(NotionChannel::new(
7740                    "notion",
7741                    notion_api_key,
7742                    config.notion.database_id.clone(),
7743                    config.notion.poll_interval_secs,
7744                    config.notion.status_property.clone(),
7745                    config.notion.input_property.clone(),
7746                    config.notion.result_property.clone(),
7747                    config.notion.max_concurrent,
7748                    config.notion.recover_stale,
7749                )),
7750            });
7751        }
7752    }
7753
7754    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-notion"))]
7755    if config.notion.enabled {
7756        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7757            WARN,
7758            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7759                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7760            "Notion channel is enabled but this build was compiled without \
7761             `channel-notion`; skipping Notion."
7762        );
7763    }
7764
7765    #[cfg(feature = "channel-reddit")]
7766    for (alias, rd) in &config.channels.reddit {
7767        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("reddit.{alias}")) {
7768            continue;
7769        }
7770        if !rd.enabled {
7771            continue;
7772        }
7773        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7774            display_name: "Reddit",
7775            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7776            channel: Arc::new(RedditChannel::new(
7777                alias.clone(),
7778                rd.client_id.clone(),
7779                rd.client_secret.clone(),
7780                rd.refresh_token.clone(),
7781                rd.username.clone(),
7782                rd.subreddits.clone(),
7783            )),
7784        });
7785    }
7786
7787    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-reddit"))]
7788    if !config.channels.reddit.is_empty() {
7789        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7790            WARN,
7791            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7792                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7793            "Reddit channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7794             `channel-reddit`; skipping Reddit."
7795        );
7796    }
7797
7798    #[cfg(feature = "channel-bluesky")]
7799    for (alias, bs) in &config.channels.bluesky {
7800        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("bluesky.{alias}")) {
7801            continue;
7802        }
7803        if !bs.enabled {
7804            continue;
7805        }
7806        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7807            display_name: "Bluesky",
7808            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7809            channel: Arc::new(BlueskyChannel::new(
7810                alias.clone(),
7811                bs.handle.clone(),
7812                bs.app_password.clone(),
7813            )),
7814        });
7815    }
7816
7817    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-bluesky"))]
7818    if !config.channels.bluesky.is_empty() {
7819        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7820            WARN,
7821            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7822                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7823            "Bluesky channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7824             `channel-bluesky`; skipping Bluesky."
7825        );
7826    }
7827
7828    #[cfg(feature = "voice-wake")]
7829    for (alias, vw) in &config.channels.voice_wake {
7830        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("voice_wake.{alias}")) {
7831            continue;
7832        }
7833        if !vw.enabled {
7834            continue;
7835        }
7836        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7837            display_name: "VoiceWake",
7838            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7839            channel: Arc::new(VoiceWakeChannel::new(
7840                alias.clone(),
7841                vw.clone(),
7842                config.transcription.clone(),
7843            )),
7844        });
7845    }
7846
7847    #[cfg(not(feature = "voice-wake"))]
7848    if !config.channels.voice_wake.is_empty() {
7849        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7850            WARN,
7851            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7852                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7853            "VoiceWake channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7854             `voice-wake`; skipping VoiceWake."
7855        );
7856    }
7857
7858    #[cfg(feature = "channel-voice-call")]
7859    for (alias, vc) in &config.channels.voice_call {
7860        if !active_channel_aliases.contains(&format!("voice_call.{alias}")) {
7861            continue;
7862        }
7863        if !vc.enabled {
7864            continue;
7865        }
7866        channels.push(ConfiguredChannel {
7867            display_name: "Voice Call",
7868            alias: Some(alias.clone()),
7869            channel: Arc::new(VoiceCallChannel::new(alias.clone(), vc.clone())),
7870        });
7871    }
7872
7873    #[cfg(not(feature = "channel-voice-call"))]
7874    if !config.channels.voice_call.is_empty() {
7875        ::zeroclaw_log::record!(
7876            WARN,
7877            ::zeroclaw_log::Event::new(module_path!(), ::zeroclaw_log::Action::Note)
7878                .with_outcome(::zeroclaw_log::EventOutcome::Unknown),
7879            "Voice Call channel is configured but this build was compiled without \
7880             `channel-voice-call`; skipping Voice Call."
7881        );
7882    }
7883
