11425    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11426    impl Channel for RecordingChannel {
11427        fn name(&self) -> &str {
11428            "test-channel"
11429        }
11430
11431        async fn send(&self, message: &SendMessage) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
11432            self.sent_messages
11433                .lock()
11434                .await
11435                .push(format!("{}:{}", message.recipient, message.content));
11436            Ok(())
11437        }
11438
11439        async fn listen(
11440            &self,
11441            _tx: tokio::sync::mpsc::Sender<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>,
11442        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
11443            Ok(())
11444        }
11445
11446        async fn start_typing(&self, _recipient: &str) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
11447            self.start_typing_calls.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
11448            Ok(())
11449        }
11450
11451        async fn stop_typing(&self, _recipient: &str) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
11452            self.stop_typing_calls.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
11453            Ok(())
11454        }
11455
11456        async fn add_reaction(
11457            &self,
11458            channel_id: &str,
11459            message_id: &str,
11460            emoji: &str,
11461        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
11462            self.reactions_added.lock().await.push((
11463                channel_id.to_string(),
11464                message_id.to_string(),
11465                emoji.to_string(),
11466            ));
11467            Ok(())
11468        }
11469
11470        async fn remove_reaction(
11471            &self,
11472            channel_id: &str,
11473            message_id: &str,
11474            emoji: &str,
11475        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
11476            self.reactions_removed.lock().await.push((
11477                channel_id.to_string(),
11478                message_id.to_string(),
11479                emoji.to_string(),
11480            ));
11481            Ok(())
11482        }
11483    }
11484
11485    fn test_runtime_ctx_with_config_agent_and_provider_ref(
11486        channel: Arc<dyn Channel>,
11487        model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider>,
11488        prompt_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::Config,
11489        agent_cfg: zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig,
11490        model_provider_ref: &str,
11491    ) -> Arc<ChannelRuntimeContext> {
11492        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
11493        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
11494
11495        Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
11496            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
11497            model_provider,
11498            model_provider_ref: Arc::new(model_provider_ref.to_string()),
11499            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
11500            agent_cfg: Arc::new(agent_cfg),
11501            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
11502            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
11503                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
11504                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
11505                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
11506                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
11507                ),
11508            ),
11509            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
11510            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
11511            system_prompt: Arc::new("You are a helpful assistant.".to_string()),
11512            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
11513            temperature: Some(0.0),
11514            auto_save_memory: false,
11515            max_tool_iterations: 5,
11516            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
11517            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
11518                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
11519            ))),
11520            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
11521            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
11522            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
11523            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
11524            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
11525            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
11526            prompt_config: Arc::new(prompt_config),
11527            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
11528            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
11529                telegram: false,
11530                slack: false,
11531                discord: false,
11532                mattermost: false,
11533                matrix: false,
11534                whatsapp: false,
11535            },
11536            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
11537            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
11538            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
11539            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
11540            hooks: None,
11541            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
11542            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
11543            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
11544            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
11545            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
11546            ack_reactions: true,
11547            show_tool_calls: true,
11548            session_store: None,
11549            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
11550                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
11551            )),
11552            activated_tools: None,
11553            cost_tracking: None,
11554            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
11555            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
11556            context_token_budget: 0,
11557            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
11558                Duration::ZERO,
11559            )),
11560            receipt_generator: None,
11561            show_receipts_in_response: false,
11562            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
11563            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
11564        })
11565    }
11566
11567    struct SlowModelProvider {
11568        delay: Duration,
11569    }
11570
11571    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11572    impl ModelProvider for SlowModelProvider {
11573        async fn chat_with_system(
11574            &self,
11575            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
11576            message: &str,
11577            _model: &str,
11578            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11579        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11580            tokio::time::sleep(self.delay).await;
11581            Ok(format!("echo: {message}"))
11582        }
11583    }
11584    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for SlowModelProvider {
11585        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11586            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
11587                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
11588                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
11589                ),
11590            )
11591        }
11592        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11593            "SlowModelProvider"
11594        }
11595    }
11596
11597    struct ToolCallingModelProvider;
11598
11599    fn tool_call_payload() -> String {
11600        r#"<tool_call>
11601{"name":"mock_price","arguments":{"symbol":"BTC"}}
11602</tool_call>"#
11603            .to_string()
11604    }
11605
11606    fn tool_call_payload_with_alias_tag() -> String {
11607        r#"<toolcall>
11608{"name":"mock_price","arguments":{"symbol":"BTC"}}
11609</toolcall>"#
11610            .to_string()
11611    }
11612
11613    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11614    impl ModelProvider for ToolCallingModelProvider {
11615        async fn chat_with_system(
11616            &self,
11617            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
11618            _message: &str,
11619            _model: &str,
11620            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11621        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11622            Ok(tool_call_payload())
11623        }
11624
11625        async fn chat_with_history(
11626            &self,
11627            messages: &[ChatMessage],
11628            _model: &str,
11629            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11630        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11631            let has_tool_results = messages
11632                .iter()
11633                .any(|msg| msg.role == "user" && msg.content.contains("[Tool results]"));
11634            if has_tool_results {
11635                Ok("BTC is currently around $65,000 based on latest tool output.".to_string())
11636            } else {
11637                Ok(tool_call_payload())
11638            }
11639        }
11640    }
11641    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for ToolCallingModelProvider {
11642        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11643            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
11644                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
11645                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
11646                ),
11647            )
11648        }
11649        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11650            "ToolCallingModelProvider"
11651        }
11652    }
11653
11654    struct SessionsCurrentModelProvider;
11655
11656    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11657    impl ModelProvider for SessionsCurrentModelProvider {
11658        async fn chat_with_system(
11659            &self,
11660            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
11661            _message: &str,
11662            _model: &str,
11663            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11664        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11665            Ok(r#"<tool_call>
11666{"name":"sessions_current","arguments":{}}
11667</tool_call>"#
11668                .to_string())
11669        }
11670
11671        async fn chat_with_history(
11672            &self,
11673            messages: &[ChatMessage],
11674            _model: &str,
11675            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11676        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11677            if let Some(tool_results) = messages
11678                .iter()
11679                .find(|msg| msg.role == "user" && msg.content.contains("[Tool results]"))
11680            {
11681                if tool_results
11682                    .content
11683                    .contains("Current session: test-channel_chat-42_alice")
11684                    && tool_results.content.contains("Messages: 1")
11685                {
11686                    return Ok(
11687                        "Current session: test-channel_chat-42_alice\nMessages: 1".to_string()
11688                    );
11689                }
11690
11691                Ok("session result unavailable".to_string())
11692            } else {
11693                self.chat_with_system(None, "", "", None).await
11694            }
11695        }
11696    }
11697    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for SessionsCurrentModelProvider {
11698        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11699            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
11700                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
11701                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
11702                ),
11703            )
11704        }
11705        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11706            "SessionsCurrentModelProvider"
11707        }
11708    }

11792    struct IterativeToolModelProvider {
11793        required_tool_iterations: usize,
11794    }
11795
11796    impl IterativeToolModelProvider {
11797        fn completed_tool_iterations(messages: &[ChatMessage]) -> usize {
11798            messages
11799                .iter()
11800                .filter(|msg| msg.role == "user" && msg.content.contains("[Tool results]"))
11801                .count()
11802        }
11803    }
11804
11805    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11806    impl ModelProvider for IterativeToolModelProvider {
11807        async fn chat_with_system(
11808            &self,
11809            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
11810            _message: &str,
11811            _model: &str,
11812            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11813        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11814            Ok(tool_call_payload())
11815        }
11816
11817        async fn chat_with_history(
11818            &self,
11819            messages: &[ChatMessage],
11820            _model: &str,
11821            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11822        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11823            let completed_iterations = Self::completed_tool_iterations(messages);
11824            if completed_iterations >= self.required_tool_iterations {
11825                Ok(format!(
11826                    "Completed after {completed_iterations} tool iterations."
11827                ))
11828            } else {
11829                Ok(tool_call_payload())
11830            }
11831        }
11832    }
11833    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for IterativeToolModelProvider {
11834        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11835            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
11836                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
11837                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
11838                ),
11839            )
11840        }
11841        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11842            "IterativeToolModelProvider"
11843        }
11844    }
11845
11846    #[derive(Default)]
11847    struct HistoryCaptureModelProvider {
11848        calls: std::sync::Mutex<Vec<Vec<(String, String)>>>,
11849        vision: bool,
11850    }
11851
11852    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11853    impl ModelProvider for HistoryCaptureModelProvider {
11854        async fn chat_with_system(
11855            &self,
11856            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
11857            _message: &str,
11858            _model: &str,
11859            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11860        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11861            Ok("fallback".to_string())
11862        }
11863
11864        async fn chat_with_history(
11865            &self,
11866            messages: &[ChatMessage],
11867            _model: &str,
11868            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11869        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11870            let snapshot = messages
11871                .iter()
11872                .map(|m| (m.role.clone(), m.content.clone()))
11873                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
11874            let mut calls = self.calls.lock().unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
11875            calls.push(snapshot);
11876            Ok(format!("response-{}", calls.len()))
11877        }
11878
11879        fn supports_vision(&self) -> bool {
11880            self.vision
11881        }
11882    }
11883    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for HistoryCaptureModelProvider {
11884        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11885            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
11886                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
11887                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
11888                ),
11889            )
11890        }
11891        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11892            "HistoryCaptureModelProvider"
11893        }
11894    }
11895
11896    struct DelayedHistoryCaptureModelProvider {
11897        delay: Duration,
11898        calls: std::sync::Mutex<Vec<Vec<(String, String)>>>,
11899    }
11900
11901    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11902    impl ModelProvider for DelayedHistoryCaptureModelProvider {
11903        async fn chat_with_system(
11904            &self,
11905            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
11906            _message: &str,
11907            _model: &str,
11908            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11909        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11910            Ok("fallback".to_string())
11911        }
11912
11913        async fn chat_with_history(
11914            &self,
11915            messages: &[ChatMessage],
11916            _model: &str,
11917            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11918        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11919            let snapshot = messages
11920                .iter()
11921                .map(|m| (m.role.clone(), m.content.clone()))
11922                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
11923            let call_index = {
11924                let mut calls = self.calls.lock().unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
11925                calls.push(snapshot);
11926                calls.len()
11927            };
11928            tokio::time::sleep(self.delay).await;
11929            Ok(format!("response-{call_index}"))
11930        }
11931    }
11932    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for DelayedHistoryCaptureModelProvider {
11933        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11934            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
11935                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
11936                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
11937                ),
11938            )
11939        }
11940        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11941            "DelayedHistoryCaptureModelProvider"
11942        }
11943    }
11944
11945    struct MockPriceTool;
11946
11947    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for MockPriceTool {
11948        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11949            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Tool(::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ToolKind::Plugin)
11950        }
11951        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11952            <Self as ::zeroclaw_api::tool::Tool>::name(self)
11953        }
11954    }
11955
11956    #[derive(Default)]
11957    struct ModelCaptureModelProvider {
11958        call_count: AtomicUsize,
11959        models: std::sync::Mutex<Vec<String>>,
11960    }
11961
11962    #[async_trait::async_trait]
11963    impl ModelProvider for ModelCaptureModelProvider {
11964        async fn chat_with_system(
11965            &self,
11966            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
11967            _message: &str,
11968            _model: &str,
11969            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11970        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11971            Ok("fallback".to_string())
11972        }
11973
11974        async fn chat_with_history(
11975            &self,
11976            _messages: &[ChatMessage],
11977            model: &str,
11978            _temperature: Option<f64>,
11979        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
11980            self.call_count.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
11981            self.models
11982                .lock()
11983                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
11984                .push(model.to_string());
11985            Ok("ok".to_string())
11986        }
11987    }
11988    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for ModelCaptureModelProvider {
11989        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
11990            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
11991                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
11992                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
11993                ),
11994            )
11995        }
11996        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
11997            "ModelCaptureModelProvider"
11998        }
11999    }
12000
12001    #[derive(Default)]
12002    struct PrecheckProbeModelProvider {
12003        precheck_calls: AtomicUsize,
12004        main_calls: AtomicUsize,
12005        models: std::sync::Mutex<Vec<String>>,
12006    }
12007
12008    #[async_trait::async_trait]
12009    impl ModelProvider for PrecheckProbeModelProvider {
12010        async fn chat_with_system(
12011            &self,
12012            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
12013            message: &str,
12014            model: &str,
12015            _temperature: Option<f64>,
12016        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
12017            self.models
12018                .lock()
12019                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
12020                .push(model.to_string());
12021
12022            if message.starts_with("Decide whether the assistant should send any visible reply") {
12023                self.precheck_calls.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
12024                return Ok("NO_REPLY[INFO]: background chatter".to_string());
12025            }
12026
12027            self.main_calls.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
12028            Ok("visible reply".to_string())
12029        }
12030    }
12031
12032    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for PrecheckProbeModelProvider {
12033        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
12034            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
12035                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
12036                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
12037                ),
12038            )
12039        }
12040        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
12041            "PrecheckProbeModelProvider"
12042        }
12043    }
12044
12045    #[async_trait::async_trait]
12046    impl Tool for MockPriceTool {
12047        fn name(&self) -> &str {
12048            "mock_price"
12049        }
12050
12051        fn description(&self) -> &str {
12052            "Return a mocked BTC price"
12053        }
12054
12055        fn parameters_schema(&self) -> serde_json::Value {
12056            serde_json::json!({
12057                "type": "object",
12058                "properties": {
12059                    "symbol": { "type": "string" }
12060                },
12061                "required": ["symbol"]
12062            })
12063        }
12064
12065        async fn execute(&self, args: serde_json::Value) -> anyhow::Result<ToolResult> {
12066            let symbol = args.get("symbol").and_then(serde_json::Value::as_str);
12067            if symbol != Some("BTC") {
12068                return Ok(ToolResult {
12069                    success: false,
12070                    output: String::new(),
12071                    error: Some("unexpected symbol".to_string()),
12072                });
12073            }
12074
12075            Ok(ToolResult {
12076                success: true,
12077                output: r#"{"symbol":"BTC","price_usd":65000}"#.to_string(),
12078                error: None,
12079            })
12080        }
12081    }
12082
12083    /// Minimal fixed-name tool for allowlist-filter coverage.
12084    struct NamedMockTool(&'static str);
12085
12086    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for NamedMockTool {
12087        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
12088            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Tool(::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ToolKind::Plugin)
12089        }
12090        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
12091            self.0
12092        }
12093    }
12094
12095    #[async_trait::async_trait]
12096    impl Tool for NamedMockTool {
12097        fn name(&self) -> &str {
12098            self.0
12099        }
12100
12101        fn description(&self) -> &str {
12102            "named mock"
12103        }
12104
12105        fn parameters_schema(&self) -> serde_json::Value {
12106            serde_json::json!({ "type": "object", "properties": {} })
12107        }
12108
12109        async fn execute(&self, _args: serde_json::Value) -> anyhow::Result<ToolResult> {
12110            Ok(ToolResult {
12111                success: true,
12112                output: String::new(),
12113                error: None,
12114            })
12115        }
12116    }
12117
12118    /// `start_channels` must apply the agent's `allowed_tools` allowlist to the
12119    /// eager built-in registry before MCP/skill registration, at parity with
12120    /// `agent::run` / `process_message` / the `from_config` path. Before this
12121    /// gate the channel path skipped `apply_policy_tool_filter`, so an agent
12122    /// allowlisted to `file_read` still emitted raw `shell` / `file_write` in
12123    /// its native tool specs to the model.
12124    #[test]
12125    fn channel_path_allowlist_drops_non_allowlisted_builtins() {
12126        let mut built_tools: Vec<Box<dyn Tool>> = vec![
12127            Box::new(NamedMockTool("shell")),
12128            Box::new(NamedMockTool("file_write")),
12129            Box::new(NamedMockTool("file_read")),
12130        ];
12131        let policy = SecurityPolicy {
12132            allowed_tools: Some(vec!["file_read".to_string()]),
12133            workspace_dir: std::env::temp_dir(),
12134            ..SecurityPolicy::default()
12135        };
12136        apply_policy_tool_filter(&mut built_tools, Some(&policy), None);
12137        let names: Vec<&str> = built_tools.iter().map(|t| t.name()).collect();
12138        assert!(
12139            !names.contains(&"shell") && !names.contains(&"file_write"),
12140            "raw built-ins outside the allowlist must be dropped on the channel path; got {names:?}"
12141        );
12142        assert!(
12143            names.contains(&"file_read"),
12144            "allowlisted tool must survive the filter; got {names:?}"
12145        );
12146    }
12147
12148    #[tokio::test]
12149    async fn process_channel_message_executes_tool_calls_instead_of_sending_raw_json() {
12150        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
12151        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
12152
12153        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
12154        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
12155
12156        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
12157            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
12158            model_provider: Arc::new(ToolCallingModelProvider),
12159            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
12160            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
12161            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
12162            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12163            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
12164                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
12165                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12166                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
12167                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
12168                ),
12169            ),
12170            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
12171            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
12172            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
12173            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
12174            temperature: Some(0.0),
12175            auto_save_memory: false,
12176            max_tool_iterations: 10,
12177            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
12178            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
12179                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
12180            ))),
12181            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
12182            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12183            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12184            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
12185            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
12186            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
12187            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
12188            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
12189            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
12190                telegram: false,
12191                slack: false,
12192                discord: false,
12193                mattermost: false,
12194                matrix: false,
12195                whatsapp: false,
12196            },
12197            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12198            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
12199            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12200            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
12201            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
12202            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
12203            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
12204            hooks: None,
12205            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12206            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
12207            ack_reactions: true,
12208            show_tool_calls: true,
12209            session_store: None,
12210            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
12211                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
12212            )),
12213            activated_tools: None,
12214            cost_tracking: None,
12215            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
12216            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
12217            context_token_budget: 0,
12218            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
12219                Duration::ZERO,
12220            )),
12221            receipt_generator: None,
12222            show_receipts_in_response: false,
12223            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12224            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12225        });
12226
12227        process_channel_message(
12228            runtime_ctx,
12229            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
12230                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
12231                sender: "alice".to_string(),
12232                reply_target: "chat-42".to_string(),
12233                content: "What is the BTC price now?".to_string(),
12234                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
12235                channel_alias: None,
12236                timestamp: 1,
12237                thread_ts: None,
12238                interruption_scope_id: None,
12239                attachments: vec![],
12240                subject: None,
12241            },
12242            CancellationToken::new(),
12243        )
12244        .await;
12245
12246        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
12247        assert!(!sent_messages.is_empty());
12248        let reply = sent_messages.last().unwrap();
12249        assert!(reply.starts_with("chat-42:"));
12250        assert!(reply.contains("BTC is currently around"));
12251        assert!(!reply.contains("\"tool_calls\""));
12252        assert!(!reply.contains("mock_price"));
12253    }
12254
12255    #[tokio::test]
12256    async fn process_channel_message_scopes_sender_session_key_for_sessions_current_tool() {
12257        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
12258        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
12259
12260        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
12261        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
12262
12263        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
12264        let session_store: Arc<dyn zeroclaw_infra::session_backend::SessionBackend> =
12265            Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::session_store::SessionStore::new(tmp.path()).unwrap());
12266
12267        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
12268            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
12269            model_provider: Arc::new(SessionsCurrentModelProvider),
12270            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
12271            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
12272            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12273            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
12274                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
12275                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12276                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
12277                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
12278                ),
12279            ),
12280            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(
12281                zeroclaw_runtime::tools::SessionsCurrentTool::new(Arc::clone(&session_store)),
12282            )]),
12283            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
12284            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
12285            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
12286            temperature: Some(0.0),
12287            auto_save_memory: false,
12288            max_tool_iterations: 10,
12289            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
12290            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
12291                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
12292            ))),
12293            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
12294            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12295            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12296            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
12297            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
12298            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
12299            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
12300            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
12301            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
12302                telegram: false,
12303                slack: false,
12304                discord: false,
12305                mattermost: false,
12306                matrix: false,
12307                whatsapp: false,
12308            },
12309            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12310            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
12311            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12312            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
12313            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
12314            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
12315            hooks: None,
12316            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12317            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
12318            ack_reactions: true,
12319            show_tool_calls: true,
12320            session_store: Some(Arc::clone(&session_store)),
12321            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(&{
12322                let mut profile = zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default();
12323                profile.auto_approve.push("sessions_current".to_string());
12324                profile
12325            })),
12326            activated_tools: None,
12327            cost_tracking: None,
12328            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
12329            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
12330            context_token_budget: 0,
12331            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
12332                Duration::ZERO,
12333            )),
12334            receipt_generator: None,
12335            show_receipts_in_response: false,
12336            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12337            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12338            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
12339            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
12340        });
12341
12342        process_channel_message(
12343            runtime_ctx,
12344            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
12345                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
12346                sender: "alice".to_string(),
12347                reply_target: "chat-42".to_string(),
12348                content: "Which session is this?".to_string(),
12349                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
12350                channel_alias: None,
12351                timestamp: 1,
12352                thread_ts: None,
12353                interruption_scope_id: None,
12354                attachments: vec![],
12355                subject: None,
12356            },
12357            CancellationToken::new(),
12358        )
12359        .await;
12360
12361        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
12362        assert!(!sent_messages.is_empty());
12363        let reply = sent_messages.last().unwrap();
12364        assert!(reply.contains("Current session: test-channel_chat-42_alice"));
12365        assert!(reply.contains("Messages: 1"));
12366    }
12367
12368    #[tokio::test]
12369    async fn process_channel_message_renders_trailing_tool_receipts_block_when_enabled() {
12370        // Activated path: a real ReceiptGenerator + show_receipts_in_response=true
12371        // must produce a second send carrying the "Tool receipts:" block with a
12372        // valid zc-receipt-* token. Pre-#6214 this was dead code from the test
12373        // suite because every ChannelRuntimeContext literal pinned the feature
12374        // off; this test guards the integration so a regression in the block
12375        // render or send call surfaces in CI rather than in production.
12376        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
12377        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
12378
12379        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
12380        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
12381
12382        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
12383            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
12384            model_provider: Arc::new(ToolCallingModelProvider),
12385            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
12386            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
12387            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12388            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
12389                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
12390                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12391                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
12392                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
12393                ),
12394            ),
12395            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
12396            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
12397            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
12398            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
12399            temperature: Some(0.0),
12400            auto_save_memory: false,
12401            max_tool_iterations: 10,
12402            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
12403            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
12404                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
12405            ))),
12406            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
12407            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12408            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12409            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
12410            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
12411            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
12412            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
12413            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
12414            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
12415                telegram: false,
12416                slack: false,
12417                discord: false,
12418                mattermost: false,
12419                matrix: false,
12420                whatsapp: false,
12421            },
12422            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12423            // Full autonomy + auto-approve mock_price so the loop actually
12424            // reaches execute_one_tool. The other tests in this file pass
12425            // under Supervised because ToolCallingProvider returns the BTC
12426            // reply regardless of whether the tool ran (the LLM only needs
12427            // to see a `[Tool results]` user message — even a "denied"
12428            // payload triggers the deterministic response). Receipts only
12429            // generate on the actual execute path, so we need the gate
12430            // open here.
12431            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::Full,
12432            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12433            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
12434            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
12435            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
12436            hooks: None,
12437            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12438            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
12439            ack_reactions: true,
12440            show_tool_calls: true,
12441            session_store: None,
12442            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
12443                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig {
12444                    level: zeroclaw_config::autonomy::AutonomyLevel::Full,
12445                    auto_approve: vec!["mock_price".to_string()],
12446                    ..Default::default()
12447                },
12448            )),
12449            activated_tools: None,
12450            cost_tracking: None,
12451            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
12452            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
12453            context_token_budget: 0,
12454            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
12455                Duration::ZERO,
12456            )),
12457            receipt_generator: Some(
12458                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::tool_receipts::ReceiptGenerator::new(),
12459            ),
12460            show_receipts_in_response: true,
12461            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12462            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12463            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
12464            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
12465        });
12466
12467        process_channel_message(
12468            runtime_ctx,
12469            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
12470                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
12471                sender: "alice".to_string(),
12472                reply_target: "chat-42".to_string(),
12473                content: "What is the BTC price now?".to_string(),
12474                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
12475                channel_alias: None,
12476                timestamp: 1,
12477                thread_ts: None,
12478                interruption_scope_id: None,
12479                attachments: vec![],
12480                subject: None,
12481            },
12482            CancellationToken::new(),
12483        )
12484        .await;
12485
12486        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
12487        // Two sends: the model's reply and the trailing receipts block.
12488        assert!(
12489            sent_messages.len() >= 2,
12490            "expected at least 2 sends (reply + receipts block), got {}: {:?}",
12491            sent_messages.len(),
12492            sent_messages
12493        );
12494
12495        let receipts_message = sent_messages
12496            .iter()
12497            .find(|m| m.contains("Tool receipts:"))
12498            .unwrap_or_else(|| {
12499                panic!(
12500                    "no `Tool receipts:` send found; got {:?}",
12501                    sent_messages.as_slice()
12502                )
12503            });
12504        assert!(
12505            receipts_message.starts_with("chat-42:"),
12506            "receipts block must be sent to the same reply target as the agent reply, got {receipts_message}"
12507        );
12508        assert!(
12509            receipts_message.contains("---\nTool receipts:"),
12510            "receipts block must be prefixed with the documented `---\\nTool receipts:` separator, got {receipts_message}"
12511        );
12512        assert!(
12513            receipts_message.contains("zc-receipt-"),
12514            "receipts block must carry at least one zc-receipt-* HMAC token (proves the generator actually ran), got {receipts_message}"
12515        );
12516        assert!(
12517            receipts_message.contains("mock_price"),
12518            "receipts block should name the tool that produced the receipt, got {receipts_message}"
12519        );
12520    }
12521
12522    #[tokio::test]
12523    async fn process_channel_message_omits_receipts_block_when_disabled() {
12524        // Backward-compat: with show_receipts_in_response=false (default), no
12525        // trailing receipts message is sent — even when a generator is active
12526        // and the loop ran tools. This is the path every other test relies on
12527        // implicitly; assert it once explicitly.
12528        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
12529        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
12530
12531        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
12532        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
12533
12534        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
12535            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
12536            model_provider: Arc::new(ToolCallingModelProvider),
12537            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
12538            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
12539            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12540            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
12541                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
12542                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12543                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
12544                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
12545                ),
12546            ),
12547            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
12548            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
12549            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
12550            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
12551            temperature: Some(0.0),
12552            auto_save_memory: false,
12553            max_tool_iterations: 10,
12554            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
12555            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
12556                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
12557            ))),
12558            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
12559            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12560            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12561            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
12562            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
12563            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
12564            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
12565            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
12566            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
12567                telegram: false,
12568                slack: false,
12569                discord: false,
12570                mattermost: false,
12571                matrix: false,
12572                whatsapp: false,
12573            },
12574            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12575            // Match the enabled-test setup so the tool actually runs; the
12576            // assertion below proves the receipt-block send is gated on
12577            // `show_receipts_in_response` and not on whether the loop saw
12578            // any receipts.
12579            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::Full,
12580            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12581            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
12582            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
12583            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
12584            hooks: None,
12585            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12586            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
12587            ack_reactions: true,
12588            show_tool_calls: true,
12589            session_store: None,
12590            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
12591                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig {
12592                    level: zeroclaw_config::autonomy::AutonomyLevel::Full,
12593                    auto_approve: vec!["mock_price".to_string()],
12594                    ..Default::default()
12595                },
12596            )),
12597            activated_tools: None,
12598            cost_tracking: None,
12599            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
12600            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
12601            context_token_budget: 0,
12602            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
12603                Duration::ZERO,
12604            )),
12605            receipt_generator: Some(
12606                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::tool_receipts::ReceiptGenerator::new(),
12607            ),
12608            show_receipts_in_response: false,
12609            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12610            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12611            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
12612            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
12613        });
12614
12615        process_channel_message(
12616            runtime_ctx,
12617            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
12618                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
12619                sender: "alice".to_string(),
12620                reply_target: "chat-42".to_string(),
12621                content: "What is the BTC price now?".to_string(),
12622                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
12623                channel_alias: None,
12624                timestamp: 1,
12625                thread_ts: None,
12626                interruption_scope_id: None,
12627                attachments: vec![],
12628                subject: None,
12629            },
12630            CancellationToken::new(),
12631        )
12632        .await;
12633
12634        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
12635        assert!(
12636            !sent_messages.iter().any(|m| m.contains("Tool receipts:")),
12637            "no receipts block must be sent when show_receipts_in_response=false; got {:?}",
12638            sent_messages.as_slice()
12639        );
12640    }
12641
12642    #[tokio::test]
12643    async fn process_channel_message_disabled_receipt_generator_emits_no_receipts_anywhere() {
12644        // Strict #6182 acceptance criterion: enabled=false must emit no
12645        // receipt anywhere — not in any sent message, not in the model's
12646        // view of conversation history. `receipt_generator: None` is the
12647        // wire-level reflection of `[agent.resolved.tool_receipts] enabled = false`.
12648        // Distinct from the show_in_response=false test above (which keeps
12649        // the generator on but suppresses the trailing block); this one
12650        // proves nothing is signed in the first place.
12651        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
12652        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
12653
12654        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
12655        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
12656
12657        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
12658            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
12659            model_provider: Arc::new(ToolCallingModelProvider),
12660            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
12661            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
12662            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12663            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
12664                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
12665                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12666                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
12667                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
12668                ),
12669            ),
12670            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
12671            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
12672            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
12673            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
12674            temperature: Some(0.0),
12675            auto_save_memory: false,
12676            max_tool_iterations: 10,
12677            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
12678            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
12679                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
12680            ))),
12681            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
12682            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12683            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12684            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
12685            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
12686            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
12687            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
12688            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
12689            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
12690                telegram: false,
12691                slack: false,
12692                discord: false,
12693                mattermost: false,
12694                matrix: false,
12695                whatsapp: false,
12696            },
12697            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12698            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::Full,
12699            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12700            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
12701            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
12702            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
12703            hooks: None,
12704            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12705            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
12706            ack_reactions: true,
12707            show_tool_calls: true,
12708            session_store: None,
12709            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
12710                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig {
12711                    level: zeroclaw_config::autonomy::AutonomyLevel::Full,
12712                    auto_approve: vec!["mock_price".to_string()],
12713                    ..Default::default()
12714                },
12715            )),
12716            activated_tools: None,
12717            cost_tracking: None,
12718            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
12719            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
12720            context_token_budget: 0,
12721            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
12722                Duration::ZERO,
12723            )),
12724            receipt_generator: None,
12725            show_receipts_in_response: false,
12726            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12727            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12728            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
12729            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
12730        });
12731
12732        process_channel_message(
12733            runtime_ctx.clone(),
12734            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
12735                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
12736                sender: "alice".to_string(),
12737                reply_target: "chat-42".to_string(),
12738                content: "What is the BTC price now?".to_string(),
12739                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
12740                channel_alias: None,
12741                timestamp: 1,
12742                thread_ts: None,
12743                interruption_scope_id: None,
12744                attachments: vec![],
12745                subject: None,
12746            },
12747            CancellationToken::new(),
12748        )
12749        .await;
12750
12751        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
12752        assert!(
12753            !sent_messages.is_empty(),
12754            "agent must still respond when receipts are disabled"
12755        );
12756        assert!(
12757            !sent_messages.iter().any(|m| m.contains("zc-receipt-")),
12758            "no zc-receipt- token must appear in any sent message when receipts are disabled, got {:?}",
12759            sent_messages.as_slice()
12760        );
12761        assert!(
12762            !sent_messages.iter().any(|m| m.contains("Tool receipts:")),
12763            "no `Tool receipts:` block must be sent when receipts are disabled, got {:?}",
12764            sent_messages.as_slice()
12765        );
12766
12767        // Strict surface check: the model's view of conversation history must
12768        // not carry a `[receipt: ` trailer either, otherwise an LLM trained
12769        // on echoing receipts could leak signed-looking output even though
12770        // nothing was actually signed.
12771        let histories = runtime_ctx
12772            .conversation_histories
12773            .lock()
12774            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
12775        for (_key, turns) in histories.iter() {
12776            for msg in turns.iter() {
12777                assert!(
12778                    !msg.content.contains("[receipt: "),
12779                    "no `[receipt: ` trailer must appear in conversation history when receipts are disabled, got: {}",
12780                    msg.content
12781                );
12782            }
12783        }
12784    }
12785
12786    #[tokio::test]
12787    async fn process_channel_message_telegram_does_not_persist_tool_summary_prefix() {
12788        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
12789        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
12790
12791        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
12792        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
12793
12794        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
12795            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
12796            model_provider: Arc::new(ToolCallingModelProvider),
12797            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
12798            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
12799            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
12800            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12801            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
12802                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
12803                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12804                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
12805                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
12806                ),
12807            ),
12808            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
12809            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
12810            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
12811            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
12812            temperature: Some(0.0),
12813            auto_save_memory: false,
12814            max_tool_iterations: 10,
12815            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
12816            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
12817                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
12818            ))),
12819            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
12820            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12821            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12822            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
12823            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
12824            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
12825            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
12826            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
12827            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
12828                telegram: false,
12829                slack: false,
12830                discord: false,
12831                mattermost: false,
12832                matrix: false,
12833                whatsapp: false,
12834            },
12835            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12836            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
12837            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12838            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
12839            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
12840            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
12841            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
12842            hooks: None,
12843            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12844            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
12845            ack_reactions: true,
12846            show_tool_calls: true,
12847            session_store: None,
12848            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
12849                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
12850            )),
12851            activated_tools: None,
12852            cost_tracking: None,
12853            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
12854            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
12855            context_token_budget: 0,
12856            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
12857                Duration::ZERO,
12858            )),
12859            receipt_generator: None,
12860            show_receipts_in_response: false,
12861            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12862            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12863        });
12864
12865        process_channel_message(
12866            runtime_ctx.clone(),
12867            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
12868                id: "msg-telegram-tool-1".to_string(),
12869                sender: "alice".to_string(),
12870                reply_target: "chat-telegram".to_string(),
12871                content: "What is the BTC price now?".to_string(),
12872                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
12873                channel_alias: None,
12874                timestamp: 1,
12875                thread_ts: None,
12876                interruption_scope_id: None,
12877                attachments: vec![],
12878                subject: None,
12879            },
12880            CancellationToken::new(),
12881        )
12882        .await;
12883
12884        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
12885        assert!(!sent_messages.is_empty());
12886        let reply = sent_messages.last().unwrap();
12887        assert!(reply.contains("BTC is currently around"));
12888
12889        let histories = runtime_ctx
12890            .conversation_histories
12891            .lock()
12892            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
12893        let turns = histories
12894            .peek("telegram_chat-telegram_alice")
12895            .expect("telegram history should be stored");
12896        let assistant_turn = turns
12897            .iter()
12898            .rev()
12899            .find(|turn| turn.role == "assistant")
12900            .expect("assistant turn should be present");
12901        assert!(
12902            !assistant_turn.content.contains("[Used tools:"),
12903            "telegram history should not persist tool-summary prefix"
12904        );
12905    }
12906
12907    #[tokio::test]
12908    async fn process_channel_message_strips_unexecuted_tool_json_artifacts_from_reply() {
12909        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
12910        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
12911
12912        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
12913        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
12914
12915        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
12916            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
12917            model_provider: Arc::new(RawToolArtifactModelProvider),
12918            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
12919            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
12920            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
12921            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12922            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
12923                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
12924                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
12925                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
12926                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
12927                ),
12928            ),
12929            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
12930            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
12931            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
12932            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
12933            temperature: Some(0.0),
12934            auto_save_memory: false,
12935            max_tool_iterations: 10,
12936            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
12937            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
12938                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
12939            ))),
12940            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
12941            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12942            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
12943            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
12944            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
12945            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
12946            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
12947            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
12948            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
12949                telegram: false,
12950                slack: false,
12951                discord: false,
12952                mattermost: false,
12953                matrix: false,
12954                whatsapp: false,
12955            },
12956            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
12957            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
12958            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
12959            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
12960            hooks: None,
12961            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12962            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
12963            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12964            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
12965            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
12966            ack_reactions: true,
12967            show_tool_calls: true,
12968            session_store: None,
12969            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
12970                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
12971            )),
12972            activated_tools: None,
12973            cost_tracking: None,
12974            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
12975            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
12976            context_token_budget: 0,
12977            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
12978                Duration::ZERO,
12979            )),
12980            receipt_generator: None,
12981            show_receipts_in_response: false,
12982            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12983            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
12984        });
12985
12986        process_channel_message(
12987            runtime_ctx,
12988            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
12989                id: "msg-raw-json".to_string(),
12990                sender: "alice".to_string(),
12991                reply_target: "chat-raw".to_string(),
12992                content: "What is the BTC price now?".to_string(),
12993                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
12994                channel_alias: None,
12995                timestamp: 3,
12996                thread_ts: None,
12997                interruption_scope_id: None,
12998                attachments: vec![],
12999                subject: None,
13000            },
13001            CancellationToken::new(),
13002        )
13003        .await;
13004
13005        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
13006        assert_eq!(sent_messages.len(), 1);
13007        assert!(sent_messages[0].starts_with("chat-raw:"));
13008        assert!(sent_messages[0].contains("BTC is currently around"));
13009        assert!(!sent_messages[0].contains("\"name\":\"mock_price\""));
13010        assert!(!sent_messages[0].contains("\"result\""));
13011    }
13012
13013    #[tokio::test]
13014    async fn process_channel_message_executes_tool_calls_with_alias_tags() {
13015        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
13016        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
13017
13018        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
13019        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
13020
13021        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
13022            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
13023            model_provider: Arc::new(ToolCallingAliasModelProvider),
13024            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
13025            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
13026            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
13027            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13028            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
13029                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
13030                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13031                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
13032                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
13033                ),
13034            ),
13035            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
13036            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
13037            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
13038            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
13039            temperature: Some(0.0),
13040            auto_save_memory: false,
13041            max_tool_iterations: 10,
13042            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
13043            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
13044                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
13045            ))),
13046            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
13047            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13048            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13049            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
13050            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
13051            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
13052            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
13053            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
13054            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
13055                telegram: false,
13056                slack: false,
13057                discord: false,
13058                mattermost: false,
13059                matrix: false,
13060                whatsapp: false,
13061            },
13062            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
13063            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
13064            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
13065            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
13066            hooks: None,
13067            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13068            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
13069            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13070            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13071            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
13072            ack_reactions: true,
13073            show_tool_calls: true,
13074            session_store: None,
13075            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
13076                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
13077            )),
13078            activated_tools: None,
13079            cost_tracking: None,
13080            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
13081            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
13082            context_token_budget: 0,
13083            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
13084                Duration::ZERO,
13085            )),
13086            receipt_generator: None,
13087            show_receipts_in_response: false,
13088            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13089            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13090        });
13091
13092        process_channel_message(
13093            runtime_ctx,
13094            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
13095                id: "msg-2".to_string(),
13096                sender: "bob".to_string(),
13097                reply_target: "chat-84".to_string(),
13098                content: "What is the BTC price now?".to_string(),
13099                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
13100                channel_alias: None,
13101                timestamp: 2,
13102                thread_ts: None,
13103                interruption_scope_id: None,
13104                attachments: vec![],
13105                subject: None,
13106            },
13107            CancellationToken::new(),
13108        )
13109        .await;
13110
13111        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
13112        assert!(!sent_messages.is_empty());
13113        let reply = sent_messages.last().unwrap();
13114        assert!(reply.starts_with("chat-84:"));
13115        assert!(reply.contains("alias-tag flow resolved"));
13116        assert!(!reply.contains("<toolcall>"));
13117        assert!(!reply.contains("mock_price"));
13118    }
13119
13120    #[tokio::test]
13121    async fn process_channel_message_handles_models_command_without_llm_call() {
13122        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
13123        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
13124
13125        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
13126        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
13127
13128        let agent_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
13129        let agent_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = agent_model_provider_impl.clone();
13130        let alt_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
13131        let alt_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = alt_model_provider_impl.clone();
13132
13133        let mut provider_cache_seed: HashMap<String, Arc<dyn ModelProvider>> = HashMap::new();
13134        provider_cache_seed.insert(
13135            "test-provider".to_string(),
13136            Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
13137        );
13138        provider_cache_seed.insert("openrouter.default".to_string(), alt_model_provider);
13139
13140        let mut prompt_config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
13141        prompt_config
13142            .providers
13143            .models
13144            .ensure("openrouter", "default")
13145            .expect("openrouter slot must exist");
13146
13147        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
13148            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
13149            model_provider: Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
13150            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
13151            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
13152            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
13153            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13154            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
13155                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
13156                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13157                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
13158                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
13159                ),
13160            ),
13161            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
13162            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
13163            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
13164            model: Arc::new("default-model".to_string()),
13165            temperature: Some(0.0),
13166            auto_save_memory: false,
13167            max_tool_iterations: 5,
13168            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
13169            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
13170                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
13171            ))),
13172            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
