13173            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(provider_cache_seed)),
13174            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13175            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
13176            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
13177            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
13178            prompt_config: Arc::new(prompt_config),
13179            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
13180            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
13181                telegram: false,
13182                slack: false,
13183                discord: false,
13184                mattermost: false,
13185                matrix: false,
13186                whatsapp: false,
13187            },
13188            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
13189            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
13190            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
13191            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
13192            hooks: None,
13193            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13194            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
13195            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13196            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13197            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
13198            ack_reactions: true,
13199            show_tool_calls: true,
13200            session_store: None,
13201            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
13202                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
13203            )),
13204            activated_tools: None,
13205            cost_tracking: None,
13206            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
13207            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
13208            context_token_budget: 0,
13209            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
13210                Duration::ZERO,
13211            )),
13212            receipt_generator: None,
13213            show_receipts_in_response: false,
13214            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13215            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13216        });
13217
13218        process_channel_message(
13219            runtime_ctx.clone(),
13220            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
13221                id: "msg-cmd-1".to_string(),
13222                sender: "alice".to_string(),
13223                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
13224                content: "/models openrouter".to_string(),
13225                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
13226                channel_alias: None,
13227                timestamp: 1,
13228                thread_ts: None,
13229                interruption_scope_id: None,
13230                attachments: vec![],
13231                subject: None,
13232            },
13233            CancellationToken::new(),
13234        )
13235        .await;
13236
13237        let sent = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
13238        assert_eq!(sent.len(), 1);
13239        assert!(sent[0].contains("ModelProvider switched to `openrouter.default`"));
13240
13241        let route_key = "telegram_chat-1_alice";
13242        let route = runtime_ctx
13243            .route_overrides
13244            .lock()
13245            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
13246            .get(route_key)
13247            .cloned()
13248            .expect("route should be stored for sender");
13249        assert_eq!(route.model_provider, "openrouter.default");
13250        assert_eq!(route.model, "default-model");
13251
13252        assert_eq!(
13253            agent_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
13254            0
13255        );
13256        assert_eq!(alt_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 0);
13257    }
13258
13259    #[tokio::test]
13260    async fn process_channel_message_uses_route_override_provider_and_model() {
13261        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
13262        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
13263
13264        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
13265        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
13266
13267        let agent_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
13268        let agent_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = agent_model_provider_impl.clone();
13269        let routed_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
13270        let routed_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = routed_model_provider_impl.clone();
13271
13272        let mut provider_cache_seed: HashMap<String, Arc<dyn ModelProvider>> = HashMap::new();
13273        provider_cache_seed.insert(
13274            "test-provider".to_string(),
13275            Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
13276        );
13277        provider_cache_seed.insert("openrouter".to_string(), routed_model_provider);
13278
13279        let route_key = "telegram_chat-1_alice".to_string();
13280        let mut route_overrides = HashMap::new();
13281        route_overrides.insert(
13282            route_key,
13283            ChannelRouteSelection {
13284                model_provider: "openrouter".into(),
13285                model: "route-model".to_string(),
13286                api_key: None,
13287            },
13288        );
13289
13290        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
13291            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
13292            model_provider: Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
13293            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
13294            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
13295            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
13296            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13297            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
13298                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
13299                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13300                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
13301                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
13302                ),
13303            ),
13304            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
13305            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
13306            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
13307            model: Arc::new("default-model".to_string()),
13308            temperature: Some(0.0),
13309            auto_save_memory: false,
13310            max_tool_iterations: 5,
13311            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
13312            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
13313                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
13314            ))),
13315            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
13316            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(provider_cache_seed)),
13317            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(route_overrides)),
13318            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
13319            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
13320            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
13321            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
13322            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
13323            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
13324                telegram: false,
13325                slack: false,
13326                discord: false,
13327                mattermost: false,
13328                matrix: false,
13329                whatsapp: false,
13330            },
13331            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
13332            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
13333            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
13334            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
13335            hooks: None,
13336            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13337            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
13338            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13339            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13340            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
13341            ack_reactions: true,
13342            show_tool_calls: true,
13343            session_store: None,
13344            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
13345                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
13346            )),
13347            activated_tools: None,
13348            cost_tracking: None,
13349            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
13350            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
13351            context_token_budget: 0,
13352            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
13353                Duration::ZERO,
13354            )),
13355            receipt_generator: None,
13356            show_receipts_in_response: false,
13357            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13358            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13359        });
13360
13361        process_channel_message(
13362            runtime_ctx,
13363            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
13364                id: "msg-routed-1".to_string(),
13365                sender: "alice".to_string(),
13366                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
13367                content: "hello routed model_provider".to_string(),
13368                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
13369                channel_alias: None,
13370                timestamp: 2,
13371                thread_ts: None,
13372                interruption_scope_id: None,
13373                attachments: vec![],
13374                subject: None,
13375            },
13376            CancellationToken::new(),
13377        )
13378        .await;
13379
13380        assert_eq!(
13381            agent_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
13382            0
13383        );
13384        assert_eq!(
13385            routed_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
13386            1
13387        );
13388        assert_eq!(
13389            routed_model_provider_impl
13390                .models
13391                .lock()
13392                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
13393                .as_slice(),
13394            &["route-model".to_string()]
13395        );
13396    }
13397
13398    #[tokio::test]
13399    async fn process_channel_message_uses_classifier_provider_for_precheck_model_selection() {
13400        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
13401        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
13402        let main_provider_impl = Arc::new(PrecheckProbeModelProvider::default());
13403        let main_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = main_provider_impl.clone();
13404        let classifier_provider_impl = Arc::new(PrecheckProbeModelProvider::default());
13405        let classifier_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = classifier_provider_impl.clone();
13406        let mut prompt_config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
13407        prompt_config.providers.models.openai.insert(
13408            "my-classifier".to_string(),
13409            zeroclaw_config::schema::OpenAIModelProviderConfig {
13410                base: zeroclaw_config::schema::ModelProviderConfig {
13411                    model: Some("fast-intent".to_string()),
13412                    temperature: Some(0.0),
13413                    ..Default::default()
13414                },
13415            },
13416        );
13417        let agent_cfg = zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig {
13418            classifier_provider: zeroclaw_config::providers::ModelProviderRef::from(
13419                "openai.my-classifier",
13420            ),
13421            ..Default::default()
13422        };
13423        let runtime_ctx = test_runtime_ctx_with_config_agent_and_provider_ref(
13424            channel,
13425            main_provider,
13426            prompt_config,
13427            agent_cfg,
13428            "test-provider",
13429        );
13430        runtime_ctx
13431            .provider_cache
13432            .lock()
13433            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
13434            .insert("openai.my-classifier".to_string(), classifier_provider);
13435
13436        process_channel_message(
13437            runtime_ctx,
13438            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
13439                id: "msg-classifier-provider".to_string(),
13440                sender: "alice".to_string(),
13441                reply_target: "chat-precheck".to_string(),
13442                content: "background chatter".to_string(),
13443                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
13444                channel_alias: None,
13445                timestamp: 1,
13446                thread_ts: None,
13447                interruption_scope_id: None,
13448                attachments: vec![],
13449                subject: None,
13450            },
13451            CancellationToken::new(),
13452        )
13453        .await;
13454
13455        assert_eq!(
13456            classifier_provider_impl
13457                .precheck_calls
13458                .load(Ordering::SeqCst),
13459            1
13460        );
13461        assert_eq!(
13462            classifier_provider_impl.main_calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
13463            0
13464        );
13465        assert_eq!(main_provider_impl.precheck_calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 0);
13466        assert_eq!(main_provider_impl.main_calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 0);
13467        let models = classifier_provider_impl
13468            .models
13469            .lock()
13470            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
13471            .clone();
13472        assert_eq!(models.as_slice(), ["fast-intent"]);
13473        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
13474        assert!(
13475            sent_messages.is_empty(),
13476            "provider returns NO_REPLY from precheck, so no visible reply should be sent"
13477        );
13478    }
13479
13480    #[tokio::test]
13481    async fn process_channel_message_prefers_cached_default_provider_instance() {
13482        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
13483        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
13484
13485        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
13486        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
13487
13488        let startup_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
13489        let startup_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = startup_model_provider_impl.clone();
13490        let reloaded_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
13491        let reloaded_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = reloaded_model_provider_impl.clone();
13492
13493        let mut provider_cache_seed: HashMap<String, Arc<dyn ModelProvider>> = HashMap::new();
13494        provider_cache_seed.insert("test-provider".to_string(), reloaded_model_provider);
13495
13496        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
13497            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
13498            model_provider: Arc::clone(&startup_model_provider),
13499            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
13500            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
13501            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
13502            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13503            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
13504                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
13505                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13506                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
13507                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
13508                ),
13509            ),
13510            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
13511            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
13512            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
13513            model: Arc::new("default-model".to_string()),
13514            temperature: Some(0.0),
13515            auto_save_memory: false,
13516            max_tool_iterations: 5,
13517            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
13518            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
13519                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
13520            ))),
13521            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
13522            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(provider_cache_seed)),
13523            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13524            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
13525            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
13526            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
13527            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
13528            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
13529            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
13530                telegram: false,
13531                slack: false,
13532                discord: false,
13533                mattermost: false,
13534                matrix: false,
13535                whatsapp: false,
13536            },
13537            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
13538            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
13539            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
13540            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
13541            hooks: None,
13542            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13543            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
13544            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13545            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13546            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
13547            ack_reactions: true,
13548            show_tool_calls: true,
13549            session_store: None,
13550            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
13551                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
13552            )),
13553            activated_tools: None,
13554            cost_tracking: None,
13555            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
13556            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
13557            context_token_budget: 0,
13558            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
13559                Duration::ZERO,
13560            )),
13561            receipt_generator: None,
13562            show_receipts_in_response: false,
13563            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13564            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13565        });
13566
13567        process_channel_message(
13568            runtime_ctx,
13569            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
13570                id: "msg-default-provider-cache".to_string(),
13571                sender: "alice".to_string(),
13572                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
13573                content: "hello cached default model_provider".to_string(),
13574                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
13575                channel_alias: None,
13576                timestamp: 3,
13577                thread_ts: None,
13578                interruption_scope_id: None,
13579                attachments: vec![],
13580                subject: None,
13581            },
13582            CancellationToken::new(),
13583        )
13584        .await;
13585    }
13586
13587    #[tokio::test]
13588    async fn process_channel_message_respects_configured_max_tool_iterations_above_default() {
13589        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
13590        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
13591
13592        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
13593        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
13594
13595        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
13596            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
13597            model_provider: Arc::new(IterativeToolModelProvider {
13598                required_tool_iterations: 11,
13599            }),
13600            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
13601            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
13602            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
13603            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13604            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
13605                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
13606                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13607                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
13608                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
13609                ),
13610            ),
13611            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
13612            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
13613            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
13614            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
13615            temperature: Some(0.0),
13616            auto_save_memory: false,
13617            max_tool_iterations: 12,
13618            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
13619            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
13620                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
13621            ))),
13622            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
13623            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13624            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13625            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
13626            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
13627            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
13628            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
13629            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
13630            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
13631                telegram: false,
13632                slack: false,
13633                discord: false,
13634                mattermost: false,
13635                matrix: false,
13636                whatsapp: false,
13637            },
13638            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
13639            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
13640            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
13641            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
13642            hooks: None,
13643            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13644            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
13645            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13646            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13647            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
13648            ack_reactions: true,
13649            show_tool_calls: true,
13650            session_store: None,
13651            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
13652                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
13653            )),
13654            activated_tools: None,
13655            cost_tracking: None,
13656            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig {
13657                loop_detection_enabled: false,
13658                ..zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default()
13659            },
13660            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
13661            context_token_budget: 0,
13662            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
13663                Duration::ZERO,
13664            )),
13665            receipt_generator: None,
13666            show_receipts_in_response: false,
13667            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13668            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13669        });
13670
13671        process_channel_message(
13672            runtime_ctx,
13673            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
13674                id: "msg-iter-success".to_string(),
13675                sender: "alice".to_string(),
13676                reply_target: "chat-iter-success".to_string(),
13677                content: "Loop until done".to_string(),
13678                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
13679                channel_alias: None,
13680                timestamp: 1,
13681                thread_ts: None,
13682                interruption_scope_id: None,
13683                attachments: vec![],
13684                subject: None,
13685            },
13686            CancellationToken::new(),
13687        )
13688        .await;
13689
13690        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
13691        assert!(!sent_messages.is_empty());
13692        let reply = sent_messages.last().unwrap();
13693        assert!(reply.starts_with("chat-iter-success:"));
13694        assert!(reply.contains("Completed after 11 tool iterations."));
13695        assert!(!reply.contains("⚠️ Error:"));
13696    }
13697
13698    #[tokio::test]
13699    async fn process_channel_message_reports_configured_max_tool_iterations_limit() {
13700        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
13701        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
13702
13703        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
13704        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
13705
13706        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
13707            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
13708            model_provider: Arc::new(IterativeToolModelProvider {
13709                required_tool_iterations: 20,
13710            }),
13711            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
13712            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
13713            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
13714            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13715            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
13716                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
13717                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
13718                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
13719                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
13720                ),
13721            ),
13722            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)]),
13723            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
13724            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
13725            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
13726            temperature: Some(0.0),
13727            auto_save_memory: false,
13728            max_tool_iterations: 3,
13729            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
13730            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
13731                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
13732            ))),
13733            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
13734            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13735            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
13736            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
13737            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
13738            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
13739            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
13740            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
13741            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
13742                telegram: false,
13743                slack: false,
13744                discord: false,
13745                mattermost: false,
13746                matrix: false,
13747                whatsapp: false,
13748            },
13749            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
13750            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
13751            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
13752            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
13753            hooks: None,
13754            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13755            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
13756            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13757            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
13758            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
13759            ack_reactions: true,
13760            show_tool_calls: true,
13761            session_store: None,
13762            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
13763                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
13764            )),
13765            activated_tools: None,
13766            cost_tracking: None,
13767            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig {
13768                loop_detection_enabled: false,
13769                ..zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default()
13770            },
13771            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
13772            context_token_budget: 0,
13773            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
13774                Duration::ZERO,
13775            )),
13776            receipt_generator: None,
13777            show_receipts_in_response: false,
13778            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13779            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
13780        });
13781
13782        process_channel_message(
13783            runtime_ctx,
13784            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
13785                id: "msg-iter-fail".to_string(),
13786                sender: "bob".to_string(),
13787                reply_target: "chat-iter-fail".to_string(),
13788                content: "Loop forever".to_string(),
13789                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
13790                channel_alias: None,
13791                timestamp: 2,
13792                thread_ts: None,
13793                interruption_scope_id: None,
13794                attachments: vec![],
13795                subject: None,
13796            },
13797            CancellationToken::new(),
13798        )
13799        .await;
13800
13801        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
13802        assert!(!sent_messages.is_empty());
13803        let reply = sent_messages.last().unwrap();
13804        assert!(reply.starts_with("chat-iter-fail:"));
13805        // After Phase 9, the agent attempts a graceful summary instead of erroring.
13806        // The mock model_provider returns a tool call payload as text, which the agent
13807        // returns as its "summary". The key invariant: the loop terminates and
13808        // produces a response (not hanging forever).
13809        assert!(
13810            reply.contains("⚠️ Error: Agent exceeded maximum tool iterations (3)")
13811                || reply.len() > "chat-iter-fail:".len(),
13812            "Expected either an error message or a graceful summary response"
13813        );
13814    }
13815
13816    struct NoopMemory;
13817
13818    #[async_trait::async_trait]
13819    impl Memory for NoopMemory {
13820        fn name(&self) -> &str {
13821            "noop"
13822        }
13823
13824        async fn store(
13825            &self,
13826            _key: &str,
13827            _content: &str,
13828            _category: zeroclaw_memory::MemoryCategory,
13829            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13830        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
13831            Ok(())
13832        }
13833
13834        async fn recall(
13835            &self,
13836            _query: &str,
13837            _limit: usize,
13838            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13839            _since: Option<&str>,
13840            _until: Option<&str>,
13841        ) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
13842            Ok(Vec::new())
13843        }
13844
13845        async fn get(&self, _key: &str) -> anyhow::Result<Option<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
13846            Ok(None)
13847        }
13848
13849        async fn list(
13850            &self,
13851            _category: Option<&zeroclaw_memory::MemoryCategory>,
13852            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13853        ) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
13854            Ok(Vec::new())
13855        }
13856
13857        async fn forget(&self, _key: &str) -> anyhow::Result<bool> {
13858            Ok(false)
13859        }
13860
13861        async fn forget_for_agent(&self, _key: &str, _agent_id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<bool> {
13862            Ok(false)
13863        }
13864
13865        async fn count(&self) -> anyhow::Result<usize> {
13866            Ok(0)
13867        }
13868
13869        async fn health_check(&self) -> bool {
13870            true
13871        }
13872
13873        async fn store_with_agent(
13874            &self,
13875            _key: &str,
13876            _content: &str,
13877            _category: zeroclaw_memory::MemoryCategory,
13878            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13879            _namespace: Option<&str>,
13880            _importance: Option<f64>,
13881            _agent_id: Option<&str>,
13882        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
13883            Ok(())
13884        }
13885
13886        async fn recall_for_agents(
13887            &self,
13888            _allowed_agent_ids: &[&str],
13889            _query: &str,
13890            _limit: usize,
13891            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13892            _since: Option<&str>,
13893            _until: Option<&str>,
13894        ) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
13895            Ok(Vec::new())
13896        }
13897    }
13898    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for NoopMemory {
13899        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
13900            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Memory(
13901                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::MemoryKind::InMemory,
13902            )
13903        }
13904        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
13905            "NoopMemory"
13906        }
13907    }
13908
13909    struct RecallMemory;
13910
13911    #[async_trait::async_trait]
13912    impl Memory for RecallMemory {
13913        fn name(&self) -> &str {
13914            "recall-memory"
13915        }
13916
13917        async fn store(
13918            &self,
13919            _key: &str,
13920            _content: &str,
13921            _category: zeroclaw_memory::MemoryCategory,
13922            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13923        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
13924            Ok(())
13925        }
13926
13927        async fn recall(
13928            &self,
13929            _query: &str,
13930            _limit: usize,
13931            _session_id: Option<&str>,

13933            _until: Option<&str>,
13934        ) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
