13943                namespace: "default".into(),
13944                importance: None,
13945                superseded_by: None,
13946                agent_alias: None,
13947                agent_id: None,
13948            }])
13949        }
13950
13951        async fn get(&self, _key: &str) -> anyhow::Result<Option<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
13952            Ok(None)
13953        }
13954
13955        async fn list(
13956            &self,
13957            _category: Option<&zeroclaw_memory::MemoryCategory>,
13958            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13959        ) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
13960            Ok(Vec::new())
13961        }
13962
13963        async fn forget(&self, _key: &str) -> anyhow::Result<bool> {
13964            Ok(false)
13965        }
13966
13967        async fn forget_for_agent(&self, _key: &str, _agent_id: &str) -> anyhow::Result<bool> {
13968            Ok(false)
13969        }
13970
13971        async fn count(&self) -> anyhow::Result<usize> {
13972            Ok(1)
13973        }
13974
13975        async fn health_check(&self) -> bool {
13976            true
13977        }
13978
13979        async fn store_with_agent(
13980            &self,
13981            _key: &str,
13982            _content: &str,
13983            _category: zeroclaw_memory::MemoryCategory,
13984            _session_id: Option<&str>,
13985            _namespace: Option<&str>,
13986            _importance: Option<f64>,
13987            _agent_id: Option<&str>,
13988        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
13989            Ok(())
13990        }
13991
13992        async fn recall_for_agents(
13993            &self,
13994            _allowed_agent_ids: &[&str],
13995            query: &str,
13996            limit: usize,
13997            session_id: Option<&str>,
13998            since: Option<&str>,
13999            until: Option<&str>,
14000        ) -> anyhow::Result<Vec<zeroclaw_memory::MemoryEntry>> {
14001            self.recall(query, limit, session_id, since, until).await
14002        }
14003    }
14004    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for RecallMemory {
14005        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
14006            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Memory(
14007                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::MemoryKind::InMemory,
14008            )
14009        }
14010        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
14011            "RecallMemory"
14012        }
14013    }
14014
14015    /// Model provider used by `message_dispatch_processes_messages_in_parallel`
14016    /// to observe concurrent in-flight calls directly instead of inferring
14017    /// parallelism from wall-clock elapsed time.
14018    ///
14019    /// Each `chat_with_system` invocation increments `in_flight` on entry,
14020    /// records the running peak into `peak_in_flight`, then decrements on
14021    /// exit. After the dispatch loop returns, the test asserts
14022    /// `peak_in_flight >= 2`, which directly proves two messages were being
14023    /// processed at the same time. This replaces the original
14024    /// `elapsed < 700ms` assertion (issue #6813), which flaked on slow
14025    /// runners because it depended on machine speed rather than on
14026    /// observable concurrency.
14027    struct ConcurrencyTrackingProvider {
14028        delay: Duration,
14029        in_flight: Arc<AtomicUsize>,
14030        peak_in_flight: Arc<AtomicUsize>,
14031    }
14032
14033    #[async_trait::async_trait]
14034    impl ModelProvider for ConcurrencyTrackingProvider {
14035        async fn chat_with_system(
14036            &self,
14037            _system_prompt: Option<&str>,
14038            message: &str,
14039            _model: &str,
14040            _temperature: Option<f64>,
14041        ) -> anyhow::Result<String> {
14042            let current = self.in_flight.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst) + 1;
14043            self.peak_in_flight.fetch_max(current, Ordering::SeqCst);
14044            tokio::time::sleep(self.delay).await;
14045            self.in_flight.fetch_sub(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
14046            Ok(format!("echo: {message}"))
14047        }
14048    }
14049
14050    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for ConcurrencyTrackingProvider {
14051        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
14052            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Provider(
14053                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ProviderKind::Model(
14054                    ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ModelProviderKind::Custom,
14055                ),
14056            )
14057        }
14058        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
14059            "ConcurrencyTrackingProvider"
14060        }
14061    }
14062
14063    #[tokio::test]
14064    async fn message_dispatch_processes_messages_in_parallel() {
14065        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
14066        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
14067
14068        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
14069        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
14070
14071        let in_flight = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
14072        let peak_in_flight = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
14073
14074        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
14075            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
14076            model_provider: Arc::new(ConcurrencyTrackingProvider {
14077                delay: Duration::from_millis(250),
14078                in_flight: in_flight.clone(),
14079                peak_in_flight: peak_in_flight.clone(),
14080            }),
14081            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
14082            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
14083            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
14084            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14085            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
14086                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
14087                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14088                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
14089                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
14090                ),
14091            ),
14092            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
14093            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
14094            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
14095            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
14096            temperature: Some(0.0),
14097            auto_save_memory: false,
14098            max_tool_iterations: 10,
14099            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
14100            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
14101                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
14102            ))),
14103            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
14104            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14105            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14106            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
14107            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
14108            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
14109            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
14110            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
14111            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
14112                telegram: false,
14113                slack: false,
14114                discord: false,
14115                mattermost: false,
14116                matrix: false,
14117                whatsapp: false,
14118            },
14119            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
14120            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
14121            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
14122            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
14123            hooks: None,
14124            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14125            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
14126            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14127            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14128            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
14129            ack_reactions: true,
14130            show_tool_calls: true,
14131            session_store: None,
14132            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
14133                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
14134            )),
14135            activated_tools: None,
14136            cost_tracking: None,
14137            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
14138            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
14139            context_token_budget: 0,
14140            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
14141                Duration::ZERO,
14142            )),
14143            receipt_generator: None,
14144            show_receipts_in_response: false,
14145            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14146            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14147        });
14148
14149        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(4);
14150        tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14151            id: "1".to_string(),
14152            sender: "alice".to_string(),
14153            reply_target: "alice".to_string(),
14154            content: "hello".to_string(),
14155            channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
14156            channel_alias: None,
14157            timestamp: 1,
14158            thread_ts: None,
14159            interruption_scope_id: None,
14160            attachments: vec![],
14161            subject: None,
14162        })
14163        .await
14164        .unwrap();
14165        tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14166            id: "2".to_string(),
14167            sender: "bob".to_string(),
14168            reply_target: "bob".to_string(),
14169            content: "world".to_string(),
14170            channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
14171            channel_alias: None,
14172            timestamp: 2,
14173            thread_ts: None,
14174            interruption_scope_id: None,
14175            attachments: vec![],
14176            subject: None,
14177        })
14178        .await
14179        .unwrap();
14180        drop(tx);
14181
14182        run_message_dispatch_loop(rx, AgentRouter::single(runtime_ctx), 2).await;
14183
14184        // Deterministic concurrency check: the dispatcher should have processed
14185        // both messages in parallel, so the peak number of simultaneously
14186        // in-flight model calls must reach at least 2. This observes parallelism
14187        // directly rather than inferring it from wall-clock elapsed time, which
14188        // flaked on slow runners (issue #6813).
14189        let peak = peak_in_flight.load(Ordering::SeqCst);
14190        assert!(
14191            peak >= 2,
14192            "expected at least 2 concurrent in-flight dispatches, got peak {}",
14193            peak
14194        );
14195        assert_eq!(
14196            in_flight.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
14197            0,
14198            "all in-flight dispatches should have completed",
14199        );
14200
14201        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
14202        assert_eq!(sent_messages.len(), 2);
14203    }
14204
14205    #[tokio::test]
14206    async fn message_dispatch_interrupts_in_flight_telegram_request_and_preserves_context() {
14207        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
14208        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
14209
14210        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
14211        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
14212
14213        let provider_impl = Arc::new(DelayedHistoryCaptureModelProvider {
14214            delay: Duration::from_millis(250),
14215            calls: std::sync::Mutex::new(Vec::new()),
14216        });
14217
14218        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
14219            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
14220            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
14221            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
14222            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
14223            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
14224            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14225            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
14226                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
14227                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14228                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
14229                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
14230                ),
14231            ),
14232            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
14233            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
14234            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
14235            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
14236            temperature: Some(0.0),
14237            auto_save_memory: false,
14238            max_tool_iterations: 10,
14239            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
14240            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
14241                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
14242            ))),
14243            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
14244            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14245            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14246            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
14247            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
14248            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
14249            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
14250            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
14251            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
14252                telegram: true,
14253                slack: false,
14254                discord: false,
14255                mattermost: false,
14256                matrix: false,
14257                whatsapp: false,
14258            },
14259            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
14260            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
14261            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
14262            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
14263            hooks: None,
14264            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14265            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
14266            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14267            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14268            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
14269            ack_reactions: true,
14270            show_tool_calls: true,
14271            session_store: None,
14272            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
14273                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
14274            )),
14275            activated_tools: None,
14276            cost_tracking: None,
14277            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
14278            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
14279            context_token_budget: 0,
14280            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
14281                Duration::ZERO,
14282            )),
14283            receipt_generator: None,
14284            show_receipts_in_response: false,
14285            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14286            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14287        });
14288
14289        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(8);
14290        let send_task = zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
14291            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14292                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
14293                sender: "alice".to_string(),
14294                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
14295                content: "forwarded content".to_string(),
14296                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
14297                channel_alias: None,
14298                timestamp: 1,
14299                thread_ts: None,
14300                interruption_scope_id: None,
14301                attachments: vec![],
14302                subject: None,
14303            })
14304            .await
14305            .unwrap();
14306            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(40)).await;
14307            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14308                id: "msg-2".to_string(),
14309                sender: "alice".to_string(),
14310                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
14311                content: "summarize this".to_string(),
14312                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
14313                channel_alias: None,
14314                timestamp: 2,
14315                thread_ts: None,
14316                interruption_scope_id: None,
14317                attachments: vec![],
14318                subject: None,
14319            })
14320            .await
14321            .unwrap();
14322        });
14323
14324        run_message_dispatch_loop(rx, AgentRouter::single(runtime_ctx), 4).await;
14325        send_task.await.unwrap();
14326
14327        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
14328        assert_eq!(sent_messages.len(), 1);
14329        assert!(sent_messages[0].starts_with("chat-1:"));
14330        assert!(sent_messages[0].contains("response-2"));
14331        drop(sent_messages);
14332
14333        let calls = provider_impl
14334            .calls
14335            .lock()
14336            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
14337        assert_eq!(calls.len(), 2);
14338        let second_call = &calls[1];
14339        assert!(
14340            second_call
14341                .iter()
14342                .any(|(role, content)| { role == "user" && content.contains("forwarded content") })
14343        );
14344        assert!(
14345            second_call
14346                .iter()
14347                .any(|(role, content)| { role == "user" && content.contains("summarize this") })
14348        );
14349        assert!(
14350            !second_call.iter().any(|(role, _)| role == "assistant"),
14351            "cancelled turn should not persist an assistant response"
14352        );
14353    }
14354
14355    #[tokio::test]
14356    async fn message_dispatch_interrupts_in_flight_slack_request_and_preserves_context() {
14357        let channel_impl = Arc::new(SlackRecordingChannel::default());
14358        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
14359
14360        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
14361        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
14362
14363        let provider_impl = Arc::new(DelayedHistoryCaptureModelProvider {
14364            delay: Duration::from_millis(250),
14365            calls: std::sync::Mutex::new(Vec::new()),
14366        });
14367
14368        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
14369            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
14370            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
14371            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
14372            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
14373            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
14374            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14375            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
14376                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
14377                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14378                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
14379                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
14380                ),
14381            ),
14382            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
14383            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
14384            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
14385            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
14386            temperature: Some(0.0),
14387            auto_save_memory: false,
14388            max_tool_iterations: 10,
14389            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
14390            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
14391                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
14392            ))),
14393            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
14394            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14395            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14396            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
14397            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
14398            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
14399            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
14400            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
14401            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
14402                telegram: false,
14403                slack: true,
14404                discord: false,
14405                mattermost: false,
14406                matrix: false,
14407                whatsapp: false,
14408            },
14409            ack_reactions: true,
14410            show_tool_calls: true,
14411            session_store: None,
14412            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
14413            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
14414            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
14415            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
14416            hooks: None,
14417            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14418            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
14419            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14420            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14421            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
14422                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
14423            )),
14424            activated_tools: None,
14425            cost_tracking: None,
14426            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
14427            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
14428            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
14429            context_token_budget: 0,
14430            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
14431                Duration::ZERO,
14432            )),
14433            receipt_generator: None,
14434            show_receipts_in_response: false,
14435            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14436            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14437        });
14438
14439        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(8);
14440        let send_task = zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
14441            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14442                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
14443                sender: "U123".to_string(),
14444                reply_target: "C123".to_string(),
14445                content: "first question".to_string(),
14446                channel: "slack".to_string(),
14447                channel_alias: None,
14448                timestamp: 1,
14449                thread_ts: Some("1741234567.100001".to_string()),
14450                interruption_scope_id: Some("1741234567.100001".to_string()),
14451                attachments: vec![],
14452                subject: None,
14453            })
14454            .await
14455            .unwrap();
14456            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(40)).await;
14457            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14458                id: "msg-2".to_string(),
14459                sender: "U123".to_string(),
14460                reply_target: "C123".to_string(),
14461                content: "second question".to_string(),
14462                channel: "slack".to_string(),
14463                channel_alias: None,
14464                timestamp: 2,
14465                thread_ts: Some("1741234567.100001".to_string()),
14466                interruption_scope_id: Some("1741234567.100001".to_string()),
14467                attachments: vec![],
14468                subject: None,
14469            })
14470            .await
14471            .unwrap();
14472        });
14473
14474        run_message_dispatch_loop(rx, AgentRouter::single(runtime_ctx), 4).await;
14475        send_task.await.unwrap();
14476
14477        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
14478        assert_eq!(sent_messages.len(), 1);
14479        assert!(sent_messages[0].starts_with("C123:"));
14480        assert!(sent_messages[0].contains("response-2"));
14481        drop(sent_messages);
14482
14483        let calls = provider_impl
14484            .calls
14485            .lock()
14486            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
14487        assert_eq!(calls.len(), 2);
14488        let second_call = &calls[1];
14489        assert!(
14490            second_call
14491                .iter()
14492                .any(|(role, content)| { role == "user" && content.contains("first question") })
14493        );
14494        assert!(
14495            second_call
14496                .iter()
14497                .any(|(role, content)| { role == "user" && content.contains("second question") })
14498        );
14499        assert!(
14500            !second_call.iter().any(|(role, _)| role == "assistant"),
14501            "cancelled turn should not persist an assistant response"
14502        );
14503    }
14504
14505    #[tokio::test]
14506    async fn message_dispatch_interrupts_in_flight_whatsapp_request_and_preserves_context() {
14507        let channel_impl = Arc::new(WhatsAppRecordingChannel::default());
14508        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
14509
14510        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
14511        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
14512
14513        let provider_impl = Arc::new(DelayedHistoryCaptureModelProvider {
14514            delay: Duration::from_millis(250),
14515            calls: std::sync::Mutex::new(Vec::new()),
14516        });
14517
14518        let mut channel_config = zeroclaw_config::schema::ChannelsConfig::default();
14519        channel_config.whatsapp.insert(
14520            "default".to_string(),
14521            zeroclaw_config::schema::WhatsAppConfig {
14522                session_path: Some("/tmp/zeroclaw-whatsapp-session.db".into()),
14523                interrupt_on_new_message: true,
14524                ..Default::default()
14525            },
14526        );
14527
14528        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
14529            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
14530            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
14531            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
14532            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
14533            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
14534            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14535            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
14536                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
14537                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14538                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
14539                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
14540                ),
14541            ),
14542            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
14543            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
14544            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
14545            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
14546            temperature: Some(0.0),
14547            auto_save_memory: false,
14548            max_tool_iterations: 10,
14549            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
14550            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
14551                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
14552            ))),
14553            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
14554            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14555            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14556            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
14557            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
14558            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
14559            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
14560            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
14561            interrupt_on_new_message: interrupt_on_new_message_config(&channel_config),
14562            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
14563            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
14564            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
14565            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
14566            hooks: None,
14567            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14568            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
14569            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14570            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14571            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
14572            ack_reactions: true,
14573            show_tool_calls: true,
14574            session_store: None,
14575            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
14576                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
14577            )),
14578            activated_tools: None,
14579            cost_tracking: None,
14580            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
14581            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
14582            context_token_budget: 0,
14583            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
14584                Duration::ZERO,
14585            )),
14586            receipt_generator: None,
14587            show_receipts_in_response: false,
14588            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14589            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14590        });
14591
14592        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(8);
14593        let send_task = zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
14594            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14595                id: "msg-1".to_string(),
14596                sender: "15555550123".to_string(),
14597                reply_target: "15555550123".to_string(),
14598                content: "first WhatsApp question".to_string(),
14599                channel: "whatsapp".to_string(),
14600                channel_alias: Some("default".to_string()),
14601                timestamp: 1,
14602                thread_ts: None,
14603                interruption_scope_id: None,
14604                attachments: vec![],
14605                subject: None,
14606            })
14607            .await
14608            .unwrap();
14609            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(40)).await;
14610            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14611                id: "msg-2".to_string(),
14612                sender: "15555550123".to_string(),
14613                reply_target: "15555550123".to_string(),
14614                content: "second WhatsApp question".to_string(),
14615                channel: "whatsapp".to_string(),
14616                channel_alias: Some("default".to_string()),
14617                timestamp: 2,
14618                thread_ts: None,
14619                interruption_scope_id: None,
14620                attachments: vec![],
14621                subject: None,
14622            })
14623            .await
14624            .unwrap();
14625        });
14626
14627        run_message_dispatch_loop(rx, AgentRouter::single(runtime_ctx), 4).await;
14628        send_task.await.unwrap();
14629
14630        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
14631        assert_eq!(sent_messages.len(), 1);
14632        assert!(sent_messages[0].starts_with("15555550123:"));
14633        assert!(sent_messages[0].contains("response-2"));
14634        drop(sent_messages);
14635
14636        let calls = provider_impl
14637            .calls
14638            .lock()
14639            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
14640        assert_eq!(calls.len(), 2);
14641        let second_call = &calls[1];
14642        assert!(second_call.iter().any(|(role, content)| {
14643            role == "user" && content.contains("first WhatsApp question")
14644        }));
14645        assert!(second_call.iter().any(|(role, content)| {
14646            role == "user" && content.contains("second WhatsApp question")
14647        }));
14648        assert!(
14649            !second_call.iter().any(|(role, _)| role == "assistant"),
14650            "cancelled turn should not persist an assistant response"
14651        );
14652    }
14653
14654    #[tokio::test]
14655    async fn message_dispatch_interrupt_scope_is_same_sender_same_chat() {
14656        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
14657        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
14658
14659        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
14660        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
14661
14662        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
14663            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
14664            model_provider: Arc::new(SlowModelProvider {
14665                delay: Duration::from_millis(180),
14666            }),
14667            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
14668            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
14669            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
14670            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14671            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
14672                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
14673                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14674                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
14675                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
14676                ),
14677            ),
14678            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
14679            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
14680            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
14681            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
14682            temperature: Some(0.0),
14683            auto_save_memory: false,
14684            max_tool_iterations: 10,
14685            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
14686            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
14687                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
14688            ))),
14689            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
14690            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14691            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14692            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
14693            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
14694            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
14695            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
14696            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
14697            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
14698                telegram: true,
14699                slack: false,
14700                discord: false,
14701                mattermost: false,
14702                matrix: false,
14703                whatsapp: false,
14704            },
14705            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
14706            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
14707            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
14708            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
14709            hooks: None,
14710            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14711            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
14712            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14713            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14714            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
14715            ack_reactions: true,
14716            show_tool_calls: true,
14717            session_store: None,
14718            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
14719                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
14720            )),
14721            activated_tools: None,
14722            cost_tracking: None,
14723            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
14724            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
14725            context_token_budget: 0,
14726            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
14727                Duration::ZERO,
14728            )),
14729            receipt_generator: None,
14730            show_receipts_in_response: false,
14731            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14732            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14733        });
14734
14735        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(8);
14736        let send_task = zeroclaw_spawn::spawn!(async move {
14737            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14738                id: "msg-a".to_string(),
14739                sender: "alice".to_string(),
14740                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
14741                content: "first chat".to_string(),
14742                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
14743                channel_alias: None,
14744                timestamp: 1,
14745                thread_ts: None,
14746                interruption_scope_id: None,
14747                attachments: vec![],
14748                subject: None,
14749            })
14750            .await
14751            .unwrap();
14752            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(30)).await;
14753            tx.send(zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14754                id: "msg-b".to_string(),
14755                sender: "alice".to_string(),
14756                reply_target: "chat-2".to_string(),
14757                content: "second chat".to_string(),
14758                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
14759                channel_alias: None,
14760                timestamp: 2,
14761                thread_ts: None,
14762                interruption_scope_id: None,
14763                attachments: vec![],
14764                subject: None,
14765            })
14766            .await
14767            .unwrap();
14768        });
14769
14770        run_message_dispatch_loop(rx, AgentRouter::single(runtime_ctx), 4).await;
14771        send_task.await.unwrap();
14772
14773        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
14774        assert_eq!(sent_messages.len(), 2);
14775        assert!(sent_messages.iter().any(|msg| msg.starts_with("chat-1:")));
14776        assert!(sent_messages.iter().any(|msg| msg.starts_with("chat-2:")));
14777    }
14778
14779    #[tokio::test]
14780    async fn process_channel_message_cancels_scoped_typing_task() {
14781        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
14782        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
14783
14784        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
14785        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
14786
14787        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
14788            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
14789            model_provider: Arc::new(SlowModelProvider {
14790                delay: Duration::from_millis(20),
14791            }),
14792            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
14793            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
14794            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
14795            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14796            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
14797                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
14798                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14799                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
14800                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
14801                ),
14802            ),
14803            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
14804            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
14805            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
14806            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
14807            temperature: Some(0.0),
14808            auto_save_memory: false,
14809            max_tool_iterations: 10,
14810            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
14811            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
14812                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
14813            ))),
14814            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
14815            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14816            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14817            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
14818            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
14819            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
14820            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
14821            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
14822            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
14823                telegram: false,
14824                slack: false,
14825                discord: false,
14826                mattermost: false,
14827                matrix: false,
14828                whatsapp: false,
14829            },
14830            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
14831            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
14832            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
14833            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
14834            hooks: None,
14835            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14836            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
14837            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14838            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14839            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
14840            ack_reactions: true,
14841            show_tool_calls: true,
14842            session_store: None,
14843            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
14844                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
14845            )),
14846            activated_tools: None,
14847            cost_tracking: None,
14848            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
14849            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
14850            context_token_budget: 0,
14851            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
14852                Duration::ZERO,
14853            )),
14854            receipt_generator: None,
14855            show_receipts_in_response: false,
14856            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14857            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14858        });
14859
14860        process_channel_message(
14861            runtime_ctx,
14862            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14863                id: "typing-msg".to_string(),
14864                sender: "alice".to_string(),
14865                reply_target: "chat-typing".to_string(),
14866                content: "hello".to_string(),
14867                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
14868                channel_alias: None,
14869                timestamp: 1,
14870                thread_ts: None,
14871                interruption_scope_id: None,
14872                attachments: vec![],
14873                subject: None,
14874            },
14875            CancellationToken::new(),
14876        )
14877        .await;
14878
14879        let starts = channel_impl.start_typing_calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst);
14880        let stops = channel_impl.stop_typing_calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst);
14881        assert_eq!(starts, 1, "start_typing should be called once");
14882        assert_eq!(stops, 1, "stop_typing should be called once");
14883    }
14884
14885    #[tokio::test]
14886    async fn process_channel_message_adds_and_swaps_reactions() {
14887        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
14888        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
14889
14890        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
14891        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
14892
14893        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
14894            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
14895            model_provider: Arc::new(SlowModelProvider {
14896                delay: Duration::from_millis(5),
14897            }),
14898            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
14899            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
14900            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
14901            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14902            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
14903                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
14904                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
14905                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
14906                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
14907                ),
14908            ),
14909            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
14910            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
14911            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
14912            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
14913            temperature: Some(0.0),
14914            auto_save_memory: false,
14915            max_tool_iterations: 10,
14916            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
14917            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
14918                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
14919            ))),
14920            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
14921            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14922            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
14923            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
14924            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
14925            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
14926            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
14927            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
14928            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
14929                telegram: false,
14930                slack: false,
14931                discord: false,
14932                mattermost: false,
14933                matrix: false,
14934                whatsapp: false,
14935            },
14936            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
14937            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
14938            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
14939            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
14940            hooks: None,
14941            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14942            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
14943            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14944            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
14945            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
14946            ack_reactions: true,
14947            show_tool_calls: true,
14948            session_store: None,
14949            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
14950                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
14951            )),
14952            activated_tools: None,
14953            cost_tracking: None,
14954            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
14955            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
14956            context_token_budget: 0,
14957            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
14958                Duration::ZERO,
14959            )),
14960            receipt_generator: None,
14961            show_receipts_in_response: false,
14962            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14963            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
14964        });
14965
14966        process_channel_message(
14967            runtime_ctx,
14968            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
14969                id: "react-msg".to_string(),
14970                sender: "alice".to_string(),
14971                reply_target: "chat-react".to_string(),
14972                content: "hello".to_string(),
14973                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
14974                channel_alias: None,
14975                timestamp: 1,
14976                thread_ts: None,
14977                interruption_scope_id: None,
14978                attachments: vec![],
14979                subject: None,
14980            },
14981            CancellationToken::new(),
14982        )
14983        .await;
14984
14985        let added = channel_impl.reactions_added.lock().await;
14986        assert!(
14987            added.len() >= 2,
14988            "expected at least 2 reactions added (\u{1F440} then \u{2705}), got {}",
14989            added.len()
14990        );
14991        assert_eq!(added[0].2, "\u{1F440}", "first reaction should be eyes");
14992        assert_eq!(
14993            added.last().unwrap().2,
14994            "\u{2705}",
14995            "last reaction should be checkmark"
14996        );
14997
14998        let removed = channel_impl.reactions_removed.lock().await;
14999        assert_eq!(removed.len(), 1, "eyes reaction should be removed once");
15000        assert_eq!(removed[0].2, "\u{1F440}");
15001    }
15002
15003    #[test]
15004    fn prompt_contains_all_sections() {
15005        let ws = make_workspace();
15006        let tools = vec![("shell", "Run commands"), ("file_read", "Read files")];
15007        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "test-model", &tools, &[], None, None);
15008
15009        // Section headers
15010        assert!(prompt.contains("## Tools"), "missing Tools section");
15011        assert!(prompt.contains("## Safety"), "missing Safety section");
15012        assert!(prompt.contains("## Workspace"), "missing Workspace section");
15013        assert!(
15014            prompt.contains("## Project Context"),
15015            "missing Project Context"
15016        );
15017        assert!(prompt.contains("## Current Date"), "missing Date section");
15018        assert!(
15019            !prompt.contains("## Current Date & Time"),
15020            "prompt should use date-only context"
15021        );
15022        assert!(prompt.contains("## Runtime"), "missing Runtime section");
15023    }
15024
15025    #[test]
15026    fn prompt_injects_tools() {
15027        let ws = make_workspace();
15028        let tools = vec![
15029            ("shell", "Run commands"),
15030            ("memory_recall", "Search memory"),
15031        ];
15032        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "gpt-4o", &tools, &[], None, None);
15033
15034        assert!(prompt.contains("**shell**"));
15035        assert!(prompt.contains("Run commands"));
15036        assert!(prompt.contains("**memory_recall**"));
15037    }
15038
15039    #[test]
15040    fn prompt_includes_single_tool_protocol_block_after_append() {
15041        let ws = make_workspace();
15042        let tools = vec![("shell", "Run commands")];
15043        let mut prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "gpt-4o", &tools, &[], None, None);
15044
15045        assert!(
15046            !prompt.contains("## Tool Use Protocol"),
15047            "build_system_prompt should not emit protocol block directly"
15048        );
15049
15050        let tools_registry: Vec<Box<dyn Tool>> = vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)];
15051        prompt.push_str(&build_tool_instructions(&tools_registry));
15052
15053        assert_eq!(
15054            prompt.matches("## Tool Use Protocol").count(),
15055            1,
15056            "protocol block should appear exactly once in the final prompt"
15057        );
15058    }
15059
15060    #[test]
15061    fn channel_strict_non_native_prompt_hides_text_tool_protocol() {
15062        let ws = make_workspace();
15063        let mut tool_descs = vec![("shell", "Run commands")];
15064        let mut deferred_section = "## Deferred MCP Tools\n\n- mcp__example".to_string();
15065
15066        let expose_text_protocol =
15067            apply_text_tool_prompt_policy(false, true, &mut tool_descs, &mut deferred_section);
15068
15069        let mut prompt = build_system_prompt_with_mode_and_autonomy(
15070            ws.path(),
15071            "gpt-4o",
15072            &tool_descs,
15073            &[],
15074            None,
15075            None,
15076            None,
15077            false,
15078            zeroclaw_config::schema::SkillsPromptInjectionMode::Full,
15079            false,
15080            0,
15081            false,
15082        );
15083        if expose_text_protocol {
15084            let tools_registry: Vec<Box<dyn Tool>> = vec![Box::new(MockPriceTool)];
15085            let effective_tool_names: HashSet<&str> =
15086                tools_registry.iter().map(|tool| tool.name()).collect();
15087            prompt.push_str(&build_tool_instructions_for_names(
15088                &tools_registry,
15089                &effective_tool_names,
15090            ));
15091        }
15092        if !deferred_section.is_empty() {
15093            prompt.push('\n');
15094            prompt.push_str(&deferred_section);
15095        }
15096
15097        assert!(!expose_text_protocol);
15098        assert!(!prompt.contains("## Tools"));
15099        assert!(!prompt.contains("## Tool Use Protocol"));
15100        assert!(!prompt.contains("<tool_call>"));
15101        assert!(!prompt.contains("mcp__example"));
15102    }
15103
15104    #[test]
15105    fn prompt_injects_safety() {
15106        let ws = make_workspace();
15107        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15108
15109        assert!(prompt.contains("Do not exfiltrate private data"));
15110        assert!(prompt.contains("Respect the runtime autonomy policy"));
15111        assert!(prompt.contains("Prefer `trash` over `rm`"));
15112    }
15113
15114    #[test]
15115    fn prompt_injects_workspace_files() {
15116        let ws = make_workspace();
15117        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15118
15119        assert!(prompt.contains("### SOUL.md"), "missing SOUL.md header");
15120        assert!(prompt.contains("Be helpful"), "missing SOUL content");
15121        assert!(prompt.contains("### IDENTITY.md"), "missing IDENTITY.md");
15122        assert!(
15123            prompt.contains("Name: ZeroClaw"),
15124            "missing IDENTITY content"
15125        );
15126        assert!(prompt.contains("### USER.md"), "missing USER.md");
15127        assert!(prompt.contains("### AGENTS.md"), "missing AGENTS.md");
15128        assert!(prompt.contains("### TOOLS.md"), "missing TOOLS.md");
15129        // HEARTBEAT.md is intentionally excluded from channel prompts — it's only
15130        // relevant to the heartbeat worker and causes LLMs to emit spurious
15131        // "HEARTBEAT_OK" acknowledgments in channel conversations.
15132        assert!(
15133            !prompt.contains("### HEARTBEAT.md"),
15134            "HEARTBEAT.md should not be in channel prompt"
15135        );
15136        assert!(prompt.contains("### MEMORY.md"), "missing MEMORY.md");
15137        assert!(prompt.contains("User likes Rust"), "missing MEMORY content");
15138    }
15139
15140    #[test]
15141    fn prompt_missing_file_markers() {
15142        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
15143        // Empty workspace — no files at all
15144        let prompt = build_system_prompt(tmp.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15145
15146        assert!(prompt.contains("[File not found: SOUL.md]"));
15147        assert!(prompt.contains("[File not found: AGENTS.md]"));
15148        assert!(prompt.contains("[File not found: IDENTITY.md]"));
15149    }
15150
15151    #[test]
15152    fn prompt_bootstrap_only_if_exists() {
15153        let ws = make_workspace();
15154        // No BOOTSTRAP.md — should not appear
15155        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15156        assert!(
15157            !prompt.contains("### BOOTSTRAP.md"),
15158            "BOOTSTRAP.md should not appear when missing"
15159        );
15160
15161        // Create BOOTSTRAP.md — should appear
15162        std::fs::write(ws.path().join("BOOTSTRAP.md"), "# Bootstrap\nFirst run.").unwrap();
15163        let prompt2 = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15164        assert!(
15165            prompt2.contains("### BOOTSTRAP.md"),
15166            "BOOTSTRAP.md should appear when present"
15167        );
15168        assert!(prompt2.contains("First run"));
15169    }
15170
15171    #[test]
15172    fn prompt_no_daily_memory_injection() {
15173        let ws = make_workspace();
15174        let memory_dir = ws.path().join("memory");
15175        std::fs::create_dir_all(&memory_dir).unwrap();
15176        let today = chrono::Local::now().format("%Y-%m-%d").to_string();
15177        std::fs::write(
15178            memory_dir.join(format!("{today}.md")),
15179            "# Daily\nSome note.",
15180        )
15181        .unwrap();
15182
15183        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15184
15185        // Daily notes should NOT be in the system prompt (on-demand via tools)
15186        assert!(
15187            !prompt.contains("Daily Notes"),
15188            "daily notes should not be auto-injected"
15189        );
15190        assert!(
15191            !prompt.contains("Some note"),
15192            "daily content should not be in prompt"
15193        );
15194    }
15195
15196    #[test]
15197    fn prompt_runtime_metadata() {
15198        let ws = make_workspace();
15199        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "claude-sonnet-4", &[], &[], None, None);
15200
15201        assert!(prompt.contains("Model: claude-sonnet-4"));
15202        assert!(prompt.contains(&format!("OS: {}", std::env::consts::OS)));
15203        assert!(prompt.contains("Host:"));
15204    }
15205
15206    #[test]
15207    fn prompt_skills_include_instructions_and_tools() {
15208        let ws = make_workspace();
15209        let skills = vec![zeroclaw_runtime::skills::Skill {
15210            name: "code-review".into(),
15211            description: "Review code for bugs".into(),
15212            version: "1.0.0".into(),
15213            author: None,
15214            tags: vec![],
15215            tools: vec![zeroclaw_runtime::skills::SkillTool {
15216                name: "lint".into(),
15217                description: "Run static checks".into(),
15218                kind: "shell".into(),
15219                command: "cargo clippy".into(),
15220                args: HashMap::new(),
15221                target: None,
15222                locked_args: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
15223            }],
15224            prompts: vec!["Always run cargo test before final response.".into()],
15225            location: None,
15226        }];
15227
15228        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &skills, None, None);
15229
15230        assert!(prompt.contains("<available_skills>"), "missing skills XML");
15231        assert!(prompt.contains("<name>code-review</name>"));
15232        assert!(prompt.contains("<description>Review code for bugs</description>"));
15233        assert!(prompt.contains("SKILL.md</location>"));
15234        assert!(prompt.contains("<instructions>"));
15235        assert!(
15236            prompt.contains(
15237                "<instruction>Always run cargo test before final response.</instruction>"
15238            )
15239        );
15240        // Registered tools (shell kind) appear under <callable_tools> with prefixed names
15241        assert!(prompt.contains("<callable_tools"));
15242        assert!(prompt.contains("<name>code-review__lint</name>"));
15243        assert!(!prompt.contains("loaded on demand"));
15244    }
15245
15246    #[test]
15247    fn prompt_skills_compact_mode_omits_instructions_but_keeps_tools() {
15248        let ws = make_workspace();
15249        let skills = vec![zeroclaw_runtime::skills::Skill {
15250            name: "code-review".into(),
15251            description: "Review code for bugs".into(),
15252            version: "1.0.0".into(),
15253            author: None,
15254            tags: vec![],
15255            tools: vec![zeroclaw_runtime::skills::SkillTool {
15256                name: "lint".into(),
15257                description: "Run static checks".into(),
15258                kind: "shell".into(),
15259                command: "cargo clippy".into(),
15260                args: HashMap::new(),
15261                target: None,
15262                locked_args: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
15263            }],
15264            prompts: vec!["Always run cargo test before final response.".into()],
15265            location: None,
15266        }];
15267
15268        let prompt = build_system_prompt_with_mode(
15269            ws.path(),
15270            "model",
15271            &[],
15272            &skills,
15273            None,
15274            None,
15275            false,
15276            zeroclaw_config::schema::SkillsPromptInjectionMode::Compact,
15277            AutonomyLevel::default(),
15278        );
15279
15280        assert!(prompt.contains("<available_skills>"), "missing skills XML");
15281        assert!(prompt.contains("<name>code-review</name>"));
15282        assert!(prompt.contains("<location>skills/code-review/SKILL.md</location>"));
15283        assert!(prompt.contains("loaded on demand"));
15284        assert!(!prompt.contains("<instructions>"));
15285        assert!(
15286            !prompt.contains(
15287                "<instruction>Always run cargo test before final response.</instruction>"
15288            )
15289        );
15290        // Compact mode should still include tools so the LLM knows about them.
15291        // Registered tools (shell kind) appear under <callable_tools> with prefixed names.
15292        assert!(prompt.contains("<callable_tools"));
15293        assert!(prompt.contains("<name>code-review__lint</name>"));
15294    }
15295
15296    #[test]
15297    fn prompt_skills_escape_reserved_xml_chars() {
15298        let ws = make_workspace();
15299        let skills = vec![zeroclaw_runtime::skills::Skill {
15300            name: "code<review>&".into(),
15301            description: "Review \"unsafe\" and 'risky' bits".into(),
15302            version: "1.0.0".into(),
15303            author: None,
15304            tags: vec![],
15305            tools: vec![zeroclaw_runtime::skills::SkillTool {
15306                name: "run\"linter\"".into(),
15307                description: "Run <lint> & report".into(),
15308                kind: "shell&exec".into(),
15309                command: "cargo clippy".into(),
15310                args: HashMap::new(),
15311                target: None,
15312                locked_args: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
15313            }],
15314            prompts: vec!["Use <tool_call> and & keep output \"safe\"".into()],
15315            location: None,
15316        }];
15317
15318        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &skills, None, None);
15319
15320        assert!(prompt.contains("<name>code&lt;review&gt;&amp;</name>"));
15321        assert!(prompt.contains(
15322            "<description>Review &quot;unsafe&quot; and &apos;risky&apos; bits</description>"
15323        ));
15324        assert!(prompt.contains("<name>run&quot;linter&quot;</name>"));
15325        assert!(prompt.contains("<description>Run &lt;lint&gt; &amp; report</description>"));
15326        assert!(prompt.contains("<kind>shell&amp;exec</kind>"));
15327        assert!(prompt.contains(
15328            "<instruction>Use &lt;tool_call&gt; and &amp; keep output &quot;safe&quot;</instruction>"
15329        ));
15330    }
15331
15332    #[test]
15333    fn prompt_truncation() {
15334        let ws = make_workspace();
15335        // Write a file larger than BOOTSTRAP_MAX_CHARS
15336        let big_content = "x".repeat(BOOTSTRAP_MAX_CHARS + 1000);
15337        std::fs::write(ws.path().join("AGENTS.md"), &big_content).unwrap();
15338
15339        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15340
15341        assert!(
15342            prompt.contains("truncated at"),
15343            "large files should be truncated"
15344        );
15345        assert!(
15346            !prompt.contains(&big_content),
15347            "full content should not appear"
15348        );
15349    }
15350
15351    #[test]
15352    fn prompt_empty_files_skipped() {
15353        let ws = make_workspace();
15354        std::fs::write(ws.path().join("TOOLS.md"), "").unwrap();
15355
15356        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15357
15358        // Empty file should not produce a header
15359        assert!(
15360            !prompt.contains("### TOOLS.md"),
15361            "empty files should be skipped"
15362        );
15363    }
15364
15365    #[test]
15366    fn channel_log_truncation_is_utf8_safe_for_multibyte_text() {
15367        let msg = "Hello from ZeroClaw 🌍. Current status is healthy, and café-style UTF-8 text stays safe in logs.";
15368
15369        // Reproduces the production crash path where channel logs truncate at 80 chars.
15370        let result =
15371            std::panic::catch_unwind(|| zeroclaw_runtime::util::truncate_with_ellipsis(msg, 80));
15372        assert!(
15373            result.is_ok(),
15374            "truncate_with_ellipsis should never panic on UTF-8"
15375        );
15376
15377        let truncated = result.unwrap();
15378        assert!(!truncated.is_empty());
15379        assert!(truncated.is_char_boundary(truncated.len()));
15380    }
15381
15382    #[test]
15383    fn prompt_contains_channel_capabilities() {
15384        let ws = make_workspace();
15385        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15386
15387        assert!(
15388            prompt.contains("## Channel Capabilities"),
15389            "missing Channel Capabilities section"
15390        );
15391        assert!(
15392            prompt.contains("running as a messaging bot"),
15393            "missing channel context"
15394        );
15395        assert!(
15396            prompt.contains("NEVER repeat, describe, or echo credentials"),
15397            "missing security instruction"
15398        );
15399    }
15400
15401    #[test]
15402    fn full_autonomy_prompt_executes_allowed_tools_without_extra_approval() {
15403        let ws = make_workspace();
15404        let config = zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig {
15405            level: zeroclaw_runtime::security::AutonomyLevel::Full,
15406            ..zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default()
15407        };
15408        let prompt = build_system_prompt_with_mode_and_autonomy(
15409            ws.path(),
15410            "model",
15411            &[],
15412            &[],
15413            None,
15414            None,
15415            Some(&config),
15416            false,
15417            zeroclaw_config::schema::SkillsPromptInjectionMode::Full,
15418            false,
15419            0,
15420            false,
15421        );
15422
15423        assert!(
15424            prompt.contains("execute it directly instead of asking the user for extra approval"),
15425            "full autonomy should instruct direct execution for allowed tools"
15426        );
15427        assert!(
15428            prompt.contains("Never pretend you are waiting for a human approval"),
15429            "full autonomy should not simulate interactive approval flows"
15430        );
15431    }
15432
15433    #[test]
15434    fn readonly_prompt_explains_policy_blocks_without_fake_approval() {
15435        let ws = make_workspace();
15436        let config = zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig {
15437            level: zeroclaw_runtime::security::AutonomyLevel::ReadOnly,
15438            ..zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default()
15439        };
15440        let prompt = build_system_prompt_with_mode_and_autonomy(
15441            ws.path(),
15442            "model",
15443            &[],
15444            &[],
15445            None,
15446            None,
15447            Some(&config),
15448            false,
15449            zeroclaw_config::schema::SkillsPromptInjectionMode::Full,
15450            false,
15451            0,
15452            false,
15453        );
15454
15455        assert!(
15456            prompt.contains("this runtime is read-only for side effects"),
15457            "read-only prompt should expose the runtime restriction"
15458        );
15459        assert!(
15460            prompt.contains("instead of simulating an approval flow"),
15461            "read-only prompt should explain restrictions instead of faking approval"
15462        );
15463    }
15464
15465    #[test]
15466    fn prompt_workspace_path() {
15467        let ws = make_workspace();
15468        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
15469
15470        assert!(prompt.contains(&format!("Working directory: `{}`", ws.path().display())));
15471    }
15472
15473    #[test]
15474    fn full_autonomy_omits_approval_instructions() {
15475        let ws = make_workspace();
15476        let prompt = build_system_prompt_with_mode(
15477            ws.path(),
15478            "model",
15479            &[],
15480            &[],
15481            None,
15482            None,
15483            false,
15484            zeroclaw_config::schema::SkillsPromptInjectionMode::Full,
15485            AutonomyLevel::Full,
15486        );
15487
15488        assert!(
15489            !prompt.contains("without asking"),
15490            "full autonomy prompt must not tell the model to ask before acting"
15491        );
15492        assert!(
15493            !prompt.contains("ask before acting externally"),
15494            "full autonomy prompt must not contain ask-before-acting instruction"
15495        );
15496        // Core safety rules should still be present
15497        assert!(
15498            prompt.contains("Do not exfiltrate private data"),
15499            "data exfiltration guard must remain"
15500        );
15501        assert!(
15502            prompt.contains("Prefer `trash` over `rm`"),
15503            "trash-over-rm hint must remain"
15504        );
15505    }
15506
15507    #[test]
15508    fn supervised_autonomy_includes_approval_instructions() {
15509        let ws = make_workspace();
15510        let prompt = build_system_prompt_with_mode(
15511            ws.path(),
15512            "model",
15513            &[],
15514            &[],
15515            None,
15516            None,
15517            false,
15518            zeroclaw_config::schema::SkillsPromptInjectionMode::Full,
15519            AutonomyLevel::Supervised,
15520        );
15521
15522        assert!(
15523            prompt.contains("without asking"),
15524            "supervised prompt must include ask-before-acting instruction"
15525        );
15526        assert!(
15527            prompt.contains("ask before acting externally"),
15528            "supervised prompt must include ask-before-acting instruction"
15529        );
15530    }
15531
15532    #[test]
15533    fn channel_notify_observer_truncates_utf8_arguments_safely() {
15534        let (tx, mut rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::unbounded_channel::<String>();
15535        let observer = ChannelNotifyObserver {
15536            inner: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
15537            tx,
15538            tools_used: AtomicBool::new(false),
15539        };
15540
15541        let payload = (0..300)
15542            .map(|n| serde_json::json!({ "content": format!("{}置tail", "a".repeat(n)) }))
15543            .map(|v| v.to_string())
15544            .find(|raw| raw.len() > 120 && !raw.is_char_boundary(120))
15545            .expect("should produce non-char-boundary data at byte index 120");
15546
15547        observer.record_event(
15548            &zeroclaw_runtime::observability::traits::ObserverEvent::ToolCallStart {
15549                tool: "file_write".to_string(),
15550                tool_call_id: None,
15551                arguments: Some(payload),
15552                channel: None,
15553                agent_alias: None,
15554                turn_id: None,
15555            },
15556        );
15557
15558        let emitted = rx.try_recv().expect("observer should emit notify message");
15559        assert!(emitted.contains("`file_write`"));
15560        assert!(emitted.is_char_boundary(emitted.len()));
15561    }
15562
15563    #[test]
15564    fn conversation_memory_key_uses_message_id() {
15565        let msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15566            id: "msg_abc123".into(),
15567            sender: "U123".into(),
15568            reply_target: "C456".into(),
15569            content: "hello".into(),
15570            channel: "slack".into(),
15571            channel_alias: None,
15572            timestamp: 1,
15573            thread_ts: None,
15574            interruption_scope_id: None,
15575            attachments: vec![],
15576            subject: None,
15577        };
15578
15579        assert_eq!(conversation_memory_key(&msg), "slack_U123_msg_abc123");
15580    }
15581
15582    #[test]
15583    fn followup_thread_id_prefers_thread_ts() {
15584        let msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15585            id: "slack_C123_1741234567.123456".into(),
15586            sender: "U123".into(),
15587            reply_target: "C123".into(),
15588            content: "hello".into(),
15589            channel: "slack".into(),
15590            channel_alias: None,
15591            timestamp: 1,
15592            thread_ts: Some("1741234567.123456".into()),
15593            interruption_scope_id: None,
15594            attachments: vec![],
15595            subject: None,
15596        };
15597
15598        assert_eq!(
15599            followup_thread_id(&msg).as_deref(),
15600            Some("1741234567.123456")
15601        );
15602    }
15603
15604    #[test]
15605    fn followup_thread_id_falls_back_to_message_id() {

15608            sender: "U123".into(),
15609            reply_target: "C456".into(),
15610            content: "hello".into(),
15611            channel: "cli".into(),
15612            channel_alias: None,
15613            timestamp: 1,
15614            thread_ts: None,
15615            interruption_scope_id: None,
15616            attachments: vec![],
15617            subject: None,
15618        };
15619
15620        assert_eq!(followup_thread_id(&msg).as_deref(), Some("msg_abc123"));
15621    }

15623    #[test]
15624    fn followup_thread_id_does_not_open_matrix_thread_for_root_message() {
15625        let msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15626            id: "$event:server".into(),
15627            sender: "@alice:server".into(),
15628            reply_target: "!room:server".into(),
15629            content: "hello".into(),
15630            channel: "matrix".into(),
15631            channel_alias: None,
15632            timestamp: 1,
15633            thread_ts: None,
15634            interruption_scope_id: None,
15635            attachments: vec![],
15636            subject: None,
15637        };
15638
15639        assert_eq!(followup_thread_id(&msg), None);
15640    }
