15642    #[test]
15643    fn matrix_root_conversation_history_key_omits_event_id() {
15644        let first = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15645            id: "$first:server".into(),
15646            sender: "@alice:server".into(),
15647            reply_target: "!room:server".into(),
15648            content: "send a.txt".into(),
15649            channel: "matrix".into(),
15650            channel_alias: None,
15651            timestamp: 1,
15652            thread_ts: None,
15653            interruption_scope_id: None,
15654            attachments: vec![],
15655            subject: None,
15656        };
15657        let second = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15658            id: "$second:server".into(),
15659            content: "send it again".into(),
15660            timestamp: 2,
15661            ..first.clone()
15662        };
15663
15664        let key = conversation_history_key(&first);
15665        assert_eq!(key, conversation_history_key(&second));
15666        assert!(!key.contains("$first:server"));
15667        assert!(!key.contains("$second:server"));
15668    }
15669
15670    #[test]
15671    fn matrix_self_anchored_root_history_key_omits_event_id() {
15672        let first = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15673            id: "$first:server".into(),
15674            sender: "@alice:server".into(),
15675            reply_target: "!room:server".into(),
15676            content: "call me boss".into(),
15677            channel: "matrix".into(),
15678            channel_alias: None,
15679            timestamp: 1,
15680            thread_ts: Some("$first:server".into()),
15681            interruption_scope_id: Some("$first:server".into()),
15682            attachments: vec![],
15683            subject: None,
15684        };
15685        let second = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15686            id: "$second:server".into(),
15687            content: "hello".into(),
15688            timestamp: 2,
15689            thread_ts: Some("$second:server".into()),
15690            interruption_scope_id: Some("$second:server".into()),
15691            ..first.clone()
15692        };
15693
15694        let key = conversation_history_key(&first);
15695        assert_eq!(key, conversation_history_key(&second));
15696        assert!(!key.contains("$first:server"));
15697        assert!(!key.contains("$second:server"));
15698    }
15699
15700    #[test]
15701    fn matrix_thread_conversation_history_key_uses_thread_root() {
15702        let msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15703            id: "$reply:server".into(),
15704            sender: "@alice:server".into(),
15705            reply_target: "!room:server".into(),
15706            content: "thread reply".into(),
15707            channel: "matrix".into(),
15708            channel_alias: None,
15709            timestamp: 1,
15710            thread_ts: Some("$root:server".into()),
15711            interruption_scope_id: Some("$root:server".into()),
15712            attachments: vec![],
15713            subject: None,
15714        };
15715
15716        let key = conversation_history_key(&msg);
15717        assert!(key.contains("_root_server"));
15718        assert!(!key.contains("_reply_server"));
15719    }

15721    #[test]
15722    fn wecom_ws_conversation_history_key_uses_reply_target_scope() {
15723        let msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15724            id: "msg_wecom_ws".into(),

15726            reply_target: "group--room-1".into(),
15727            content: "hello".into(),
15728            channel: "wecom_ws".into(),
15729            channel_alias: Some("work".into()),
15730            timestamp: 1,
15731            thread_ts: Some("req-1".into()),
15732            interruption_scope_id: None,
15733            attachments: vec![],
15734            subject: None,
15735        };
15736
15737        assert_eq!(
15738            conversation_history_key(&msg),
15739            "wecom_ws_work_group--room-1"
15740        );
15741        assert_eq!(interruption_scope_key(&msg), "wecom_ws_work_group--room-1");

15744    #[test]
15745    fn parse_runtime_command_allows_model_switch_for_wecom_ws() {
15746        assert_eq!(
15747            parse_runtime_command("wecom_ws", "/models openrouter"),
15748            Some(ChannelRuntimeCommand::SetProvider("openrouter".into()))
15749        );
15750        assert_eq!(
15751            parse_runtime_command("wecom_ws", "/model qwen-max"),
15752            Some(ChannelRuntimeCommand::SetModel("qwen-max".into()))
15753        );
15754    }
15755
15756    /// `/models <family>` must resolve to a configured alias-backed ref so the
15757    /// switched provider uses the alias entry's key/URI — never construct a bare
15758    /// family provider that ignores `[providers.models.<family>.<alias>]`.
15759    #[test]
15760    fn resolve_models_command_resolves_bare_family_to_configured_alias() {
15761        let mut config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
15762        {
15763            let base = config
15764                .providers
15765                .models
15766                .ensure("openrouter", "default")
15767                .expect("openrouter slot must exist");
15768            base.api_key = Some("sk-configured".into());
15769            base.uri = Some("https://router.example/v1".into());
15770            base.model = Some("some-model".into());
15771        }
15772
15773        match resolve_models_command(&config, "openrouter") {
15774            ModelsCommandResolution::Resolved(r) => assert_eq!(r, "openrouter.default"),
15775            other => panic!("expected Resolved(openrouter.default), got {other:?}"),
15776        }
15777
15778        // The resolved ref must carry the configured alias credentials.
15779        let (key, uri) = provider_credentials_for_ref(&config, "openrouter.default");
15780        assert_eq!(key.as_deref(), Some("sk-configured"));
15781        assert_eq!(uri.as_deref(), Some("https://router.example/v1"));
15782    }
15783
15784    /// A bare family with no configured alias has no credentialed provider to
15785    /// switch to — the command must fail clearly instead of building a bare one.
15786    #[test]
15787    fn resolve_models_command_rejects_family_without_alias() {
15788        let config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
15789        match resolve_models_command(&config, "openrouter") {
15790            ModelsCommandResolution::NoAlias(f) => assert_eq!(f, "openrouter"),
15791            other => panic!("expected NoAlias(openrouter), got {other:?}"),
15792        }
15793    }
15794
15795    /// A bare family with several configured aliases is ambiguous; the user must
15796    /// qualify which one rather than silently picking.
15797    #[test]
15798    fn resolve_models_command_flags_ambiguous_family() {
15799        let mut config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
15800        config
15801            .providers
15802            .models
15803            .ensure("openrouter", "default")
15804            .unwrap();
15805        config
15806            .providers
15807            .models
15808            .ensure("openrouter", "secondary")
15809            .unwrap();
15810
15811        match resolve_models_command(&config, "openrouter") {
15812            ModelsCommandResolution::Ambiguous { family, aliases } => {
15813                assert_eq!(family, "openrouter");
15814                assert_eq!(
15815                    aliases,
15816                    vec!["default".to_string(), "secondary".to_string()]
15817                );
15818            }
15819            other => panic!("expected Ambiguous, got {other:?}"),
15820        }
15821    }
15822
15823    /// A dotted ref resolves only when the alias entry exists.
15824    #[test]
15825    fn resolve_models_command_accepts_existing_dotted_ref() {
15826        let mut config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
15827        config
15828            .providers
15829            .models
15830            .ensure("openrouter", "default")
15831            .unwrap();
15832
15833        match resolve_models_command(&config, "openrouter.default") {
15834            ModelsCommandResolution::Resolved(r) => assert_eq!(r, "openrouter.default"),
15835            other => panic!("expected Resolved, got {other:?}"),
15836        }
15837        match resolve_models_command(&config, "openrouter.missing") {
15838            ModelsCommandResolution::NoAlias(r) => assert_eq!(r, "openrouter.missing"),
15839            other => panic!("expected NoAlias, got {other:?}"),
15840        }
15841    }
15842
15843    /// An unrecognized family is rejected.
15844    #[test]
15845    fn resolve_models_command_rejects_unknown_family() {
15846        let config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
15847        assert!(matches!(
15848            resolve_models_command(&config, "definitely-not-a-provider"),
15849            ModelsCommandResolution::Unknown
15850        ));
15851    }
15852
15853    #[test]
15854    fn runtime_model_switch_resolves_bare_family_to_configured_alias() {
15855        let mut config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
15856        config
15857            .providers
15858            .models
15859            .ensure("openrouter", "default")
15860            .unwrap();
15861
15862        let resolved = resolve_provider_ref_for_runtime_switch(&config, "openrouter").unwrap();
15863
15864        assert_eq!(resolved, "openrouter.default");
15865    }
15866
15867    #[test]
15868    fn runtime_model_switch_rejects_ambiguous_bare_family() {
15869        let mut config = zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default();
15870        config
15871            .providers
15872            .models
15873            .ensure("openrouter", "default")
15874            .unwrap();
15875        config
15876            .providers
15877            .models
15878            .ensure("openrouter", "secondary")
15879            .unwrap();
15880
15881        let err = resolve_provider_ref_for_runtime_switch(&config, "openrouter")
15882            .expect_err("ambiguous model switch provider should reject");
15883
15884        assert!(err.to_string().contains("multiple configured aliases"));
15885    }
15886
15887    #[test]
15888    fn explicit_wecom_group_address_bypasses_reply_intent_precheck() {
15889        assert!(is_explicitly_addressed_channel_message(
15890            "wecom_ws",
15891            "[WeCom group message addressed to this bot via @danya]\n@danya say hi"
15892        ));
15893        assert!(!is_explicitly_addressed_channel_message(
15894            "wecom_ws",
15895            "@danya say hi"
15896        ));
15897        assert!(!is_explicitly_addressed_channel_message(
15898            "telegram",
15899            "[WeCom group message addressed to this bot via @danya]\n@danya say hi"
15900        ));
15901    }
15902
15903    #[test]
15904    fn conversation_memory_key_is_unique_per_message() {
15905        let msg1 = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15906            id: "msg_1".into(),
15907            sender: "U123".into(),
15908            reply_target: "C456".into(),
15909            content: "first".into(),
15910            channel: "slack".into(),
15911            channel_alias: None,
15912            timestamp: 1,
15913            thread_ts: None,
15914            interruption_scope_id: None,
15915            attachments: vec![],
15916            subject: None,
15917        };
15918        let msg2 = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15919            id: "msg_2".into(),
15920            sender: "U123".into(),
15921            reply_target: "C456".into(),
15922            content: "second".into(),
15923            channel: "slack".into(),
15924            channel_alias: None,
15925            timestamp: 2,
15926            thread_ts: None,
15927            interruption_scope_id: None,
15928            attachments: vec![],
15929            subject: None,
15930        };
15931
15932        assert_ne!(
15933            conversation_memory_key(&msg1),
15934            conversation_memory_key(&msg2)
15935        );
15936    }
15937
15938    #[tokio::test]
15939    async fn autosave_keys_preserve_multiple_conversation_facts() {
15940        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
15941        let mem = SqliteMemory::new("test", tmp.path()).unwrap();
15942
15943        let msg1 = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15944            id: "msg_1".into(),
15945            sender: "U123".into(),
15946            reply_target: "C456".into(),
15947            content: "I'm Paul".into(),
15948            channel: "slack".into(),
15949            channel_alias: None,
15950            timestamp: 1,
15951            thread_ts: None,
15952            interruption_scope_id: None,
15953            attachments: vec![],
15954            subject: None,
15955        };
15956        let msg2 = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
15957            id: "msg_2".into(),
15958            sender: "U123".into(),
15959            reply_target: "C456".into(),
15960            content: "I'm 45".into(),
15961            channel: "slack".into(),
15962            channel_alias: None,
15963            timestamp: 2,
15964            thread_ts: None,
15965            interruption_scope_id: None,
15966            attachments: vec![],
15967            subject: None,
15968        };
15969
15970        mem.store(
15971            &conversation_memory_key(&msg1),
15972            &msg1.content,
15973            MemoryCategory::Conversation,
15974            None,
15975        )
15976        .await
15977        .unwrap();
15978        mem.store(
15979            &conversation_memory_key(&msg2),
15980            &msg2.content,
15981            MemoryCategory::Conversation,
15982            None,
15983        )
15984        .await
15985        .unwrap();
15986
15987        assert_eq!(mem.count().await.unwrap(), 2);
15988
15989        let recalled = mem.recall("45", 5, None, None, None).await.unwrap();
15990        assert!(recalled.iter().any(|entry| entry.content.contains("45")));
15991    }
15992
15993    #[tokio::test]
15994    async fn build_memory_context_includes_recalled_entries() {
15995        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
15996        let mem = SqliteMemory::new("test", tmp.path()).unwrap();
15997        mem.store("age_fact", "Age is 45", MemoryCategory::Conversation, None)
15998            .await
15999            .unwrap();
16000
16001        let context = build_memory_context(&mem, "age", 0.0, None).await;
16002        assert!(context.contains(MEMORY_CONTEXT_OPEN));
16003        assert!(context.contains("Age is 45"));
16004    }
16005
16006    #[tokio::test]
16007    async fn autosaved_conversation_memory_is_recalled_by_sender_scope() {
16008        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
16009        let mem = SqliteMemory::new("test", tmp.path()).unwrap();
16010        let msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16011            id: "msg_1".into(),
16012            sender: "U123".into(),
16013            reply_target: "C456".into(),
16014            content: "Project codename is quartz".into(),
16015            channel: "slack".into(),
16016            channel_alias: None,
16017            timestamp: 1,
16018            thread_ts: None,
16019            interruption_scope_id: None,
16020            attachments: vec![],
16021            subject: None,
16022        };
16023        let history_key = conversation_history_key(&msg);
16024
16025        mem.store(
16026            &conversation_memory_key(&msg),
16027            &msg.content,
16028            MemoryCategory::Conversation,
16029            Some(&history_key),
16030        )
16031        .await
16032        .unwrap();
16033
16034        let session_ids = sender_memory_session_ids(&msg, &history_key);
16035        let session_id_refs: Vec<Option<&str>> =
16036            session_ids.iter().map(|s| Some(s.as_str())).collect();
16037        let context =
16038            build_memory_context_for_sessions(&mem, "quartz", 0.0, &session_id_refs).await;
16039
16040        assert!(
16041            context.contains("Project codename is quartz"),
16042            "sender recall should include autosaved memories stored under the current session key, got: {context}"
16043        );
16044    }
16045
16046    #[tokio::test]
16047    async fn autosaved_group_conversation_memory_stays_session_scoped() {
16048        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
16049        let mem = SqliteMemory::new("test", tmp.path()).unwrap();
16050        let group_a_msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16051            id: "msg_1".into(),
16052            sender: "U123".into(),
16053            reply_target: "group:alpha".into(),
16054            content: "Group alpha codename is quartz".into(),
16055            channel: "slack".into(),
16056            channel_alias: None,
16057            timestamp: 1,
16058            thread_ts: None,
16059            interruption_scope_id: None,
16060            attachments: vec![],
16061            subject: None,
16062        };
16063        let group_b_msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16064            id: "msg_2".into(),
16065            sender: "U123".into(),
16066            reply_target: "group:beta".into(),
16067            content: "What was the codename?".into(),
16068            channel: "slack".into(),
16069            channel_alias: None,
16070            timestamp: 2,
16071            thread_ts: None,
16072            interruption_scope_id: None,
16073            attachments: vec![],
16074            subject: None,
16075        };
16076        let group_a_history_key = conversation_history_key(&group_a_msg);
16077        let group_b_history_key = conversation_history_key(&group_b_msg);
16078
16079        mem.store(
16080            &conversation_memory_key(&group_a_msg),
16081            &group_a_msg.content,
16082            MemoryCategory::Conversation,
16083            Some(&group_a_history_key),
16084        )
16085        .await
16086        .unwrap();
16087
16088        let group_b_sender_session_ids =
16089            sender_memory_session_ids(&group_b_msg, &group_b_history_key);
16090        assert_eq!(group_b_sender_session_ids, vec!["U123".to_string()]);
16091
16092        let group_b_sender_session_id_refs: Vec<Option<&str>> = group_b_sender_session_ids
16093            .iter()
16094            .map(|s| Some(s.as_str()))
16095            .collect();
16096        let sender_context =
16097            build_memory_context_for_sessions(&mem, "quartz", 0.0, &group_b_sender_session_id_refs)
16098                .await;
16099        let group_context =
16100            build_memory_context(&mem, "quartz", 0.0, Some(&group_b_history_key)).await;
16101        let source_group_context =
16102            build_memory_context(&mem, "quartz", 0.0, Some(&group_a_history_key)).await;
16103
16104        assert!(
16105            sender_context.is_empty(),
16106            "sender scope must not leak autosaved group memory from another group, got: {sender_context}"
16107        );
16108        assert!(
16109            group_context.is_empty(),
16110            "target group scope must not include another group's autosaved memory, got: {group_context}"
16111        );
16112        assert!(
16113            source_group_context.contains("Group alpha codename is quartz"),
16114            "source group scope should still recall its own autosaved memory, got: {source_group_context}"
16115        );
16116    }
16117
16118    #[tokio::test]
16119    async fn sender_session_ids_match_migrated_matrix_sender_rows() {
16120        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
16121        let mem = SqliteMemory::new("test", tmp.path()).unwrap();
16122        let raw_sender = "@alice:server";
16123        let sanitized_sender = sanitize_session_key(raw_sender);
16124        assert_eq!(sanitized_sender, "_alice_server");
16125
16126        mem.store(
16127            "alice_fact",
16128            "Alice favors filtered coffee",
16129            MemoryCategory::Conversation,
16130            Some(sanitized_sender.as_str()),
16131        )
16132        .await
16133        .unwrap();
16134
16135        let msg = zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16136            id: "evt_1".into(),
16137            sender: raw_sender.into(),
16138            reply_target: "!room:server".into(),
16139            content: "what coffee does alice prefer?".into(),
16140            channel: "matrix".into(),
16141            channel_alias: None,
16142            timestamp: 1,
16143            thread_ts: None,
16144            interruption_scope_id: None,
16145            attachments: vec![],
16146            subject: None,
16147        };
16148        let history_key = conversation_history_key(&msg);
16149        let session_ids = sender_memory_session_ids(&msg, &history_key);
16150        assert!(
16151            session_ids.contains(&sanitized_sender),
16152            "sender session ids must include sanitized sender, got: {session_ids:?}"
16153        );
16154        let session_id_refs: Vec<Option<&str>> =
16155            session_ids.iter().map(|s| Some(s.as_str())).collect();
16156        let context =
16157            build_memory_context_for_sessions(&mem, "coffee", 0.0, &session_id_refs).await;
16158        assert!(
16159            context.contains("Alice favors filtered coffee"),
16160            "sender recall must find migrated row stored under sanitized sender, got: {context}"
16161        );
16162    }
16163
16164    /// Auto-saved photo messages must not surface through memory context,
16165    /// otherwise the image marker gets duplicated in the model_provider request.
16166    #[tokio::test]
16167    async fn build_memory_context_excludes_image_marker_entries() {
16168        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
16169        let mem = SqliteMemory::new("test", tmp.path()).unwrap();
16170
16171        // Simulate auto-save of a photo message containing an [IMAGE:] marker.
16172        mem.store(
16173            "telegram_user_msg_photo",
16174            "[IMAGE:/tmp/workspace/photo_1_2.jpg]\n\nDescribe this screenshot",
16175            MemoryCategory::Conversation,
16176            None,
16177        )
16178        .await
16179        .unwrap();
16180        // Also store a plain text entry that shares a word with the query
16181        // so the FTS recall returns both entries.
16182        mem.store(
16183            "screenshot_preference",
16184            "User prefers screenshot descriptions to be concise",
16185            MemoryCategory::Conversation,
16186            None,
16187        )
16188        .await
16189        .unwrap();
16190
16191        let context = build_memory_context(&mem, "screenshot", 0.0, None).await;
16192
16193        // The image-marker entry must be excluded to prevent duplication.
16194        assert!(
16195            !context.contains("[IMAGE:"),
16196            "memory context must not contain image markers, got: {context}"
16197        );
16198        // Plain text entries should still be included.
16199        assert!(
16200            context.contains("screenshot descriptions"),
16201            "plain text entry should remain in context, got: {context}"
16202        );
16203    }
16204
16205    #[tokio::test]
16206    async fn process_channel_message_restores_per_sender_history_on_follow_ups() {
16207        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
16208        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
16209
16210        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
16211        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
16212
16213        let provider_impl = Arc::new(HistoryCaptureModelProvider::default());
16214
16215        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
16216            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
16217            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
16218            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
16219            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
16220            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
16221            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16222            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
16223                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
16224                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16225                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
16226                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
16227                ),
16228            ),
16229            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
16230            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
16231            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
16232            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
16233            temperature: Some(0.0),
16234            auto_save_memory: false,
16235            max_tool_iterations: 5,
16236            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
16237            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
16238                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
16239            ))),
16240            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
16241            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16242            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16243            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
16244            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
16245            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
16246            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
16247            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
16248            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
16249                telegram: false,
16250                slack: false,
16251                discord: false,
16252                mattermost: false,
16253                matrix: false,
16254                whatsapp: false,
16255            },
16256            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
16257            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
16258            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
16259            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
16260            hooks: None,
16261            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16262            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
16263            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16264            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16265            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
16266            ack_reactions: true,
16267            show_tool_calls: true,
16268            session_store: None,
16269            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
16270                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
16271            )),
16272            activated_tools: None,
16273            cost_tracking: None,
16274            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
16275            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
16276            context_token_budget: 0,
16277            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
16278                Duration::ZERO,
16279            )),
16280            receipt_generator: None,
16281            show_receipts_in_response: false,
16282            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16283            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16284        });
16285
16286        process_channel_message(
16287            runtime_ctx.clone(),
16288            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16289                id: "msg-a".to_string(),
16290                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16291                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
16292                content: "hello".to_string(),
16293                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
16294                channel_alias: None,
16295                timestamp: 1,
16296                thread_ts: None,
16297                interruption_scope_id: None,
16298                attachments: vec![],
16299                subject: None,
16300            },
16301            CancellationToken::new(),
16302        )
16303        .await;
16304
16305        process_channel_message(
16306            runtime_ctx,
16307            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16308                id: "msg-b".to_string(),
16309                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16310                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
16311                content: "follow up".to_string(),
16312                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
16313                channel_alias: None,
16314                timestamp: 2,
16315                thread_ts: None,
16316                interruption_scope_id: None,
16317                attachments: vec![],
16318                subject: None,
16319            },
16320            CancellationToken::new(),
16321        )
16322        .await;
16323
16324        let calls = provider_impl
16325            .calls
16326            .lock()
16327            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16328        assert_eq!(calls.len(), 2);
16329        assert_eq!(calls[0].len(), 2);
16330        assert_eq!(calls[0][0].0, "system");
16331        assert_eq!(calls[0][1].0, "user");
16332        assert_eq!(calls[1].len(), 4);
16333        assert_eq!(calls[1][0].0, "system");
16334        assert_eq!(calls[1][1].0, "user");
16335        assert_eq!(calls[1][2].0, "assistant");
16336        assert_eq!(calls[1][3].0, "user");
16337        assert!(calls[1][1].1.starts_with('['));
16338        assert!(calls[1][1].1.contains("hello"));
16339        assert!(calls[1][2].1.contains("response-1"));
16340        assert!(calls[1][3].1.starts_with('['));
16341        assert!(calls[1][3].1.contains("follow up"));
16342    }
16343
16344    #[tokio::test]
16345    async fn process_channel_message_refreshes_available_skills_after_new_session() {
16346        let workspace = make_workspace();
16347        let mut config = Config {
16348            data_dir: workspace.path().to_path_buf(),
16349            ..Default::default()
16350        };
16351        config.skills.open_skills_enabled = false;
16352
16353        let initial_skills =
16354            zeroclaw_runtime::skills::load_skills_with_config(workspace.path(), &config);
16355        assert!(initial_skills.is_empty());
16356
16357        let default_identity = zeroclaw_config::schema::IdentityConfig::default();
16358        let initial_system_prompt = build_system_prompt_with_mode(
16359            workspace.path(),
16360            "test-model",
16361            &[],
16362            &initial_skills,
16363            Some(&default_identity),
16364            None,
16365            false,
16366            config.skills.prompt_injection_mode,
16367            AutonomyLevel::default(),
16368        );
16369        assert!(
16370            !initial_system_prompt.contains("refresh-test"),
16371            "initial prompt should not contain the new skill before it exists"
16372        );
16373
16374        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
16375        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
16376
16377        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
16378        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
16379
16380        let provider_impl = Arc::new(HistoryCaptureModelProvider::default());
16381        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
16382            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
16383            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
16384            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
16385            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
16386            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
16387            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16388            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
16389                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
16390                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16391                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
16392                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
16393                ),
16394            ),
16395            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
16396            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
16397            system_prompt: Arc::new(initial_system_prompt),
16398            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
16399            temperature: Some(0.0),
16400            auto_save_memory: false,
16401            max_tool_iterations: 5,
16402            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
16403            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
16404                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
16405            ))),
16406            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
16407            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16408            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16409            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
16410            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
16411            workspace_dir: Arc::new(config.data_dir.clone()),
16412            prompt_config: Arc::new(config.clone()),
16413            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
16414            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
16415                telegram: false,
16416                slack: false,
16417                discord: false,
16418                mattermost: false,
16419                matrix: false,
16420                whatsapp: false,
16421            },
16422            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
16423            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
16424            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
16425            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
16426            hooks: None,
16427            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16428            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
16429            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16430            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16431            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
16432            ack_reactions: true,
16433            show_tool_calls: true,
16434            session_store: None,
16435            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
16436                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
16437            )),
16438            activated_tools: None,
16439            cost_tracking: None,
16440            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
16441            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
16442            context_token_budget: 0,
16443            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
16444                Duration::ZERO,
16445            )),
16446            receipt_generator: None,
16447            show_receipts_in_response: false,
16448            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16449            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16450        });
16451
16452        process_channel_message(
16453            runtime_ctx.clone(),
16454            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16455                id: "msg-before-new".to_string(),
16456                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16457                reply_target: "chat-refresh".to_string(),
16458                content: "hello".to_string(),
16459                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
16460                channel_alias: None,
16461                timestamp: 1,
16462                thread_ts: None,
16463                interruption_scope_id: None,
16464                attachments: vec![],
16465                subject: None,
16466            },
16467            CancellationToken::new(),
16468        )
16469        .await;
16470
16471        let skill_dir = workspace.path().join("skills").join("refresh-test");
16472        std::fs::create_dir_all(&skill_dir).unwrap();
16473        std::fs::write(
16474            skill_dir.join("SKILL.md"),
16475            "---\nname: refresh-test\ndescription: Refresh the available skills section\n---\n# Refresh Test\nExpose this skill after /new.\n",
16476        )
16477        .unwrap();
16478        let refreshed_skills =
16479            zeroclaw_runtime::skills::load_skills_with_config(workspace.path(), &config);
16480        assert_eq!(refreshed_skills.len(), 1);
16481        assert_eq!(refreshed_skills[0].name, "refresh-test");
16482        assert!(
16483            refreshed_new_session_system_prompt(runtime_ctx.as_ref())
16484                .contains("<name>refresh-test</name>"),
16485            "fresh-session prompt should pick up skills added after startup"
16486        );
16487
16488        process_channel_message(
16489            runtime_ctx.clone(),
16490            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16491                id: "msg-new-session".to_string(),
16492                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16493                reply_target: "chat-refresh".to_string(),
16494                content: "/new".to_string(),
16495                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
16496                channel_alias: None,
16497                timestamp: 2,
16498                thread_ts: None,
16499                interruption_scope_id: None,
16500                attachments: vec![],
16501                subject: None,
16502            },
16503            CancellationToken::new(),
16504        )
16505        .await;
16506
16507        {
16508            let histories = runtime_ctx
16509                .conversation_histories
16510                .lock()
16511                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16512            assert!(
16513                histories.peek("telegram_chat-refresh_alice").is_none(),
16514                "/new should clear the cached sender history before the next message"
16515            );
16516        }
16517
16518        {
16519            let pending_new_sessions = runtime_ctx
16520                .pending_new_sessions
16521                .lock()
16522                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16523            assert!(
16524                pending_new_sessions.contains("telegram_chat-refresh_alice"),
16525                "/new should mark the sender for a fresh next-message prompt rebuild"
16526            );
16527        }
16528
16529        process_channel_message(
16530            runtime_ctx,
16531            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16532                id: "msg-after-new".to_string(),
16533                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16534                reply_target: "chat-refresh".to_string(),
16535                content: "hello again".to_string(),
16536                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
16537                channel_alias: None,
16538                timestamp: 3,
16539                thread_ts: None,
16540                interruption_scope_id: None,
16541                attachments: vec![],
16542                subject: None,
16543            },
16544            CancellationToken::new(),
16545        )
16546        .await;
16547
16548        {
16549            let calls = provider_impl
16550                .calls
16551                .lock()
16552                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16553            assert_eq!(calls.len(), 2);
16554            assert_eq!(calls[0][0].0, "system");
16555            assert_eq!(calls[1][0].0, "system");
16556            assert!(
16557                !calls[0][0].1.contains("<name>refresh-test</name>"),
16558                "pre-/new prompt should not advertise a skill that did not exist yet"
16559            );
16560            assert!(
16561                calls[1][0].1.contains("<available_skills>"),
16562                "post-/new prompt should contain the refreshed skills block"
16563            );
16564            assert!(
16565                calls[1][0].1.contains("<name>refresh-test</name>"),
16566                "post-/new prompt should include skills discovered after the reset"
16567            );
16568        }
16569
16570        let sent_messages = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
16571        assert!(
16572            sent_messages.iter().any(|message| {
16573                message.contains("Conversation history cleared. Starting fresh.")
16574            })
16575        );
16576    }
16577
16578    #[tokio::test]
16579    async fn process_channel_message_enriches_current_turn_without_persisting_context() {
16580        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
16581        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
16582
16583        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
16584        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
16585
16586        let provider_impl = Arc::new(HistoryCaptureModelProvider::default());
16587        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
16588            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
16589            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
16590            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
16591            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
16592            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
16593            memory: Arc::new(RecallMemory),
16594            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
16595                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
16596                    Arc::new(RecallMemory),
16597                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
16598                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
16599                ),
16600            ),
16601            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
16602            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
16603            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
16604            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
16605            temperature: Some(0.0),
16606            auto_save_memory: false,
16607            max_tool_iterations: 5,
16608            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
16609            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
16610                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
16611            ))),
16612            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
16613            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16614            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16615            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
16616            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
16617            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
16618            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
16619            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
16620            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
16621                telegram: false,
16622                slack: false,
16623                discord: false,
16624                mattermost: false,
16625                matrix: false,
16626                whatsapp: false,
16627            },
16628            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
16629            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
16630            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
16631            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
16632            hooks: None,
16633            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16634            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
16635            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16636            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16637            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
16638            ack_reactions: true,
16639            show_tool_calls: true,
16640            session_store: None,
16641            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
16642                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
16643            )),
16644            activated_tools: None,
16645            cost_tracking: None,
16646            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
16647            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
16648            context_token_budget: 0,
16649            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
16650                Duration::ZERO,
16651            )),
16652            receipt_generator: None,
16653            show_receipts_in_response: false,
16654            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16655            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16656        });
16657
16658        process_channel_message(
16659            runtime_ctx.clone(),
16660            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16661                id: "msg-ctx-1".to_string(),
16662                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16663                reply_target: "chat-ctx".to_string(),
16664                content: "hello".to_string(),
16665                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
16666                channel_alias: None,
16667                timestamp: 1,
16668                thread_ts: None,
16669                interruption_scope_id: None,
16670                attachments: vec![],
16671                subject: None,
16672            },
16673            CancellationToken::new(),
16674        )
16675        .await;
16676
16677        let calls = provider_impl
16678            .calls
16679            .lock()
16680            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16681        assert_eq!(calls.len(), 1);
16682        assert_eq!(calls[0].len(), 2);
16683        // Memory context is injected into the system prompt, not the user message.
16684        assert_eq!(calls[0][0].0, "system");
16685        assert!(calls[0][0].1.contains(MEMORY_CONTEXT_OPEN));
16686        assert!(calls[0][0].1.contains("Age is 45"));
16687        assert_eq!(calls[0][1].0, "user");
16688        assert!(calls[0][1].1.starts_with('['));
16689        assert!(
16690            calls[0][1].1.contains("] hello"),
16691            "current channel user turn should be timestamped: {}",
16692            calls[0][1].1
16693        );
16694
16695        let histories = runtime_ctx
16696            .conversation_histories
16697            .lock()
16698            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16699        let turns = histories
16700            .peek("test-channel_chat-ctx_alice")
16701            .expect("history should be stored for sender");
16702        assert_eq!(turns[0].role, "user");
16703        assert!(turns[0].content.starts_with('['));
16704        assert!(
16705            turns[0].content.contains("] hello"),
16706            "stored channel user turn should be timestamped: {}",
16707            turns[0].content
16708        );
16709        assert!(!turns[0].content.contains(MEMORY_CONTEXT_OPEN));
16710    }
16711
16712    #[tokio::test]
16713    async fn process_channel_message_sends_image_payload_without_persisting_it() {
16714        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
16715        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
16716
16717        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
16718        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
16719
16720        let provider_impl = Arc::new(HistoryCaptureModelProvider {
16721            vision: true,
16722            ..Default::default()
16723        });
16724        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
16725            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
16726            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
16727            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
16728            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
16729            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
16730            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16731            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
16732                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
16733                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16734                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
16735                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
16736                ),
16737            ),
16738            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
16739            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
16740            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
16741            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
16742            temperature: Some(0.0),
16743            auto_save_memory: false,
16744            max_tool_iterations: 5,
16745            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
16746            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
16747                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
16748            ))),
16749            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
16750            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16751            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16752            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
16753            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
16754            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
16755            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
16756            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
16757            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
16758                telegram: false,
16759                slack: false,
16760                discord: false,
16761                mattermost: false,
16762                matrix: false,
16763                whatsapp: false,
16764            },
16765            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
16766            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig {
16767                enabled: true,
16768                ..Default::default()
16769            },
16770            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
16771            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
16772            hooks: None,
16773            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16774            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
16775            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16776            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16777            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
16778            ack_reactions: true,
16779            show_tool_calls: true,
16780            session_store: None,
16781            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
16782                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
16783            )),
16784            activated_tools: None,
16785            cost_tracking: None,
16786            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
16787            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
16788            context_token_budget: 0,
16789            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
16790                Duration::ZERO,
16791            )),
16792            receipt_generator: None,
16793            show_receipts_in_response: false,
16794            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16795            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16796        });
16797
16798        process_channel_message(
16799            runtime_ctx.clone(),
16800            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16801                id: "msg-image-1".to_string(),
16802                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16803                reply_target: "chat-image".to_string(),
16804                content: "please inspect this".to_string(),
16805                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
16806                channel_alias: None,
16807                timestamp: 1,
16808                thread_ts: None,
16809                interruption_scope_id: None,
16810                attachments: vec![zeroclaw_api::media::MediaAttachment {
16811                    file_name: "sticker.png".to_string(),
16812                    data: vec![1, 2, 3, 4],
16813                    mime_type: Some("image/png".to_string()),
16814                }],
16815                subject: None,
16816            },
16817            CancellationToken::new(),
16818        )
16819        .await;
16820
16821        let calls = provider_impl
16822            .calls
16823            .lock()
16824            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16825        assert_eq!(calls.len(), 1);
16826        let current_user = calls[0]
16827            .iter()
16828            .rev()
16829            .find(|(role, _)| role == "user")
16830            .expect("provider call should include current user message");
16831        assert!(current_user.1.contains("[IMAGE:data:image/png;base64,"));
16832        assert!(current_user.1.contains("please inspect this"));
16833        drop(calls);
16834
16835        let histories = runtime_ctx
16836            .conversation_histories
16837            .lock()
16838            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16839        let turns = histories
16840            .peek("test-channel_chat-image_alice")
16841            .expect("history should be stored for sender");
16842        assert_eq!(turns[0].role, "user");
16843        assert!(turns[0].content.starts_with('['));
16844        assert!(turns[0].content.contains("[Image: sticker.png attached"));
16845        assert!(turns[0].content.contains("please inspect this"));
16846        assert!(!turns[0].content.contains("[IMAGE:data:"));
16847        assert!(!turns[0].content.contains("AQIDBA"));
16848    }
16849
16850    #[tokio::test]
16851    async fn process_channel_message_telegram_keeps_system_instruction_at_top_only() {
16852        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
16853        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
16854
16855        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
16856        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
16857
16858        let provider_impl = Arc::new(HistoryCaptureModelProvider::default());
16859        let mut histories =
16860            lru::LruCache::new(std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap());
16861        histories.push(
16862            "telegram_chat-telegram_alice".to_string(),
16863            vec![
16864                ChatMessage::assistant("stale assistant"),
16865                ChatMessage::user("earlier user question"),
16866                ChatMessage::assistant("earlier assistant reply"),
16867            ],
16868        );
16869
16870        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
16871            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
16872            model_provider: provider_impl.clone(),
16873            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
16874            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
16875            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
16876            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16877            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
16878                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
16879                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
16880                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
16881                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
16882                ),
16883            ),
16884            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
16885            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
16886            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
16887            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
16888            temperature: Some(0.0),
16889            auto_save_memory: false,
16890            max_tool_iterations: 5,
16891            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
16892            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(histories)),
16893            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
16894            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16895            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
16896            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
16897            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
16898            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
16899            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
16900            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
16901            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
16902                telegram: false,
16903                slack: false,
16904                discord: false,
16905                mattermost: false,
16906                matrix: false,
16907                whatsapp: false,
16908            },
16909            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
16910            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
16911            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
16912            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
16913            hooks: None,
16914            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16915            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
16916            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16917            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
16918            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
16919            ack_reactions: true,
16920            show_tool_calls: true,
16921            session_store: None,
16922            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
16923                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
16924            )),
16925            activated_tools: None,
16926            cost_tracking: None,
16927            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
16928            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
16929            context_token_budget: 0,
16930            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
16931                Duration::ZERO,
16932            )),
16933            receipt_generator: None,
16934            show_receipts_in_response: false,
16935            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16936            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
16937        });
16938
16939        process_channel_message(
16940            runtime_ctx.clone(),
16941            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
16942                id: "tg-msg-1".to_string(),
16943                sender: "alice".to_string(),
16944                reply_target: "chat-telegram".to_string(),
16945                content: "hello".to_string(),
16946                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
16947                channel_alias: None,
16948                timestamp: 1,
16949                thread_ts: None,
16950                interruption_scope_id: None,
16951                attachments: vec![],
16952                subject: None,
16953            },
16954            CancellationToken::new(),
16955        )
16956        .await;
16957
16958        let calls = provider_impl
16959            .calls
16960            .lock()
16961            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
16962        assert_eq!(calls.len(), 1);
16963        assert_eq!(calls[0].len(), 4);
16964
16965        let roles = calls[0]
16966            .iter()
16967            .map(|(role, _)| role.as_str())
16968            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
16969        assert_eq!(roles, vec!["system", "user", "assistant", "user"]);
16970        assert!(
16971            calls[0][0].1.contains("When responding on Telegram:"),
16972            "telegram channel instructions should be embedded into the system prompt"
16973        );
16974        assert!(
16975            calls[0][0].1.contains("For media attachments use markers:"),
16976            "telegram media marker guidance should live in the system prompt"
16977        );
16978        assert!(!calls[0].iter().skip(1).any(|(role, _)| role == "system"));
16979    }
16980
16981    #[test]
16982    fn channel_delivery_instructions_for_discord_mandates_absolute_paths() {
16983        let block = channel_delivery_instructions("discord")
16984            .expect("discord channel must have a delivery-instructions block");
16985        assert!(
16986            block.contains("When responding on Discord:"),
16987            "discord block must identify itself"
16988        );
16989        assert!(
16990            block.contains("For media attachments use markers:"),
16991            "discord block must describe marker syntax"
16992        );
16993        assert!(
16994            block.contains("MUST be absolute"),
16995            "discord block must mandate absolute paths"
16996        );
16997        assert!(
16998            block.contains("workspace"),
16999            "discord block must reference workspace bounds"
17000        );
17001        assert!(
17002            block.contains("[IMAGE:<absolute-path>]"),
17003            "discord block must show the absolute-path marker form"
17004        );
17005    }
17006
17007    #[test]
17008    fn extract_tool_context_summary_collects_alias_and_native_tool_calls() {
17009        let history = vec![
17010            ChatMessage::system("sys"),
17011            ChatMessage::assistant(
17012                r#"<toolcall>
17013{"name":"shell","arguments":{"command":"date"}}
17014</toolcall>"#,
17015            ),
17016            ChatMessage::assistant(
17017                r#"{"content":null,"tool_calls":[{"id":"1","name":"web_search","arguments":"{}"}]}"#,
17018            ),
17019        ];
17020
17021        let summary = extract_tool_context_summary(&history, 1);
17022        assert_eq!(summary, "[Used tools: shell, web_search]");
17023    }
17024
17025    #[test]
17026    fn extract_tool_context_summary_collects_prompt_mode_tool_result_names() {
17027        let history = vec![
17028            ChatMessage::system("sys"),
17029            ChatMessage::assistant("Using markdown tool call fence"),
17030            ChatMessage::user(
17031                r#"[Tool results]
17032<tool_result name="http_request">
17033{"status":200}
17034</tool_result>
17035<tool_result name="shell">
17036Mon Feb 20
17037</tool_result>"#,
17038            ),
17039        ];
17040
17041        let summary = extract_tool_context_summary(&history, 1);
17042        assert_eq!(summary, "[Used tools: http_request, shell]");
17043    }
17044
17045    #[test]
17046    fn extract_tool_context_summary_respects_start_index() {
17047        let history = vec![
17048            ChatMessage::assistant(
17049                r#"<tool_call>
17050{"name":"stale_tool","arguments":{}}
17051</tool_call>"#,
17052            ),
17053            ChatMessage::assistant(
17054                r#"<tool_call>
17055{"name":"fresh_tool","arguments":{}}
17056</tool_call>"#,
17057            ),
17058        ];
17059
17060        let summary = extract_tool_context_summary(&history, 1);
17061        assert_eq!(summary, "[Used tools: fresh_tool]");
17062    }
17063
17064    #[test]
17065    fn strip_isolated_tool_json_artifacts_removes_tool_calls_and_results() {
17066        let mut known_tools = HashSet::new();
17067        known_tools.insert("schedule".to_string());
17068
17069        let input = r#"{"name":"schedule","parameters":{"action":"create","message":"test"}}
17070{"name":"schedule","parameters":{"action":"cancel","task_id":"test"}}
17071Let me create the reminder properly:
17072{"name":"schedule","parameters":{"action":"create","message":"Go to sleep"}}
17073{"result":{"task_id":"abc","status":"scheduled"}}
17074Done reminder set for 1:38 AM."#;
17075
17076        let result = strip_isolated_tool_json_artifacts(input, &known_tools);
17077        let normalized = result
17078            .lines()
17079            .filter(|line| !line.trim().is_empty())
17080            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
17081            .join("\n");
17082        assert_eq!(
17083            normalized,
17084            "Let me create the reminder properly:\nDone reminder set for 1:38 AM."
17085        );
17086    }
17087
17088    #[test]
17089    fn strip_isolated_tool_json_artifacts_preserves_non_tool_json() {
17090        let mut known_tools = HashSet::new();
17091        known_tools.insert("shell".to_string());
17092
17093        let input = r#"{"name":"profile","parameters":{"timezone":"UTC"}}
17094This is an example JSON object for profile settings."#;
17095
17096        let result = strip_isolated_tool_json_artifacts(input, &known_tools);
17097        assert_eq!(result, input);
17098    }
17099
17100    // ── AIEOS Identity Tests (Issue #168) ─────────────────────────
17101
17102    #[test]
17103    fn aieos_identity_from_file() {
17104        use tempfile::TempDir;
17105        use zeroclaw_config::schema::IdentityConfig;
17106
17107        let tmp = TempDir::new().unwrap();
17108        let identity_path = tmp.path().join("aieos_identity.json");
17109
17110        // Write AIEOS identity file
17111        let aieos_json = r#"{
17112            "identity": {
17113                "names": {"first": "Nova", "nickname": "Nov"},
17114                "bio": "A helpful AI assistant.",
17115                "origin": "Silicon Valley"
17116            },
17117            "psychology": {
17118                "mbti": "INTJ",
17119                "moral_compass": ["Be helpful", "Do no harm"]
17120            },
17121            "linguistics": {
17122                "style": "concise",
17123                "formality": "casual"
17124            }
17125        }"#;
17126        std::fs::write(&identity_path, aieos_json).unwrap();
17127
17128        // Create identity config pointing to the file
17129        let config = IdentityConfig {
17130            format: "aieos".into(),
17131            aieos_path: Some("aieos_identity.json".into()),
17132            aieos_inline: None,
17133        };
17134
17135        let prompt = build_system_prompt(tmp.path(), "model", &[], &[], Some(&config), None);
17136
17137        // Should contain AIEOS sections
17138        assert!(prompt.contains("## Identity"));
17139        assert!(prompt.contains("**Name:** Nova"));
17140        assert!(prompt.contains("**Nickname:** Nov"));
17141        assert!(prompt.contains("**Bio:** A helpful AI assistant."));
17142        assert!(prompt.contains("**Origin:** Silicon Valley"));
17143
17144        assert!(prompt.contains("## Personality"));
17145        assert!(prompt.contains("**MBTI:** INTJ"));
17146        assert!(prompt.contains("**Moral Compass:**"));
17147        assert!(prompt.contains("- Be helpful"));
17148
17149        assert!(prompt.contains("## Communication Style"));
17150        assert!(prompt.contains("**Style:** concise"));
17151        assert!(prompt.contains("**Formality Level:** casual"));
17152
17153        // Should NOT contain OpenClaw bootstrap file headers
17154        assert!(!prompt.contains("### SOUL.md"));
17155        assert!(!prompt.contains("### IDENTITY.md"));
17156        assert!(!prompt.contains("[File not found"));
17157    }
17158
17159    #[test]
17160    fn aieos_identity_from_inline() {
17161        use zeroclaw_config::schema::IdentityConfig;
17162
17163        let config = IdentityConfig {
17164            format: "aieos".into(),
17165            aieos_path: None,
17166            aieos_inline: Some(r#"{"identity":{"names":{"first":"Claw"}}}"#.into()),
17167        };
17168
17169        let prompt = build_system_prompt(
17170            std::env::temp_dir().as_path(),
17171            "model",
17172            &[],
17173            &[],
17174            Some(&config),
17175            None,
17176        );
17177
17178        assert!(prompt.contains("**Name:** Claw"));
17179        assert!(prompt.contains("## Identity"));
17180    }
17181
17182    #[test]
17183    fn aieos_fallback_to_openclaw_on_parse_error() {
17184        use zeroclaw_config::schema::IdentityConfig;
17185
17186        let config = IdentityConfig {
17187            format: "aieos".into(),
17188            aieos_path: Some("nonexistent.json".into()),
17189            aieos_inline: None,
17190        };
17191
17192        let ws = make_workspace();
17193        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], Some(&config), None);
17194
17195        // Should fall back to OpenClaw format when AIEOS file is not found
17196        // (Error is logged to stderr with filename, not included in prompt)
17197        assert!(prompt.contains("### SOUL.md"));
17198    }
17199
17200    #[test]
17201    fn aieos_empty_uses_openclaw() {
17202        use zeroclaw_config::schema::IdentityConfig;
17203
17204        // Format is "aieos" but neither path nor inline is set
17205        let config = IdentityConfig {
17206            format: "aieos".into(),
17207            aieos_path: None,
17208            aieos_inline: None,
17209        };
17210
17211        let ws = make_workspace();
17212        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], Some(&config), None);
17213
17214        // Should use OpenClaw format (not configured for AIEOS)
17215        assert!(prompt.contains("### SOUL.md"));
17216        assert!(prompt.contains("Be helpful"));
17217    }
17218
17219    #[test]
17220    fn openclaw_format_uses_bootstrap_files() {
17221        use zeroclaw_config::schema::IdentityConfig;
17222
17223        let config = IdentityConfig {
17224            format: "openclaw".into(),
17225            aieos_path: Some("identity.json".into()),
17226            aieos_inline: None,
17227        };
17228
17229        let ws = make_workspace();
17230        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], Some(&config), None);
17231
17232        // Should use OpenClaw format even if aieos_path is set
17233        assert!(prompt.contains("### SOUL.md"));
17234        assert!(prompt.contains("Be helpful"));
17235        assert!(!prompt.contains("## Identity"));
17236    }
17237
17238    #[test]
17239    fn none_identity_config_uses_openclaw() {
17240        let ws = make_workspace();
17241        // Pass None for identity config
17242        let prompt = build_system_prompt(ws.path(), "model", &[], &[], None, None);
17243
17244        // Should use OpenClaw format
17245        assert!(prompt.contains("### SOUL.md"));
17246        assert!(prompt.contains("Be helpful"));
17247    }

17249    #[test]
17250    fn classify_health_ok_true() {
17251        let state = classify_health_result(&Ok(true));
17252        assert_eq!(state, ChannelHealthState::Healthy);
17253    }
17254
17255    #[test]
17256    fn classify_health_ok_false() {
17257        let state = classify_health_result(&Ok(false));
17258        assert_eq!(state, ChannelHealthState::Unhealthy);
17259    }
17260
17261    #[tokio::test]
17262    async fn classify_health_timeout() {
17263        let result = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(1), async {
17264            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(20)).await;
17265            true
17266        })
17267        .await;
17268        let state = classify_health_result(&result);
17269        assert_eq!(state, ChannelHealthState::Timeout);
17270    }
17271
17272    #[cfg(feature = "channel-matrix")]
17273    #[test]
17274    fn matrix_state_dir_is_distinct_per_alias() {
17275        // Regression: two [channels.matrix.<alias>] blocks previously resolved
17276        // to the same <config>/state/matrix dir, so the second listener to
17277        // start restored the first's session.json and ran as the wrong Matrix
17278        // account. The alias component must keep them separate.
17279        let config_path = std::path::Path::new("/home/u/.zeroclaw/config.toml");
17280        let clamps = matrix_state_dir(config_path, "clamps");
17281        let bender = matrix_state_dir(config_path, "bender");
17282        assert_ne!(
17283            clamps, bender,
17284            "distinct matrix aliases must not share a state dir"
17285        );
17286        assert_eq!(
17287            clamps,
17288            std::path::Path::new("/home/u/.zeroclaw/state/matrix/clamps")
17289        );
17290        assert_eq!(
17291            bender,
17292            std::path::Path::new("/home/u/.zeroclaw/state/matrix/bender")
17293        );
17294    }
17295
17296    #[cfg(feature = "channel-mattermost")]
17297    #[test]
17298    fn collect_configured_channels_includes_mattermost_when_configured() {
17299        let mut config = Config::default();
17300        config.channels.mattermost.insert(
17301            "default".to_string(),
17302            zeroclaw_config::schema::MattermostConfig {
17303                enabled: true,
17304                url: "https://mattermost.example.com".to_string(),
17305                bot_token: Some("test-token".to_string()),
17306                login_id: None,
17307                password: None,
17308                channel_ids: vec!["channel-1".to_string()],
17309                team_ids: vec![],
17310                discover_dms: None,
17311                thread_replies: Some(true),
17312                mention_only: Some(false),
17313                interrupt_on_new_message: false,
17314                proxy_url: None,
17315                excluded_tools: vec![],
17316                reply_min_interval_secs: 0,
17317                reply_queue_depth_max: 0,
17318            },
17319        );
17320        // A channel is only collected when an enabled agent references it.
17321        config.agents.insert(
17322            "mattermost-default".to_string(),
17323            zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig {
17324                channels: vec!["mattermost.default".into()],
17325                ..Default::default()
17326            },
17327        );
17328
17329        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
17330        let channels = collect_configured_channels(&config_arc, "test", &[]);
17331
17332        assert!(
17333            channels
17334                .iter()
17335                .any(|entry| entry.display_name == "Mattermost")
17336        );
17337        assert!(
17338            channels
17339                .iter()
17340                .any(|entry| entry.channel.name() == "mattermost")
17341        );
17342    }
17343
17344    #[cfg(feature = "channel-mattermost")]
17345    #[test]
17346    fn collect_configured_channels_falls_back_when_agent_bindings_missing() {
17347        let mut config = Config::default();
17348        config.channels.mattermost.insert(
17349            "default".to_string(),
17350            zeroclaw_config::schema::MattermostConfig {
17351                enabled: true,
17352                url: "https://mattermost.example.com".to_string(),
17353                bot_token: Some("test-token".to_string()),
17354                login_id: None,
17355                password: None,
17356                channel_ids: vec!["channel-1".to_string()],
17357                team_ids: vec![],
17358                discover_dms: None,
17359                thread_replies: Some(true),
17360                mention_only: Some(false),
17361                interrupt_on_new_message: false,
17362                proxy_url: None,
17363                excluded_tools: vec![],
17364                reply_min_interval_secs: 0,
17365                reply_queue_depth_max: 0,
17366            },
17367        );
17368        config.agents.clear();
17369        config.agents.insert(
17370            "legacy".to_string(),
17371            zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig {
17372                enabled: true,
17373                channels: vec![],
17374                ..Default::default()
17375            },
17376        );
17377
17378        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
17379        let channels = collect_configured_channels(&config_arc, "test", &[]);
17380
17381        assert!(
17382            channels
17383                .iter()
17384                .any(|entry| entry.display_name == "Mattermost"),
17385            "enabled channels should still load when no enabled agent declares channel bindings"
17386        );
17387    }
17388
17389    #[cfg(feature = "channel-email")]
17390    #[test]
17391    fn collect_configured_channels_skips_unreferenced_email() {
17392        let mut config = Config::default();
17393        config.channels.email.insert(
17394            "default".to_string(),
17395            zeroclaw_config::scattered_types::EmailConfig::default(),
17396        );
17397
17398        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
17399        let channels = collect_configured_channels(&config_arc, "test", &[]);
17400        assert!(
17401            !channels.iter().any(|entry| entry.display_name == "Email"),
17402            "email with no agent reference should not be collected"
17403        );
17404    }
17405
17406    #[cfg(feature = "channel-voice-call")]
17407    #[test]
17408    fn collect_configured_channels_skips_unreferenced_voice_call() {
17409        let mut config = Config::default();
17410        config.channels.voice_call.insert(
17411            "default".to_string(),
17412            zeroclaw_config::scattered_types::VoiceCallConfig::default(),
17413        );
17414
17415        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
17416        let channels = collect_configured_channels(&config_arc, "test", &[]);
17417        assert!(
17418            !channels
17419                .iter()
17420                .any(|entry| entry.display_name == "Voice Call"),
17421            "voice-call with no agent reference should not be collected"
17422        );
17423    }
17424
17425    struct AlwaysFailChannel {
17426        name: &'static str,
17427        calls: Arc<AtomicUsize>,
17428    }
17429
17430    struct BlockUntilClosedChannel {
17431        name: String,
17432        calls: Arc<AtomicUsize>,
17433    }
17434
17435    struct FailOnceChannel {
17436        name: String,
17437        calls: Arc<AtomicUsize>,
17438        err: Mutex<Option<anyhow::Error>>,
17439    }
17440
17441    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for AlwaysFailChannel {
17442        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
17443            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Channel(
17444                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ChannelKind::Webhook,
17445            )
17446        }
17447        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
17448            "test"
17449        }
17450    }
17451
17452    #[async_trait::async_trait]
17453    impl Channel for AlwaysFailChannel {
17454        fn name(&self) -> &str {
17455            self.name
17456        }
17457
