17458        async fn send(&self, _message: &SendMessage) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
17459            Ok(())
17460        }
17461
17462        async fn listen(
17463            &self,
17464            _tx: tokio::sync::mpsc::Sender<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>,
17465        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
17466            self.calls.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
17467            anyhow::bail!("listen boom")
17468        }
17469    }
17470
17471    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for BlockUntilClosedChannel {
17472        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
17473            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Channel(
17474                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ChannelKind::Webhook,
17475            )
17476        }
17477        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
17478            "test"
17479        }
17480    }
17481
17482    impl ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Attributable for FailOnceChannel {
17483        fn role(&self) -> ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role {
17484            ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::Role::Channel(
17485                ::zeroclaw_api::attribution::ChannelKind::Discord,
17486            )
17487        }
17488
17489        fn alias(&self) -> &str {
17490            "default"
17491        }
17492    }
17493
17494    #[async_trait::async_trait]
17495    impl Channel for BlockUntilClosedChannel {
17496        fn name(&self) -> &str {
17497            &self.name
17498        }
17499
17500        async fn send(&self, _message: &SendMessage) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
17501            Ok(())
17502        }
17503
17504        async fn listen(
17505            &self,
17506            tx: tokio::sync::mpsc::Sender<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>,
17507        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
17508            self.calls.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
17509            tx.closed().await;
17510            Ok(())
17511        }
17512    }
17513
17514    #[async_trait::async_trait]
17515    impl Channel for FailOnceChannel {
17516        fn name(&self) -> &str {
17517            &self.name
17518        }
17519
17520        async fn send(&self, _message: &SendMessage) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
17521            Ok(())
17522        }
17523
17524        async fn listen(
17525            &self,
17526            _tx: tokio::sync::mpsc::Sender<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>,
17527        ) -> anyhow::Result<()> {
17528            self.calls.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
17529            if let Some(err) = self.err.lock().unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner()).take() {
17530                return Err(err);
17531            }
17532            Ok(())
17533        }
17534    }
17535
17536    #[tokio::test]
17537    async fn supervised_listener_marks_error_and_restarts_on_failures() {
17538        let calls = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
17539        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = Arc::new(AlwaysFailChannel {
17540            name: "test-supervised-fail",
17541            calls: Arc::clone(&calls),
17542        });
17543
17544        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(1);
17545        let cancel = tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken::new();
17546        let handle = spawn_supervised_listener(channel, None, tx, 1, 1, cancel.clone());
17547
17548        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(80)).await;
17549        drop(rx);
17550        cancel.cancel();
17551        let _ = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(500), handle).await;
17552
17553        let snapshot = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json();
17554        let component = &snapshot["components"]["channel:test-supervised-fail"];
17555        assert_eq!(component["status"], "error");
17556        assert!(component["restart_count"].as_u64().unwrap_or(0) >= 1);
17557        assert!(
17558            component["last_error"]
17559                .as_str()
17560                .unwrap_or("")
17561                .contains("listen boom")
17562        );
17563        assert!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst) >= 1);
17564    }
17565
17566    #[tokio::test]
17567    async fn supervised_listener_refreshes_health_while_running() {
17568        let calls = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
17569        let channel_name = format!("test-supervised-heartbeat-{}", uuid::Uuid::new_v4());
17570        let component_name = format!("channel:{channel_name}");
17571        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = Arc::new(BlockUntilClosedChannel {
17572            name: channel_name,
17573            calls: Arc::clone(&calls),
17574        });
17575
17576        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(1);
17577        let cancel = tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken::new();
17578        let handle = spawn_supervised_listener_with_health_interval(
17579            channel,
17580            None,
17581            tx,
17582            1,
17583            1,
17584            Duration::from_millis(20),
17585            cancel.clone(),
17586        );
17587
17588        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(35)).await;
17589        let first_last_ok = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json()["components"]
17590            [&component_name]["last_ok"]
17591            .as_str()
17592            .unwrap_or("")
17593            .to_string();
17594        assert!(!first_last_ok.is_empty());
17595
17596        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(70)).await;
17597        let second_last_ok = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json()["components"]
17598            [&component_name]["last_ok"]
17599            .as_str()
17600            .unwrap_or("")
17601            .to_string();
17602        let first = chrono::DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&first_last_ok)
17603            .expect("last_ok should be valid RFC3339");
17604        let second = chrono::DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&second_last_ok)
17605            .expect("last_ok should be valid RFC3339");
17606        assert!(second > first, "expected periodic health heartbeat refresh");
17607
17608        cancel.cancel();
17609        let join = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(500), handle).await;
17610        assert!(join.is_ok(), "listener should stop on cancel");
17611        assert!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst) >= 1);
17612        drop(rx);
17613    }
17614
17615    #[tokio::test]
17616    async fn supervised_listener_does_not_restart_on_non_retryable_discord_http_error() {
17617        let calls = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
17618        let channel_name = format!("discord-{}", uuid::Uuid::new_v4());
17619        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = Arc::new(FailOnceChannel {
17620            name: channel_name,
17621            calls: Arc::clone(&calls),
17622            err: Mutex::new(Some(anyhow::Error::msg("401 Unauthorized"))),
17623        });
17624
17625        let component_name = format!("channel:{}", channel.name());
17626        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(1);
17627        let cancel = tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken::new();
17628        let handle = spawn_supervised_listener(channel, None, tx, 1, 1, cancel.clone());
17629
17630        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(80)).await;
17631        let snapshot = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json();
17632        let component = &snapshot["components"][&component_name];
17633        assert_eq!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 1);
17634        assert_eq!(component["status"], "error");
17635        assert_eq!(component["restart_count"].as_u64().unwrap_or(0), 0);
17636        assert!(
17637            component["last_error"]
17638                .as_str()
17639                .unwrap_or("")
17640                .contains("401 Unauthorized")
17641        );
17642
17643        drop(rx);
17644        cancel.cancel();
17645        let join = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(500), handle).await;
17646        assert!(join.is_ok(), "listener should stop on cancel");
17647        assert_eq!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 1);
17648    }
17649
17650    #[cfg(feature = "channel-discord")]
17651    #[tokio::test]
17652    async fn supervised_listener_enters_retry_path_on_discord_gateway_rate_limit() {
17653        let calls = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
17654        let channel_name = format!("discord-{}", uuid::Uuid::new_v4());
17655        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = Arc::new(FailOnceChannel {
17656            name: channel_name,
17657            calls: Arc::clone(&calls),
17658            err: Mutex::new(Some(anyhow::Error::msg(
17659                "discord gateway preflight rate-limited (429 Too Many Requests)",
17660            ))),
17661        });
17662
17663        let component_name = format!("channel:{}", channel.name());
17664        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(1);
17665        let cancel = tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken::new();
17666        let handle = spawn_supervised_listener(channel, None, tx, 1, 1, cancel.clone());
17667
17668        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(80)).await;
17669        let snapshot = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json();
17670        let component = &snapshot["components"][&component_name];
17671        assert_eq!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 1);
17672        assert_eq!(component["status"], "error");
17673        assert!(
17674            component["last_error"]
17675                .as_str()
17676                .unwrap_or("")
17677                .contains("429 Too Many Requests")
17678        );
17679        assert!(
17680            component["restart_count"].as_u64().unwrap_or(0) >= 1,
17681            "Discord gateway 429 should back off through the retry path instead of parking"
17682        );
17683
17684        drop(rx);
17685        cancel.cancel();
17686        let join = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(500), handle).await;
17687        assert!(join.is_ok(), "listener should stop on cancel");
17688        assert_eq!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 1);
17689    }
17690
17691    #[cfg(feature = "channel-discord")]
17692    #[tokio::test]
17693    async fn supervised_listener_does_not_restart_on_fatal_discord_gateway_close_code() {
17694        let calls = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
17695        let channel_name = format!("discord-{}", uuid::Uuid::new_v4());
17696        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = Arc::new(FailOnceChannel {
17697            name: channel_name,
17698            calls: Arc::clone(&calls),
17699            err: Mutex::new(Some(anyhow::Error::new(
17700                crate::discord::DiscordListenerFatalError::new(
17701                    "discord gateway closed with fatal code 4014: disallowed intent(s)",
17702                ),
17703            ))),
17704        });
17705
17706        let component_name = format!("channel:{}", channel.name());
17707        let (tx, rx) = tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(1);
17708        let cancel = tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken::new();
17709        let handle = spawn_supervised_listener(channel, None, tx, 1, 1, cancel.clone());
17710
17711        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(80)).await;
17712        let snapshot = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json();
17713        let component = &snapshot["components"][&component_name];
17714        assert_eq!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 1);
17715        assert_eq!(component["status"], "error");
17716        assert_eq!(component["restart_count"].as_u64().unwrap_or(0), 0);
17717        assert!(
17718            component["last_error"]
17719                .as_str()
17720                .unwrap_or("")
17721                .contains("fatal code 4014")
17722        );
17723
17724        drop(rx);
17725        cancel.cancel();
17726        let join = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(500), handle).await;
17727        assert!(join.is_ok(), "listener should stop on cancel");
17728        assert_eq!(calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 1);
17729    }
17730
17731    #[tokio::test]
17732    async fn non_retryable_listener_error_does_not_stop_other_listener_health() {
17733        let failing_calls = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
17734        let healthy_calls = Arc::new(AtomicUsize::new(0));
17735        let failing_name = format!("discord-{}", uuid::Uuid::new_v4());
17736        let healthy_name = format!("test-supervised-sibling-{}", uuid::Uuid::new_v4());
17737        let failing_component = format!("channel:{failing_name}");
17738        let healthy_component = format!("channel:{healthy_name}");
17739
17740        let failing_channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = Arc::new(FailOnceChannel {
17741            name: failing_name,
17742            calls: Arc::clone(&failing_calls),
17743            err: Mutex::new(Some(anyhow::Error::msg("401 Unauthorized"))),
17744        });
17745        let healthy_channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = Arc::new(BlockUntilClosedChannel {
17746            name: healthy_name,
17747            calls: Arc::clone(&healthy_calls),
17748        });
17749
17750        let (failing_tx, failing_rx) =
17751            tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(1);
17752        let (healthy_tx, healthy_rx) =
17753            tokio::sync::mpsc::channel::<zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage>(1);
17754        let cancel = tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken::new();
17755        let failing_handle =
17756            spawn_supervised_listener(failing_channel, None, failing_tx, 1, 1, cancel.clone());
17757        let healthy_handle = spawn_supervised_listener_with_health_interval(
17758            healthy_channel,
17759            None,
17760            healthy_tx,
17761            1,
17762            1,
17763            Duration::from_millis(20),
17764            cancel.clone(),
17765        );
17766
17767        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(80)).await;
17768
17769        let first_last_ok = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json()["components"]
17770            [&healthy_component]["last_ok"]
17771            .as_str()
17772            .unwrap_or("")
17773            .to_string();
17774        assert!(
17775            !first_last_ok.is_empty(),
17776            "healthy sibling should report health"
17777        );
17778
17779        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(70)).await;
17780
17781        let snapshot = zeroclaw_runtime::health::snapshot_json();
17782        let failing = &snapshot["components"][&failing_component];
17783        let healthy = &snapshot["components"][&healthy_component];
17784        let second_last_ok = healthy["last_ok"].as_str().unwrap_or("").to_string();
17785        let first = chrono::DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&first_last_ok)
17786            .expect("healthy sibling last_ok should be valid RFC3339");
17787        let second = chrono::DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&second_last_ok)
17788            .expect("healthy sibling last_ok should be valid RFC3339");
17789
17790        assert_eq!(failing_calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst), 1);
17791        assert_eq!(failing["status"], "error");
17792        assert_eq!(failing["restart_count"].as_u64().unwrap_or(0), 0);
17793        assert!(
17794            failing["last_error"]
17795                .as_str()
17796                .unwrap_or("")
17797                .contains("401 Unauthorized")
17798        );
17799        assert_eq!(healthy["status"], "ok");
17800        assert!(
17801            second > first,
17802            "healthy sibling should keep refreshing health"
17803        );
17804        assert!(healthy_calls.load(Ordering::SeqCst) >= 1);
17805
17806        drop(failing_rx);
17807        drop(healthy_rx);
17808        cancel.cancel();
17809        let failing_join = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(500), failing_handle).await;
17810        let healthy_join = tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_millis(500), healthy_handle).await;
17811        assert!(
17812            failing_join.is_ok(),
17813            "non-retryable listener should stop on cancel"
17814        );
17815        assert!(
17816            healthy_join.is_ok(),
17817            "healthy sibling listener should stop on cancel"
17818        );
17819    }
17820
17821    #[test]
17822    fn maybe_restart_daemon_systemd_args_regression() {
17823        assert_eq!(
17824            SYSTEMD_STATUS_ARGS,
17825            ["--user", "is-active", "zeroclaw.service"]
17826        );
17827        assert_eq!(
17828            SYSTEMD_RESTART_ARGS,
17829            ["--user", "restart", "zeroclaw.service"]
17830        );
17831    }
17832
17833    #[test]
17834    fn maybe_restart_daemon_openrc_args_regression() {
17835        assert_eq!(OPENRC_STATUS_ARGS, ["zeroclaw", "status"]);
17836        assert_eq!(OPENRC_RESTART_ARGS, ["zeroclaw", "restart"]);
17837    }
17838
17839    #[test]
17840    fn normalize_merges_consecutive_user_turns() {
17841        let turns = vec![ChatMessage::user("hello"), ChatMessage::user("world")];
17842        let result = normalize_cached_channel_turns(turns);
17843        assert_eq!(result.len(), 1);
17844        assert_eq!(result[0].role, "user");
17845        assert_eq!(result[0].content, "hello\n\nworld");
17846    }
17847
17848    #[test]
17849    fn normalize_preserves_strict_alternation() {
17850        let turns = vec![
17851            ChatMessage::user("hello"),
17852            ChatMessage::assistant("hi"),
17853            ChatMessage::user("bye"),
17854        ];
17855        let result = normalize_cached_channel_turns(turns);
17856        assert_eq!(result.len(), 3);
17857        assert_eq!(result[0].content, "hello");
17858        assert_eq!(result[1].content, "hi");
17859        assert_eq!(result[2].content, "bye");
17860    }
17861
17862    #[test]
17863    fn normalize_merges_multiple_consecutive_user_turns() {
17864        let turns = vec![
17865            ChatMessage::user("a"),
17866            ChatMessage::user("b"),
17867            ChatMessage::user("c"),
17868        ];
17869        let result = normalize_cached_channel_turns(turns);
17870        assert_eq!(result.len(), 1);
17871        assert_eq!(result[0].role, "user");
17872        assert_eq!(result[0].content, "a\n\nb\n\nc");
17873    }
17874
17875    #[test]
17876    fn normalize_empty_input() {
17877        let result = normalize_cached_channel_turns(vec![]);
17878        assert!(result.is_empty());
17879    }
17880
17881    #[test]
17882    fn channel_history_content_for_user_turn_strips_inline_image_payload() {
17883        let content =
17884            "[Image: sticker.webp attached]\n[IMAGE:data:image/png;base64,abcd]\n\nwhat is this?";
17885
17886        let history_content = channel_history_content_for_user_turn(content);
17887
17888        assert_eq!(
17889            history_content,
17890            "[Image: sticker.webp attached]\n\nwhat is this?"
17891        );
17892        assert!(!history_content.contains("[IMAGE:data:"));
17893        assert!(!history_content.contains("abcd"));
17894    }
17895
17896    #[test]
17897    fn channel_history_content_for_image_only_turn_keeps_compact_placeholder() {
17898        let history_content =
17899            channel_history_content_for_user_turn("[IMAGE:data:image/png;base64,abcd]");
17900
17901        assert_eq!(
17902            history_content,
17903            "[Image attachment processed by vision model]"
17904        );
17905    }
17906
17907    #[test]
17908    fn strip_historical_image_payloads_preserves_current_turn_payload() {
17909        let mut turns = vec![
17910            ChatMessage::user("[Image: old.png attached]\n[IMAGE:data:image/png;base64,old]"),
17911            ChatMessage::assistant("I saw the old image."),
17912            ChatMessage::user("[Image: now.png attached]\n[IMAGE:data:image/png;base64,current]"),
17913        ];
17914
17915        strip_historical_image_payloads(&mut turns);
17916
17917        assert_eq!(turns.len(), 3);
17918        assert!(turns[0].content.contains("[Image: old.png attached]"));
17919        assert!(!turns[0].content.contains("[IMAGE:data:"));
17920        assert!(!turns[0].content.contains("base64,old"));
17921        assert!(
17922            turns[2]
17923                .content
17924                .contains("[IMAGE:data:image/png;base64,current]")
17925        );
17926    }
17927
17928    // ── E2E: photo [IMAGE:] marker rejected by non-vision model_provider ───
17929
17930    /// End-to-end test: a photo attachment message (containing `[IMAGE:]`
17931    /// marker) sent through `process_channel_message` with a non-vision
17932    /// model_provider must produce a `"⚠️ Error: …does not support vision"` reply
17933    /// on the recording channel — no real Telegram or LLM API required.
17934    #[tokio::test]
17935    async fn e2e_photo_attachment_rejected_by_non_vision_provider() {
17936        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
17937        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
17938
17939        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
17940        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
17941
17942        // DummyModelProvider has default capabilities (vision: false).
17943        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
17944            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
17945            model_provider: Arc::new(DummyModelProvider),
17946            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("dummy".to_string()),
17947            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
17948            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
17949            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
17950            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
17951                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
17952                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
17953                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
17954                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
17955                ),
17956            ),
17957            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
17958            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
17959            system_prompt: Arc::new("You are a helpful assistant.".to_string()),
17960            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
17961            temperature: Some(0.0),
17962            auto_save_memory: false,
17963            max_tool_iterations: 5,
17964            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
17965            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
17966                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
17967            ))),
17968            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
17969            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
17970            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
17971            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
17972            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
17973            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
17974            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
17975            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
17976            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
17977                telegram: false,
17978                slack: false,
17979                discord: false,
17980                mattermost: false,
17981                matrix: false,
17982                whatsapp: false,
17983            },
17984            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
17985            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
17986            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
17987            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
17988            hooks: None,
17989            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
17990            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
17991            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
17992            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
17993            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
17994            ack_reactions: true,
17995            show_tool_calls: true,
17996            session_store: None,
17997            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
17998                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
17999            )),
18000            activated_tools: None,
18001            cost_tracking: None,
18002            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
18003            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
18004            context_token_budget: 0,
18005            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
18006                Duration::ZERO,
18007            )),
18008            receipt_generator: None,
18009            show_receipts_in_response: false,
18010            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18011            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18012        });
18013
18014        // Simulate a photo attachment message with [IMAGE:] marker.
18015        process_channel_message(
18016            runtime_ctx,
18017            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18018                id: "msg-photo-1".to_string(),
18019                sender: "zeroclaw_user".to_string(),
18020                reply_target: "chat-photo".to_string(),
18021                content: "[IMAGE:/tmp/workspace/photo_99_1.jpg]\n\nWhat is this?".to_string(),
18022                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
18023                channel_alias: None,
18024                timestamp: 1,
18025                thread_ts: None,
18026                interruption_scope_id: None,
18027                attachments: vec![],
18028                subject: None,
18029            },
18030            CancellationToken::new(),
18031        )
18032        .await;
18033
18034        let sent = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
18035        assert_eq!(sent.len(), 1, "expected exactly one reply message");
18036        assert!(
18037            sent[0].contains("does not support vision"),
18038            "reply must mention vision capability error, got: {}",
18039            sent[0]
18040        );
18041        assert!(
18042            sent[0].contains("⚠️ Error"),
18043            "reply must start with error prefix, got: {}",
18044            sent[0]
18045        );
18046    }
18047
18048    #[tokio::test]
18049    async fn e2e_failed_vision_turn_does_not_poison_follow_up_text_turn() {
18050        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
18051        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
18052
18053        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
18054        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
18055
18056        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
18057            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
18058            model_provider: Arc::new(DummyModelProvider),
18059            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("dummy".to_string()),
18060            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
18061            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
18062            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18063            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
18064                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
18065                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18066                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
18067                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
18068                ),
18069            ),
18070            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
18071            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
18072            system_prompt: Arc::new("You are a helpful assistant.".to_string()),
18073            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
18074            temperature: Some(0.0),
18075            auto_save_memory: false,
18076            max_tool_iterations: 5,
18077            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
18078            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
18079                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
18080            ))),
18081            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
18082            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18083            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18084            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
18085            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
18086            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
18087            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
18088            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
18089            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
18090                telegram: false,
18091                slack: false,
18092                discord: false,
18093                mattermost: false,
18094                matrix: false,
18095                whatsapp: false,
18096            },
18097            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
18098            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
18099            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
18100            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
18101            hooks: None,
18102            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18103            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
18104            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18105            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18106            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
18107            ack_reactions: true,
18108            show_tool_calls: true,
18109            session_store: None,
18110            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
18111                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
18112            )),
18113            activated_tools: None,
18114            cost_tracking: None,
18115            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
18116            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
18117            context_token_budget: 0,
18118            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
18119                Duration::ZERO,
18120            )),
18121            receipt_generator: None,
18122            show_receipts_in_response: false,
18123            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18124            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18125        });
18126
18127        process_channel_message(
18128            Arc::clone(&runtime_ctx),
18129            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18130                id: "msg-photo-1".to_string(),
18131                sender: "zeroclaw_user".to_string(),
18132                reply_target: "chat-photo".to_string(),
18133                content: "[IMAGE:/tmp/workspace/photo_99_1.jpg]\n\nWhat is this?".to_string(),
18134                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
18135                channel_alias: None,
18136                timestamp: 1,
18137                thread_ts: None,
18138                interruption_scope_id: None,
18139                attachments: vec![],
18140                subject: None,
18141            },
18142            CancellationToken::new(),
18143        )
18144        .await;
18145
18146        process_channel_message(
18147            Arc::clone(&runtime_ctx),
18148            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18149                id: "msg-text-2".to_string(),
18150                sender: "zeroclaw_user".to_string(),
18151                reply_target: "chat-photo".to_string(),
18152                content: "What is WAL?".to_string(),
18153                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
18154                channel_alias: None,
18155                timestamp: 2,
18156                thread_ts: None,
18157                interruption_scope_id: None,
18158                attachments: vec![],
18159                subject: None,
18160            },
18161            CancellationToken::new(),
18162        )
18163        .await;
18164
18165        let sent = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
18166        assert_eq!(sent.len(), 2, "expected one error and one successful reply");
18167        assert!(
18168            sent[0].contains("does not support vision"),
18169            "first reply must mention vision capability error, got: {}",
18170            sent[0]
18171        );
18172        assert!(
18173            sent[1].ends_with(":ok"),
18174            "second reply should succeed for text-only turn, got: {}",
18175            sent[1]
18176        );
18177        drop(sent);
18178
18179        let histories = runtime_ctx
18180            .conversation_histories
18181            .lock()
18182            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
18183        let turns = histories
18184            .peek("test-channel_chat-photo_zeroclaw_user")
18185            .expect("history should exist for sender");
18186        assert_eq!(turns.len(), 2);
18187        assert_eq!(turns[0].role, "user");
18188        assert!(
18189            turns[0].content.contains("] What is WAL?"),
18190            "follow-up user turn should be timestamped: {}",
18191            turns[0].content
18192        );
18193        assert_eq!(turns[1].role, "assistant");
18194        assert_eq!(turns[1].content, "ok");
18195        assert!(
18196            turns.iter().all(|turn| !turn.content.contains("[IMAGE:")),
18197            "failed vision turn must not persist image marker content"
18198        );
18199    }
18200
18201    #[tokio::test]
18202    async fn e2e_failed_non_retryable_turn_does_not_poison_follow_up_text_turn() {
18203        let channel_impl = Arc::new(RecordingChannel::default());
18204        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
18205
18206        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
18207        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
18208
18209        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
18210            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
18211            model_provider: Arc::new(FormatErrorModelProvider),
18212            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("dummy".to_string()),
18213            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
18214            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
18215            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18216            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
18217                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
18218                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18219                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
18220                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
18221                ),
18222            ),
18223            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
18224            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
18225            system_prompt: Arc::new("You are a helpful assistant.".to_string()),
18226            model: Arc::new("test-model".to_string()),
18227            temperature: Some(0.0),
18228            auto_save_memory: false,
18229            max_tool_iterations: 5,
18230            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
18231            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
18232                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
18233            ))),
18234            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
18235            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18236            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18237            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
18238            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
18239            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
18240            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
18241            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
18242            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
18243                telegram: false,
18244                slack: false,
18245                discord: false,
18246                mattermost: false,
18247                matrix: false,
18248                whatsapp: false,
18249            },
18250            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
18251            hooks: None,
18252            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18253            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
18254            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18255            model_routes: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18256            query_classification: zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig::default(),
18257            ack_reactions: true,
18258            show_tool_calls: true,
18259            session_store: None,
18260            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
18261                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
18262            )),
18263            activated_tools: None,
18264            cost_tracking: None,
18265            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
18266            max_tool_result_chars: 50000,
18267            context_token_budget: 128_000,
18268            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
18269                std::time::Duration::ZERO,
18270            )),
18271            receipt_generator: None,
18272            show_receipts_in_response: false,
18273            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18274            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18275            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
18276            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
18277            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
18278        });
18279
18280        process_channel_message(
18281            Arc::clone(&runtime_ctx),
18282            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18283                id: "msg-bad-1".to_string(),
18284                sender: "zeroclaw_user".to_string(),
18285                reply_target: "chat-format".to_string(),
18286                content: "trigger format error".to_string(),
18287                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
18288                channel_alias: None,
18289                timestamp: 1,
18290                thread_ts: None,
18291                interruption_scope_id: None,
18292                attachments: vec![],
18293                subject: None,
18294            },
18295            CancellationToken::new(),
18296        )
18297        .await;
18298
18299        process_channel_message(
18300            Arc::clone(&runtime_ctx),
18301            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18302                id: "msg-text-2".to_string(),
18303                sender: "zeroclaw_user".to_string(),
18304                reply_target: "chat-format".to_string(),
18305                content: "What is WAL?".to_string(),
18306                channel: "test-channel".to_string(),
18307                channel_alias: None,
18308                timestamp: 2,
18309                thread_ts: None,
18310                interruption_scope_id: None,
18311                attachments: vec![],
18312                subject: None,
18313            },
18314            CancellationToken::new(),
18315        )
18316        .await;
18317
18318        let sent = channel_impl.sent_messages.lock().await;
18319        assert_eq!(sent.len(), 2, "expected one error and one successful reply");
18320        assert!(
18321            sent[0].contains("Format Error"),
18322            "first reply must mention the request format error, got: {}",
18323            sent[0]
18324        );
18325        assert!(
18326            sent[1].ends_with(":ok"),
18327            "second reply should succeed for follow-up text, got: {}",
18328            sent[1]
18329        );
18330        drop(sent);
18331
18332        let histories = runtime_ctx
18333            .conversation_histories
18334            .lock()
18335            .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner());
18336        let turns = histories
18337            .peek("test-channel_chat-format_zeroclaw_user")
18338            .expect("history should exist for sender");
18339        assert_eq!(turns.len(), 2);
18340        assert_eq!(turns[0].role, "user");
18341        assert!(
18342            turns[0].content.contains("] What is WAL?"),
18343            "follow-up user turn should be timestamped: {}",
18344            turns[0].content
18345        );
18346        assert_eq!(turns[1].role, "assistant");
18347        assert_eq!(turns[1].content, "ok");
18348        assert!(
18349            turns
18350                .iter()
18351                .all(|turn| turn.content != "trigger format error"),
18352            "failed non-retryable turn must not persist in history"
18353        );
18354    }
18355
18356    #[test]
18357    fn build_channel_by_id_unknown_channel_returns_error() {
18358        let config = Config::default();
18359        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
18360        match build_channel_by_id(&config_arc, "nonexistent") {
18361            Err(e) => {
18362                let err_msg = e.to_string();
18363                assert!(
18364                    err_msg.contains("Unknown channel"),
18365                    "expected 'Unknown channel' in error, got: {err_msg}"
18366                );
18367            }
18368            Ok(_) => panic!("should fail for unknown channel"),
18369        }
18370    }
18371
18372    // ── Query classification in channel message processing ─────────
18373
18374    #[tokio::test]
18375    async fn process_channel_message_applies_query_classification_route() {
18376        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
18377        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
18378
18379        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
18380        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
18381
18382        let agent_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18383        let agent_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = agent_model_provider_impl.clone();
18384        let vision_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18385        let vision_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = vision_model_provider_impl.clone();
18386
18387        let mut provider_cache_seed: HashMap<String, Arc<dyn ModelProvider>> = HashMap::new();
18388        provider_cache_seed.insert(
18389            "test-provider".to_string(),
18390            Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18391        );
18392        provider_cache_seed.insert("vision-provider".to_string(), vision_model_provider);
18393
18394        let classification_config = zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig {
18395            enabled: true,
18396            rules: vec![zeroclaw_config::schema::ClassificationRule {
18397                hint: "vision".into(),
18398                keywords: vec!["analyze-image".into()],
18399                ..Default::default()
18400            }],
18401        };
18402
18403        let model_routes = vec![zeroclaw_config::schema::ModelRouteConfig {
18404            hint: "vision".into(),
18405            model_provider: "vision-provider".into(),
18406            model: "gpt-4-vision".into(),
18407            api_key: None,
18408        }];
18409
18410        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
18411            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
18412            model_provider: Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18413            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
18414            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
18415            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
18416            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18417            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
18418                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
18419                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18420                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
18421                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
18422                ),
18423            ),
18424            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
18425            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
18426            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
18427            model: Arc::new("default-model".to_string()),
18428            temperature: Some(0.0),
18429            auto_save_memory: false,
18430            max_tool_iterations: 5,
18431            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
18432            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
18433                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
18434            ))),
18435            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
18436            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(provider_cache_seed)),
18437            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18438            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
18439            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
18440            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
18441            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
18442            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
18443            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
18444                telegram: false,
18445                slack: false,
18446                discord: false,
18447                mattermost: false,
18448                matrix: false,
18449                whatsapp: false,
18450            },
18451            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
18452            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
18453            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
18454            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
18455            hooks: None,
18456            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18457            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
18458            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18459            model_routes: Arc::new(model_routes),
18460            query_classification: classification_config,
18461            ack_reactions: true,
18462            show_tool_calls: true,
18463            session_store: None,
18464            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
18465                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
18466            )),
18467            activated_tools: None,
18468            cost_tracking: None,
18469            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
18470            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
18471            context_token_budget: 0,
18472            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
18473                Duration::ZERO,
18474            )),
18475            receipt_generator: None,
18476            show_receipts_in_response: false,
18477            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18478            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18479        });
18480
18481        process_channel_message(
18482            runtime_ctx,
18483            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18484                id: "msg-qc-1".to_string(),
18485                sender: "alice".to_string(),
18486                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
18487                content: "please analyze-image from the dataset".to_string(),
18488                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
18489                channel_alias: None,
18490                timestamp: 1,
18491                thread_ts: None,
18492                interruption_scope_id: None,
18493                attachments: vec![],
18494                subject: None,
18495            },
18496            CancellationToken::new(),
18497        )
18498        .await;
18499
18500        // Vision model_provider should have been called instead of the default.
18501        assert_eq!(
18502            agent_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18503            0
18504        );
18505        assert_eq!(
18506            vision_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18507            1
18508        );
18509        assert_eq!(
18510            vision_model_provider_impl
18511                .models
18512                .lock()
18513                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
18514                .as_slice(),
18515            &["gpt-4-vision".to_string()]
18516        );
18517    }
18518
18519    #[tokio::test]
18520    async fn process_channel_message_classification_disabled_uses_default_route() {
18521        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
18522        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
18523
18524        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
18525        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
18526
18527        let agent_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18528        let agent_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = agent_model_provider_impl.clone();
18529        let vision_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18530        let vision_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = vision_model_provider_impl.clone();
18531
18532        let mut provider_cache_seed: HashMap<String, Arc<dyn ModelProvider>> = HashMap::new();
18533        provider_cache_seed.insert(
18534            "test-provider".to_string(),
18535            Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18536        );
18537        provider_cache_seed.insert("vision-provider".to_string(), vision_model_provider);
18538
18539        // Classification is disabled — matching keyword should NOT trigger reroute.
18540        let classification_config = zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig {
18541            enabled: false,
18542            rules: vec![zeroclaw_config::schema::ClassificationRule {
18543                hint: "vision".into(),
18544                keywords: vec!["analyze-image".into()],
18545                ..Default::default()
18546            }],
18547        };
18548
18549        let model_routes = vec![zeroclaw_config::schema::ModelRouteConfig {
18550            hint: "vision".into(),
18551            model_provider: "vision-provider".into(),
18552            model: "gpt-4-vision".into(),
18553            api_key: None,
18554        }];
18555
18556        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
18557            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
18558            model_provider: Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18559            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
18560            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
18561            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
18562            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18563            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
18564                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
18565                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18566                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
18567                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
18568                ),
18569            ),
18570            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
18571            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
18572            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
18573            model: Arc::new("default-model".to_string()),
18574            temperature: Some(0.0),
18575            auto_save_memory: false,
18576            max_tool_iterations: 5,
18577            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
18578            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
18579                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
18580            ))),
18581            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
18582            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(provider_cache_seed)),
18583            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18584            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
18585            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
18586            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
18587            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
18588            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
18589            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
18590                telegram: false,
18591                slack: false,
18592                discord: false,
18593                mattermost: false,
18594                matrix: false,
18595                whatsapp: false,
18596            },
18597            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
18598            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
18599            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
18600            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
18601            hooks: None,
18602            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18603            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
18604            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18605            model_routes: Arc::new(model_routes),
18606            query_classification: classification_config,
18607            ack_reactions: true,
18608            show_tool_calls: true,
18609            session_store: None,
18610            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
18611                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
18612            )),
18613            activated_tools: None,
18614            cost_tracking: None,
18615            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
18616            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
18617            context_token_budget: 0,
18618            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
18619                Duration::ZERO,
18620            )),
18621            receipt_generator: None,
18622            show_receipts_in_response: false,
18623            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18624            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18625        });
18626
18627        process_channel_message(
18628            runtime_ctx,
18629            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18630                id: "msg-qc-disabled".to_string(),
18631                sender: "alice".to_string(),
18632                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
18633                content: "please analyze-image from the dataset".to_string(),
18634                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
18635                channel_alias: None,
18636                timestamp: 1,
18637                thread_ts: None,
18638                interruption_scope_id: None,
18639                attachments: vec![],
18640                subject: None,
18641            },
18642            CancellationToken::new(),
18643        )
18644        .await;
18645
18646        // Default model_provider should be used since classification is disabled.
18647        assert_eq!(
18648            agent_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18649            1
18650        );
18651        assert_eq!(
18652            vision_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18653            0
18654        );
18655    }
18656
18657    #[tokio::test]
18658    async fn process_channel_message_classification_no_match_uses_default_route() {
18659        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
18660        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
18661
18662        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
18663        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
18664
18665        let agent_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18666        let agent_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = agent_model_provider_impl.clone();
18667        let vision_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18668        let vision_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = vision_model_provider_impl.clone();
18669
18670        let mut provider_cache_seed: HashMap<String, Arc<dyn ModelProvider>> = HashMap::new();
18671        provider_cache_seed.insert(
18672            "test-provider".to_string(),
18673            Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18674        );
18675        provider_cache_seed.insert("vision-provider".to_string(), vision_model_provider);
18676
18677        // Classification enabled with a rule that won't match the message.
18678        let classification_config = zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig {
18679            enabled: true,
18680            rules: vec![zeroclaw_config::schema::ClassificationRule {
18681                hint: "vision".into(),
18682                keywords: vec!["analyze-image".into()],
18683                ..Default::default()
18684            }],
18685        };
18686
18687        let model_routes = vec![zeroclaw_config::schema::ModelRouteConfig {
18688            hint: "vision".into(),
18689            model_provider: "vision-provider".into(),
18690            model: "gpt-4-vision".into(),
18691            api_key: None,
18692        }];
18693
18694        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
18695            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
18696            model_provider: Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18697            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
18698            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
18699            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
18700            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18701            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
18702                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
18703                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18704                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
18705                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
18706                ),
18707            ),
18708            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
18709            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
18710            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
18711            model: Arc::new("default-model".to_string()),
18712            temperature: Some(0.0),
18713            auto_save_memory: false,
18714            max_tool_iterations: 5,
18715            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
18716            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
18717                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
18718            ))),
18719            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
18720            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(provider_cache_seed)),
18721            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18722            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
18723            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
18724            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
18725            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
18726            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
18727            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
18728                telegram: false,
18729                slack: false,
18730                discord: false,
18731                mattermost: false,
18732                matrix: false,
18733                whatsapp: false,
18734            },
18735            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
18736            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
18737            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
18738            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
18739            hooks: None,
18740            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18741            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
18742            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18743            model_routes: Arc::new(model_routes),
18744            query_classification: classification_config,
18745            ack_reactions: true,
18746            show_tool_calls: true,
18747            session_store: None,
18748            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
18749                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
18750            )),
18751            activated_tools: None,
18752            cost_tracking: None,
18753            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
18754            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
18755            context_token_budget: 0,
18756            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
18757                Duration::ZERO,
18758            )),
18759            receipt_generator: None,
18760            show_receipts_in_response: false,
18761            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18762            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18763        });
18764
18765        process_channel_message(
18766            runtime_ctx,
18767            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18768                id: "msg-qc-nomatch".to_string(),
18769                sender: "alice".to_string(),
18770                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
18771                content: "just a regular text message".to_string(),
18772                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
18773                channel_alias: None,
18774                timestamp: 1,
18775                thread_ts: None,
18776                interruption_scope_id: None,
18777                attachments: vec![],
18778                subject: None,
18779            },
18780            CancellationToken::new(),
18781        )
18782        .await;
18783
18784        // Default model_provider should be used since no classification rule matched.
18785        assert_eq!(
18786            agent_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18787            1
18788        );
18789        assert_eq!(
18790            vision_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18791            0
18792        );
18793    }
18794
18795    #[tokio::test]
18796    async fn process_channel_message_classification_priority_selects_highest() {
18797        let channel_impl = Arc::new(TelegramRecordingChannel::default());
18798        let channel: Arc<dyn Channel> = channel_impl.clone();
18799
18800        let mut channels_by_name = HashMap::new();
18801        channels_by_name.insert(channel.name().to_string(), channel);
18802
18803        let agent_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18804        let agent_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = agent_model_provider_impl.clone();
18805        let fast_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18806        let fast_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = fast_model_provider_impl.clone();
18807        let code_model_provider_impl = Arc::new(ModelCaptureModelProvider::default());
18808        let code_model_provider: Arc<dyn ModelProvider> = code_model_provider_impl.clone();
18809
18810        let mut provider_cache_seed: HashMap<String, Arc<dyn ModelProvider>> = HashMap::new();
18811        provider_cache_seed.insert(
18812            "test-provider".to_string(),
18813            Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18814        );
18815        provider_cache_seed.insert("fast-provider".to_string(), fast_model_provider);
18816        provider_cache_seed.insert("code-provider".to_string(), code_model_provider);
18817
18818        // Both rules match "code" keyword, but "code" rule has higher priority.
18819        let classification_config = zeroclaw_config::schema::QueryClassificationConfig {
18820            enabled: true,
18821            rules: vec![
18822                zeroclaw_config::schema::ClassificationRule {
18823                    hint: "fast".into(),
18824                    keywords: vec!["code".into()],
18825                    priority: 1,
18826                    ..Default::default()
18827                },
18828                zeroclaw_config::schema::ClassificationRule {
18829                    hint: "code".into(),
18830                    keywords: vec!["code".into()],
18831                    priority: 10,
18832                    ..Default::default()
18833                },
18834            ],
18835        };
18836
18837        let model_routes = vec![
18838            zeroclaw_config::schema::ModelRouteConfig {
18839                hint: "fast".into(),
18840                model_provider: "fast-provider".into(),
18841                model: "fast-model".into(),
18842                api_key: None,
18843            },
18844            zeroclaw_config::schema::ModelRouteConfig {
18845                hint: "code".into(),
18846                model_provider: "code-provider".into(),
18847                model: "code-model".into(),
18848                api_key: None,
18849            },
18850        ];
18851
18852        let runtime_ctx = Arc::new(ChannelRuntimeContext {
18853            channels_by_name: Arc::new(channels_by_name),
18854            model_provider: Arc::clone(&agent_model_provider),
18855            model_provider_ref: Arc::new("test-provider".to_string()),
18856            agent_alias: Arc::new("test-agent".to_string()),
18857            agent_cfg: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::AliasedAgentConfig::default()),
18858            memory: Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18859            memory_strategy: Arc::new(
18860                zeroclaw_runtime::agent::memory_strategy::DefaultMemoryStrategy::with_config(
18861                    Arc::new(NoopMemory),
18862                    zeroclaw_config::schema::MemoryConfig::default(),
18863                    std::path::PathBuf::new(),
18864                ),
18865            ),
18866            tools_registry: Arc::new(vec![]),
18867            observer: Arc::new(NoopObserver),
18868            system_prompt: Arc::new("test-system-prompt".to_string()),
18869            model: Arc::new("default-model".to_string()),
18870            temperature: Some(0.0),
18871            auto_save_memory: false,
18872            max_tool_iterations: 5,
18873            min_relevance_score: 0.0,
18874            conversation_histories: Arc::new(Mutex::new(lru::LruCache::new(
18875                std::num::NonZeroUsize::new(MAX_CONVERSATION_SENDERS).unwrap(),
18876            ))),
18877            pending_new_sessions: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashSet::new())),
18878            provider_cache: Arc::new(Mutex::new(provider_cache_seed)),
18879            route_overrides: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
18880            reliability: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::ReliabilityConfig::default()),
18881            provider_runtime_options: zeroclaw_providers::ModelProviderRuntimeOptions::default(),
18882            workspace_dir: Arc::new(std::env::temp_dir()),
18883            prompt_config: Arc::new(zeroclaw_config::schema::Config::default()),
18884            message_timeout_secs: CHANNEL_MESSAGE_TIMEOUT_SECS,
18885            interrupt_on_new_message: InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
18886                telegram: false,
18887                slack: false,
18888                discord: false,
18889                mattermost: false,
18890                matrix: false,
18891                whatsapp: false,
18892            },
18893            multimodal: zeroclaw_config::schema::MultimodalConfig::default(),
18894            media_pipeline: zeroclaw_config::schema::MediaPipelineConfig::default(),
18895            transcription_config: zeroclaw_config::schema::TranscriptionConfig::default(),
18896            agent_transcription_provider: String::new(),
18897            hooks: None,
18898            non_cli_excluded_tools: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18899            autonomy_level: AutonomyLevel::default(),
18900            tool_call_dedup_exempt: Arc::new(Vec::new()),
18901            model_routes: Arc::new(model_routes),
18902            query_classification: classification_config,
18903            ack_reactions: true,
18904            show_tool_calls: true,
18905            session_store: None,
18906            approval_manager: Arc::new(ApprovalManager::for_non_interactive(
18907                &zeroclaw_config::schema::RiskProfileConfig::default(),
18908            )),
18909            activated_tools: None,
18910            cost_tracking: None,
18911            pacing: zeroclaw_config::schema::PacingConfig::default(),
18912            max_tool_result_chars: 0,
18913            context_token_budget: 0,
18914            debouncer: Arc::new(zeroclaw_infra::debounce::MessageDebouncer::new(
18915                Duration::ZERO,
18916            )),
18917            receipt_generator: None,
18918            show_receipts_in_response: false,
18919            last_applied_config_stamp: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18920            runtime_defaults_override: Arc::new(Mutex::new(None)),
18921        });
18922
18923        process_channel_message(
18924            runtime_ctx,
18925            zeroclaw_api::channel::ChannelMessage {
18926                id: "msg-qc-prio".to_string(),
18927                sender: "alice".to_string(),
18928                reply_target: "chat-1".to_string(),
18929                content: "write some code for me".to_string(),
18930                channel: "telegram".to_string(),
18931                channel_alias: None,
18932                timestamp: 1,
18933                thread_ts: None,
18934                interruption_scope_id: None,
18935                attachments: vec![],
18936                subject: None,
18937            },
18938            CancellationToken::new(),
18939        )
18940        .await;
18941
18942        // Higher-priority "code" rule (priority=10) should win over "fast" (priority=1).
18943        assert_eq!(
18944            agent_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18945            0
18946        );
18947        assert_eq!(
18948            fast_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18949            0
18950        );
18951        assert_eq!(
18952            code_model_provider_impl.call_count.load(Ordering::SeqCst),
18953            1
18954        );
18955        assert_eq!(
18956            code_model_provider_impl
18957                .models
18958                .lock()
18959                .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
18960                .as_slice(),
18961            &["code-model".to_string()]
18962        );
18963    }
18964
18965    #[cfg(feature = "channel-telegram")]
18966    #[test]
18967    fn build_channel_by_id_unconfigured_telegram_returns_error() {
18968        let config = Config::default();
18969        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
18970        match build_channel_by_id(&config_arc, "telegram") {
18971            Err(e) => {
18972                let err_msg = e.to_string();
18973                assert!(
18974                    err_msg.contains("not configured"),
18975                    "expected 'not configured' in error, got: {err_msg}"
18976                );
18977            }
18978            Ok(_) => panic!("should fail when telegram is not configured"),
18979        }
18980    }
18981
18982    #[cfg(feature = "channel-telegram")]
18983    #[test]
18984    fn build_channel_by_id_configured_telegram_succeeds() {
18985        let mut config = Config::default();
18986        config.channels.telegram.insert(
18987            "default".to_string(),
18988            zeroclaw_config::schema::TelegramConfig {
18989                enabled: true,
18990                bot_token: "test-token".to_string(),
18991                stream_mode: zeroclaw_config::schema::StreamMode::Off,
18992                draft_update_interval_ms: 1000,
18993                interrupt_on_new_message: false,
18994                mention_only: false,
18995                ack_reactions: None,
18996                proxy_url: None,
18997                approval_timeout_secs: 120,
18998                excluded_tools: vec![],
18999                reply_min_interval_secs: 0,
19000                reply_queue_depth_max: 0,
19001            },
19002        );
19003        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
19004        match build_channel_by_id(&config_arc, "telegram") {
19005            Ok(channel) => assert_eq!(channel.name(), "telegram"),
19006            Err(e) => panic!("should succeed when telegram is configured: {e}"),
19007        }
19008    }
19009
19010    #[cfg(feature = "channel-voice-call")]
19011    #[test]
19012    fn build_channel_by_id_unconfigured_voice_call_returns_error() {
19013        let config = Config::default();
19014        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
19015        match build_channel_by_id(&config_arc, "voice-call") {
19016            Err(e) => {
19017                let err_msg = e.to_string();
19018                assert!(
19019                    err_msg.contains("not configured"),
19020                    "expected 'not configured' in error, got: {err_msg}"
19021                );
19022            }
19023            Ok(_) => panic!("should fail when voice-call is not configured"),
19024        }
19025    }
19026
19027    #[cfg(feature = "channel-voice-call")]
19028    #[test]
19029    fn build_channel_by_id_configured_voice_call_succeeds() {
19030        let mut config = Config::default();
19031        config.channels.voice_call.insert(
19032            "default".to_string(),
19033            zeroclaw_config::scattered_types::VoiceCallConfig {
19034                enabled: true,
19035                model_provider: zeroclaw_config::scattered_types::VoiceProvider::Twilio,
19036                account_id: "AC_TEST".to_string(),
19037                auth_token: "test_token".to_string(),
19038                from_number: "+15551234567".to_string(),
19039                webhook_port: 8090,
19040                require_outbound_approval: true,
19041                transcription_logging: true,
19042                tts_voice: None,
19043                max_call_duration_secs: 3600,
19044                webhook_base_url: None,
19045                excluded_tools: vec![],
19046            },
19047        );
19048        let config_arc = Arc::new(RwLock::new(config));
19049        match build_channel_by_id(&config_arc, "voice-call") {
19050            Ok(channel) => assert_eq!(channel.name(), "voice_call"),
19051            Err(e) => panic!("should succeed when voice-call is configured: {e}"),
19052        }
19053    }
19054
19055    // ── is_stop_command tests ─────────────────────────────────────────────
19056
19057    #[test]
19058    fn is_stop_command_matches_bare_slash_stop() {
19059        assert!(is_stop_command("/stop"));
19060    }
19061
19062    #[test]
19063    fn is_stop_command_matches_with_leading_trailing_whitespace() {
19064        assert!(is_stop_command("  /stop  "));
19065    }
19066
19067    #[test]
19068    fn is_stop_command_is_case_insensitive() {
19069        assert!(is_stop_command("/STOP"));
19070        assert!(is_stop_command("/Stop"));
19071    }
19072
19073    #[test]
19074    fn is_stop_command_matches_with_bot_suffix() {
19075        assert!(is_stop_command("/stop@zeroclaw_bot"));
19076    }
19077
19078    #[test]
19079    fn is_stop_command_rejects_other_slash_commands() {
19080        assert!(!is_stop_command("/new"));
19081        assert!(!is_stop_command("/model gpt-4"));
19082        assert!(!is_stop_command("/models"));
19083    }
19084
19085    #[test]
19086    fn is_stop_command_rejects_plain_text() {
19087        assert!(!is_stop_command("stop"));
19088        assert!(!is_stop_command("please stop"));
19089        assert!(!is_stop_command(""));
19090    }
19091
19092    #[test]
19093    fn is_stop_command_rejects_stop_as_substring() {
19094        assert!(!is_stop_command("/stopwatch"));
19095        assert!(!is_stop_command("/stop-all"));
19096    }
19097
19098    #[test]
19099    fn interrupt_on_new_message_enabled_for_mattermost_when_true() {
19100        let cfg = InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
19101            telegram: false,
19102            slack: false,
19103            discord: false,
19104            mattermost: true,
19105            matrix: false,
19106            whatsapp: false,
19107        };
19108        assert!(cfg.enabled_for_channel("mattermost"));
19109    }
19110
19111    #[test]
19112    fn interrupt_on_new_message_disabled_for_mattermost_by_default() {
19113        let cfg = InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
19114            telegram: false,
19115            slack: false,
19116            discord: false,
19117            mattermost: false,
19118            matrix: false,
19119            whatsapp: false,
19120        };
19121        assert!(!cfg.enabled_for_channel("mattermost"));
19122    }
19123
19124    #[test]
19125    fn interrupt_on_new_message_enabled_for_discord() {
19126        let cfg = InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
19127            telegram: false,
19128            slack: false,
19129            discord: true,
19130            mattermost: false,
19131            matrix: false,
19132            whatsapp: false,
19133        };
19134        assert!(cfg.enabled_for_channel("discord"));
19135    }
19136
19137    #[test]
19138    fn interrupt_on_new_message_enabled_for_whatsapp() {
19139        let cfg = InterruptOnNewMessageConfig {
19140            telegram: false,
19141            slack: false,
19142            discord: false,
19143            mattermost: false,
19144            matrix: false,
19145            whatsapp: true,
19146        };
19147        assert!(cfg.enabled_for_channel("whatsapp"));
19148    }
19149
19150    #[test]
19151    fn interrupt_on_new_message_config_reads_whatsapp_default_alias() {
19152        let mut channels = zeroclaw_config::schema::ChannelsConfig::default();
19153        channels.whatsapp.insert(
19154            "default".to_string(),
19155            zeroclaw_config::schema::WhatsAppConfig {
19156                session_path: Some("/tmp/zeroclaw-whatsapp-session.db".into()),
19157                interrupt_on_new_message: true,
19158                ..Default::default()
19159            },
19160        );
19161
19162        let cfg = interrupt_on_new_message_config(&channels);
19163
19164        assert!(cfg.enabled_for_channel("whatsapp"));
19165        assert!(!cfg.enabled_for_channel("telegram"));
19166    }
19167
